While most real-world tasks are asynchronous with non-uniform durations, concurrency, and execution-time constraints, existing benchmarks hardly cover them. We unify these asynchronous planning challenges under a single formulation and introduce the first three benchmarks that address each at scale. We conclude that the choice of formal representation primarily determines whether planning scales: as dependency graphs grow from 5 to 100 actions, Planner collapses from 96% to 5% plan accuracy and PDDL2.1 Formalizer from 13% to 0%, while CP-SAT Formalizer averages 94% and still achieves 83% at 100 actions. Faithfulness diagnostics show that PDDL2.1's predicate-based planning representation becomes brittle compared to general constraint satisfaction programs, when LLMs must keep predicates, effects, and goals consistent. Execution-time updates of planning constraints further degrade performance sharply (Planner 23.9%, PDDL2.1 0.7%, CP-SAT 46.1%), but a state-aware repair strategy that updates only event-induced constraints recovers CP-SAT Formalizer to 84.5%.

</details>


### [365] [A Registry-Bound LLM Pipeline for Evidence-Grounded Trait Extraction across Tropical Plants, Aquatic Species, and Exotic Pets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00994)
*Jeff Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型的注册表约束型结构化特征提取流水线，应用于热带植物、水生及宠物物种，通过四项审计机制（版本化封闭词表、逐行证据引用、置信度标签、多版本保存）实现可追溯的大规模特征记录生成，在409,820个物种上生成了5,489,881条记录，81.57%为高置信度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM大规模提取结构化物种特征的可审计性和证据追溯机制不足，缺乏系统化的质量控制和验证框架。

Method: 提出四机制审计框架：(1) 39键封闭词表注册表约束所有值到类型化模式；(2) 每行逐字证据引用；(3) 置信度标签（高/中，低置信度丢弃）；(4) 多版本保存。通过三层验证：全文子串匹配、引用支持值审计、表面效度审查。

Result: 在409,880个可发布物种上执行706,220次运行，持久化5,489,881条记录，覆盖409,820个物种（99.985%），其中81.57%为高置信度。全文验证90.12%的引用为来源子串；分层审计100/100通过；表面效度50/50通过。

Conclusion: 贡献在于提出了四项审计机制框架，而非声称逐条记录的完全正确性（需人工审核），为大规模LLM结构化提取提供了可审计、可追溯的方法论基础。

Abstract: We describe a registry-bound large-language-model extraction pipeline producing evidence-grounded structured trait records at scale, on cultivated tropical plant, aquatic, and pet species. Four mechanisms render LLM-derived rows auditable: a versioned 39-key closed-vocabulary trait registry constraining every admitted value to a typed schema; a per-row verbatim evidence quote tying each value to source text; a per-row confidence label (high or medium; low dropped pre-persist); and multi-version preservation. Applied to 409,880 publishable species from the Tropical Species Encyclopedia, the pipeline executed 706,220 runs and persisted 5,489,881 trait records across 409,820 species (99.985%), 81.57% at high confidence. We report three validation layers in descending evidentiary strength: at full population, 90.12% of 5,427,588 evidence-bearing rows have their quote as a verbatim source substring (93.49% excluding one compliance meta-trait); a quote-supports-value audit on n=100 stratified non-red-zone rows yielded 100/100 (lower bound 96.30%); face-validity on n=50 red-zone rows yielded 50/50 Accept (lower bound 92.86%). Per-record correctness is not claimed; 100% pending human curation. The contribution is the four-mechanism framework.

</details>


### [366] [Decoding in Order-Agnostic Language Models: Chain-Rule Deviation and Uniform Spreading](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00997)
*Lin Yao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现有序无关语言模型（OALM）的预测条件并非一致联合分布的精确分解，揭示了置信度优先解码与自左向右解码在内容词上的接近性，并提出基于置信度轨迹方差的诊断指标，用于评估解码路径质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OALM（包括离散扩散语言模型）在任意条件集下训练，但不同揭示顺序会导致预测条件不一致，影响生成质量的评估。需要系统分析揭示顺序对模型行为的影响，并寻找有效的解码路径诊断方法。

Method: 作者首先通过改变揭示顺序测量目标对数似然的变化（最大差0.49 nats/token）；其次分析置信度优先解码与自左向右解码在内容词上的相似性；最后基于均匀扩散定理提出Var(log q_t)作为诊断指标，比较不同解码路径的置信度方差。

Result: 揭示了似然核中混合了内容难度与路径依赖伪影；发现CF解码的揭示顺序接近于L2R；在C4及四个下游基准上，低方差能区分结构化路径与随机顺序，且方差与下游正确性一致相关。

Conclusion: 建议在比较OALM解码路径时，联合报告平均置信度与置信度方差作为标准诊断指标。

Abstract: Order-agnostic language models (OALMs), including discrete diffusion language models (dLLMs), are trained to predict masked tokens under arbitrary conditioning sets, allowing sequences to be generated or scored under arbitrary reveal orders at inference time. In LLaDA-2.1, we report three findings. First, the learned conditionals are not exact factorizations of a coherent joint distribution: changing only the reveal order shifts target log-likelihood by up to 0.49 nats/token, so likelihood alone mixes content difficulty with path-dependent artifacts. Second, although confidence-first (CF) decoding is order-agnostic, its reveal orders are close to left-to-right (L2R) on content tokens. Third, we propose a complementary diagnostic based on the shape of the confidence trace. A uniform-spreading theorem shows that, at fixed total likelihood, target recoverability is maximized when per-step confidence is spread uniformly; the resulting deviation motivates $\mathrm{Var}(\log q_t)$ as a diagnostic for comparing decoding paths. Across C4 and four downstream benchmarks, low variance separates structured paths from random ordering, and variance is consistently associated with downstream correctness. These results support reporting mean confidence and confidence variance jointly when comparing OALM decoding paths.

</details>


### [367] [PolySpeech-100: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Speech Understanding Across 100+ Languages and Dialects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01016)
*Sicheng Yang,Shulan Ruan,Shiwei Wu,Yu Liu,Lu Fan,Zhi Li,You He*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PolySpeech-100是一个大规模多语言语音理解基准，覆盖110种语言变体（19种中文方言+80+低资源语言），通过混合构建管道（人类录音+指令驱动合成语音）生成。评估22个SOTA模型后发现：开源E2E模型在重方言上优于Cascade系统；开源模型在低资源语言上严重退化；链式思维提示在零样本设置下反而降低语音理解性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语音-大语言模型评估存在三大缺陷：偏向高资源语言、聚焦低层级ASR而非语义推理、忽视区域方言。作者旨在填补这一空白，构建能评估"母语级"语音理解的基准。

Method: 采用混合构建管道：1) 黄金标准人类录音；2) 指令驱动的合成语音增强。覆盖19种中文方言和80+低资源语言。评估22个SOTA模型（含Gemini-3、GPT-Audio、Qwen2.5-Omni）。

Result: 1) 开源E2E模型在重方言上优于Cascade系统；2) 商业模型保持稳健，但开源模型在低资源语言上性能严重下降；3) 链式思维提示在零样本设置下反而降低大多数模型的语音理解性能。

Conclusion: PolySpeech-100为下一代包容性、全能的语音-大语言模型建立了严格的评估标准。

Abstract: While End-to-End (E2E) Speech-Large Language Models (Speech-LLMs) are rapidly evolving, their evaluation methodologies remain limited to the era of simple transcription. Existing benchmarks suffer from three critical limitations: a pronounced bias towards high-resource languages, a focus on low-level recognition (ASR) rather than semantic reasoning, and a neglect of regional dialects. To bridge this gap, we introduce PolySpeech-100, a massive-scale benchmark designed to assess `native-level' speech comprehension across 110 linguistic variants. We employ a novel hybrid construction pipeline that augments gold-standard human recordings with instruction-driven synthetic speech, allowing us to cover 19 distinct Chinese dialects and over 80 low-resource languages. Extensive evaluation of 22 state-of-the-art models (including Gemini-3, GPT-Audio, and Qwen2.5-Omni) yields pivotal insights. First, we demonstrate that open-source E2E models outperform Cascade (ASR+LLM) systems on heavy dialects, proving that direct audio processing preserves critical paralinguistic cues and prosodic features (e.g., intonation, stress) that are often lost in standard transcription. Second, we reveal a significant performance gap: while commercial models maintain robustness, open-source models suffer catastrophic degradation on low-resource languages. Finally, counter-intuitively, we observe that under standard zero-shot settings, Chain-of-Thought prompting frequently degrades speech understanding performance for most evaluated models, revealing a potential modality alignment gap in current architectures. PolySpeech-100 establishes a rigorous standard for the next generation of inclusive, omni-capable Speech-LLMs. The data, demo, and code are publicly available at https://github.com/YoungSeng/PolySpeech-100.

</details>


### [368] [Hybrid Verified Decoding: Learning to Allocate Verification in Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01019)
*Xin Su,Dawid Majchrowski,Fangyuan Yu,Vanshil Atul Shah,Sebastian Rogawski,Pawel Morkisz,Anahita Bhiwandiwalla,Phillip Howard*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出混合验证解码方法，通过预测缓存草稿的接受长度来动态选择验证策略，在代理工作流中实现2.73倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型自回归解码成本高昂，推测解码虽能降低开销，但无参数草稿源的收益在不同步骤间波动大，需要一种能根据预期收益动态选择草稿验证策略的方法。

Method: Hybrid Verified Decoding：在验证前预测缓存草稿的接受长度，利用这个收益估计在缓存验证和基于模型的草稿生成器之间进行选择。

Result: 在3个LLM和16个数据集上，代理工作流中平均加速2.73倍，全面优于EAGLE3。

Conclusion: 提示结构创造缓存机会，高收益缓存草稿集中在草稿空间的小部分区域，收益引导的选择减少了顺序解码工作量，运行时草稿选择是推测解码的有前景方向。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) generation remains expensive because autoregressive decoding calls the model once for each new token. Speculative decoding reduces this cost by drafting multiple tokens and verifying them with the target model in one step, but its speedup depends on how many drafted tokens are accepted. Parameter-free draft sources can propose long continuations at low cost in structured and agentic workloads, yet a cache match that looks promising at one generation step may have low payoff at the next. We propose Hybrid Verified Decoding, which predicts the accepted length of a cache draft before verification and uses this payoff estimate to choose between cache verification and a model-based drafter. Across three LLMs and sixteen datasets, Hybrid Verified Decoding is especially effective on agentic workflows, where it outperforms EAGLE3 in every setting with a 2.73x average speedup. Our analysis shows how prompt structure creates cache opportunities, how high-payoff cache drafts concentrate in a small part of the draft space, and how payoff-guided selection reduces sequential decoding work, pointing to runtime draft selection as a promising direction for speculative decoding.

</details>


### [369] [DSL-LLaDA: Scaling Continuous Denoising to 8B Masked Diffusion LMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01024)
*Longxuan Yu,Yunshu Wu,Yu Fu,Siheng Xiong,Rob Brekelmans,Hui Liu,Yue Dong,Greg Ver Steeg*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出DSL方法，通过对预训练掩码离散扩散语言模型（LLaDA-8B-Instruct）进行轻量级继续预训练（仅1000步），将其适配为支持连续嵌入空间去噪的模型。该方法用连续高斯噪声替代二进制掩码，在少步解码下有效避免了标准方法存在的生成长度与质量之间的权衡问题，在零样本摘要任务上取得最佳ROUGE-1分数，并展现出噪声状态鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散掩码扩散语言模型在少步解码时面临长度与质量的权衡问题：固定步数下，要么生成长度短但质量高，要么生成长但重复性高。连续去噪方法虽可避免此问题，但从零开始大规模构建连续模型仍具挑战。

Method: 基于预训练的LLaDA-8B-Instruct模型，使用离散随机定位（DSL）方法仅继续预训练1000步。关键创新是用连续逐token高斯噪声替代二进制掩码作为软掩码，使模型支持连续嵌入空间去噪，且仅在最后一步才将token硬解码。

Result: 在少步预算（≤16次前向传播）的零样本摘要任务中，DSL-LLaDA-SDE在所有四个基准上取得最佳ROUGE-1分数，有效避免了提前终止与重复性之间的权衡。同时该适配方法展现出选择性噪声状态鲁棒性，能修正被破坏的token同时保留完好的token。

Conclusion: 通过对预训练模型进行轻量级适配，可以有效将离散掩码扩散模型转变为连续去噪模型，从而在少步解码场景下获得更优的性能和鲁棒性，且同等计算量下的标准掩码扩散训练无法复现这些行为。

Abstract: Discrete Masked diffusion language models generate text by iterative parallel decoding, but few-step decoding suffers from a tradeoff between length and quality: with a fixed step budget, standard methods can generate a short, high-quality output, or they can produce long but repetitive text. Continuous denoising can sidestep this tradeoff by evolving all positions jointly in embedding space, but building such a model from scratch at scale remains an open problem. We show that a pretrained masked DLM can instead be lightly adapted to support continuous embedding-space denoising. Starting from LLaDA-8B-Instruct, we continue-pretrain for only 1,000 steps with Discrete Stochastic Localization (DSL), replacing binary masking with continuous per-token Gaussian noise as a soft mask. The adapted model supports continuous inference that evolves all positions jointly in embedding space and defers hard token commitment to the final step. On zero-shot summarization at low step budgets (<=16 forward passes), DSL-LLaDA-SDE achieves the best ROUGE-1 on all four benchmarks and largely avoids the premature-termination / repetition tradeoff of iterative unmasking. The same adaptation also yields selective noisy-state robustness: the model corrects corrupted tokens while preserving clean ones. Control experiments using standard masked diffusion training with the same compute demonstrate neither behavior.

</details>


### [370] [Revise, Don't Freeze: Sampler-Matched Training for Self-Correcting Masked Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01026)
*Longxuan Yu,Shaorong Zhang,Yu Fu,Hui Liu,Yue Dong,Greg Ver Steeg*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出D3IM，一种无需额外模块的参数自由采样器，允许掩码扩散语言模型在去噪过程中直接修正可见token，并发现"保偏偏差"——模型倾向于维持自己的错误预测。通过SCOPE后训练程序缓解该偏差，在LLaDA-8B上以64步去噪在GSM8K、MATH-500、HumanEval、MBPP上分别提升13.0、4.8、15.3、10.4个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有掩码扩散语言模型在去噪过程中虽能重新预测每个位置，但标准采样器一旦揭开幕布token便提交不变，浪费了模型的修正能力。现有方法要么引入启发式或学习的修正机制，要么将可见token重新掩码后再预测，缺乏一个无需辅助模块即可直接修正可见token的原则性采样器。

Method: 提出D3IM采样器，作为校正器风格的反向更新推导，无需额外模块或辅助前向传播即可实现可见到可见的直接修正；发现保偏偏差后，提出SCOPE后训练程序，通过在模型预测错误时结合自身预测误差进行条件化，模拟D3IM的采样过程来缓解该偏差。

Result: 在LLaDA-8B上以64步去噪，SCOPE+D3IM相比原始LLaDA-8B标准去掩码，GSM8K提升13.0个百分点（达68.3%），MATH-500提升4.8（达23.6%），HumanEval提升15.3（达29.3%），MBPP提升10.4（达30.8%），且在数学和代码任务上随着去噪步数增加收益持续提升。

Conclusion: 直接修正可见token的原则性采样器D3IM配合缓解保偏偏差的SCOPE后训练，能显著提升掩码扩散语言模型的推理能力，且无需引入额外参数或模块，是一种高效且可扩展的改进方案。

Abstract: Masked diffusion language models (MDLMs) re-predict every position at each denoising step, but standard samplers commit tokens once revealed, leaving this revision capability unused. Existing approaches either add heuristic or learned mechanisms to revise committed tokens, or remask them back to [MASK] before re-predicting; a principled sampler that directly revises visible tokens without auxiliary modules remains underexplored. We introduce D3IM, a parameter-free sampler derived as a corrector-style reverse update that permits direct visible-to-visible revision without additional modules or auxiliary passes. D3IM also reveals a model-side obstacle we term preservation bias: the model tends to reproduce its own wrong committed tokens rather than correct them. We address this with SCOPE (Self-Conditioned On Prediction Errors), a lightweight post-training procedure that simulates D3IM's sampling process. On LLaDA-8B at 64 denoising steps, SCOPE+D3IM improves over the original LLaDA-8B with standard unmasking by +13.0 on GSM8K (68.3%), +4.8 on MATH-500 (23.6%), +15.3 on HumanEval (29.3%), and +10.4 on MBPP (30.8%), with gains that increase as more denoising steps are used on math and HumanEval.

</details>


### [371] [A Finite-Calibration Regime Map for LLM Judge Panels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01034)
*Bin Zhu,Yanghui Rao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了在有限人工标注预算下，LLM评估者面板应选择低维堆叠器还是联合输出表进行校准。低维堆叠器估计成本低但忽略交互效应，联合表可捕捉交互但需更多数据。通过有限校准面板选择框架，实验表明在大多数真实数据集上标量/可靠性聚合更优，但存在交互效应时联合表更有优势。核心问题不是“需要多少评估者”，而是“在可用标注下能否有效估计新评估者的信息”。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在有限人工标注预算下，如何选择LLM评估者面板的校准策略——低维堆叠器（低成本但忽略交互）还是联合输出表（可捕捉交互但成本高）——存在权衡，需要系统研究这一取舍。

Method: 提出有限校准面板选择（Finite-Calibration Panel Selection）框架，包含评估路径、前缀大小、聚合器族的选择，以及表格和参数估计诊断。在RewardBench、LLMBar、SummEval、Arena100K上使用七评估者池（含DeepSeek V4 Flash）进行实验。

Result: 标量/可靠性聚合在20个数据集-预算单元中赢得16个；当存在六路交互时，联合表测试MSE从0.224降至0.061。

Conclusion: 当前LLM评估者输出多为加性或冗余，实际关键问题不是需要多少评估者，而是新评估者的信息在给定人工标注下是否可估计。

Abstract: We study when LLM judge panels should be calibrated with low-dimensional stackers versus joint output tables under finite human-label budgets. Low-dimensional stackers have small estimation cost but miss interactions, whereas joint-table calibrators can represent interactions but pay for cell counts and unseen patterns. We cast this tradeoff as a finite-calibration regime map and instantiate it as Finite-Calibration Panel Selection, a deployable validation selector over judge path, prefix size, and aggregator family with table and parametric estimation diagnostics. On RewardBench, LLMBar, SummEval, and Arena100K with a seven-judge pool including DeepSeek V4 Flash, scalar/reliability aggregation wins 16 of 20 real dataset--budget cells, indicating that current judge outputs are often additive or redundant. Controlled calibration-growth data show the complementary regime: additive labels remain scalar-favored, whereas a six-way interaction selects a larger joint table and its test MSE drops from 0.224 to 0.061 once unseen mass vanishes. Thus the practical question is not ``how many judges?'' but whether the next judge's information is estimable under the available human labels.

</details>


### [372] [ExpWeaver: LLM Agents Learn from Experience via Latent RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01041)
*Tao Feng,Tianyang Luo,Jingjun Xu,Zhigang Hua,Yan Xie,Shuang Yang,Ge Liu,Jiaxuan You*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ExpWeaver 提出了一种基于隐空间检索增强生成的经验学习框架，无需独立 RAG 模块，通过 LLM 隐藏状态编码、逐解码步隐空间检索、交叉注意力聚合与门控残差机制实现端到端优化，在 13 个任务中 12 个达到 SOTA，token 效率优于文本检索方法，跨域泛化能力强。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有经验学习方法局限于显式文本空间，通过语义相似度检索并拼接经验到上下文窗口，导致 token 开销大，且检索与生成架构分离、未端到端优化。

Method: ExpWeaver 利用 LLM 自身隐状态编码经验，在隐空间逐解码步检索相关经验，通过交叉注意力聚合与门控残差机制融合，整个流程使用强化学习端到端训练。

Result: 在 13 个任务中 12 个达 SOTA，比最强基线高 6.8% 以上；token 效率与无检索基线相当（文本检索方法需 1.5-2 倍 token）；零样本跨域迁移提升 16.32%，少样本提升 15.21%。

Conclusion: ExpWeaver 有效克服了显式文本检索的 token 开销与架构分离问题，在广泛任务上实现了更优的性能与泛化能力。

Abstract: Experience learning has achieved promising results in enhancing LLM agent planning and reasoning by integrating past interactions as reusable knowledge. However, existing methods remain confined to explicit text space, retrieving experiences via semantic similarity and concatenating them into the context window, leading to substantial token overhead and a decoupled architecture that separates retrieval from generation. To address these limitations, we propose ExpWeaver, a framework that enables LLM agents to learn from experience via latent retrieval-augmented generation, without requiring a separate RAG module. ExpWeaver encodes experiences using the LLM's own hidden states, retrieves relevant experiences directly in latent space at each decoding step, and integrates them through cross-attention aggregation and gated residual mechanisms. The entire pipeline is optimized end-to-end with reinforcement learning, supporting both generative and ranking tasks. We evaluate ExpWeaver on 13 diverse tasks spanning question answering, reasoning, coding, scientific prediction, and recommendation. Results demonstrate that ExpWeaver achieves state-of-the-art performance on 12 out of 13 tasks, outperforming the strongest baseline by over 6.8%; maintains token efficiency comparable to non-retrieval baselines while text-based retrieval methods require 1.5 to 2 times more tokens; and exhibits superior cross-domain generalization, outperforming the strongest baseline by 16.32% under zero-shot transfer and 15.21% under few-shot transfer. Our code for ExpWeaver is released at https://github.com/ulab-uiuc/ExpWeaver.

</details>


### [373] [Child-directed speech facilitates production, not comprehension, in BabyLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01045)
*Bastian Bunzeck,Sina Zarrieß*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 现有评估低估了儿童指向性语言(CDS)对婴儿语言模型的作用。作者提出基于框架补全任务的生成式评估方法，发现CDS训练的模型在早期就能生成语法正确的补全，而网络数据训练的模型在理解任务上表现更好，两者存在能力分离。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有婴儿语言模型(BabyLMs)评估主要关注理解能力而非产生能力，这与基于使用的语言习得理论不符。该理论认为CDS通过"框架"(高频词汇模式+开放槽位)促进早期语言使用。作者想探究CDS是否真的对语言学习无益，还是评估方式有局限。

Method: 提出基于框架补全任务的生成式评估框架。比较Llama模型在三种训练数据上的表现：CDS、BabyLM语料库、网络爬虫数据(FineWeb-edu)，同时使用传统理解基准和新提出的框架进行评估。

Result: 发现理解与产生能力存在明显分离：FineWeb训练的模型在最小对任务上表现优异；CDS训练的模型更早产生语法正确的补全，且将概率质量集中在合适的填充词上。

Conclusion: 传统的理解基准低估了CDS对婴儿语言模型的作用，CDS在促进语言产生能力方面具有独特优势，这与基于使用的语言习得理论相一致。

Abstract: Recent studies suggest that child-directed speech is not conducive to language learning in BabyLMs. However, current evaluations focus predominantly on comprehension and not production, which is central to usage-based theories of language acquisition which argue how CDS facilitates early language use through constructional ''frames'' (frequent lexical patterns with open slots). We introduce a novel generation-based evaluation inspired by such theories in form of a frame-completion task, and compare Llama models trained with CDS, the BabyLM corpus, and web-crawl data (FineWeb-edu) on comprehension benchmarks and our novel framework. Our results reveal a clear dissociation between models' comprehension and production capabilities: while FineWeb-trained models excel at minimal pairs, CDS-trained models produce grammatical completions substantially earlier in training and concentrate probability mass on appropriate slot-fillers. These findings show that comprehension benchmarks underestimate what CDS affords to BabyLMs.

</details>


### [374] [PMC-InterCPT: Rethinking Biomedical Interleaved Data for Multimodal Continued Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01049)
*Guanghao Zhu,Zeyu Liu,Zhitian Hou,Pengkai Wang,Zhijie Sang,Minheng Ni,Wenjun Wang,Yanggan Gu,Shuo Cai,Congkai Xie,Jianmin Wu,Hongxia Yang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出PMC-InterCPT，一个基于上下文的生物医学图文交错语料库，通过恢复缺失标题、清洗文本、重构交错样本及LLM质量过滤，并引入四桶证据分类进行模态重采样，在更少CPT令牌下有效提升医学多模态性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生物医学图文数据集存在标题简短、上下文依赖、结构噪声等问题，缺乏高质量、上下文关联的交错式图文数据用于多模态持续预训练。

Method: 1) 重建缺失标题并清洗文本；2) 重构交错图像-文本样本；3) LLM监督的医学相关性和质量分类器过滤噪声；4) 四桶证据分类法进行模态感知重采样。

Result: 在Qwen3.5-4B-Base上经过CPT+SFT，PMC-InterCPT在医学和通用多模态任务上均取得提升，且使用的CPT令牌少于原始数据池。

Conclusion: 数据质量与模态平衡对医学多模态CPT具有互补作用，PMC-InterCPT验证了上下文感知数据构建的有效性。

Abstract: Large-scale biomedical image-text datasets extracted from scientific literature provide valuable resources for medical multimodal model training. These datasets are commonly organized as image-caption pairs; however, figure captions are often short, context-dependent, and only partially informative without the surrounding article text. At the same time, large-scale automatic extraction introduces structural noise such as missing captions, residual markup, duplicated context, and incoherent multi-paragraph figure descriptions. We revisit data construction for medical multimodal continued pretraining (CPT) and present PMC-InterCPT, a context-grounded biomedical interleaved corpus that incorporates figure-referencing body text in addition to captions. Our pipeline recovers missing captions, cleans caption and context text, reconstructs coherent interleaved image-text samples, and applies LLM-supervised medical relevance and quality classifiers to filter noisy records. We further reveal strong modality imbalance in the resulting corpus and introduce a four-bucket evidence taxonomy for modality-aware resampling. Through CPT followed by supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on Qwen3.5-4B-Base, PMC-InterCPT effectively improves medical and general multimodal performance while using fewer CPT tokens than the raw source pool. The experimental results also illustrate the complementarity between the data quality and modality for medical multimodal CPT.

</details>


### [375] [MENTIS: What Belief Changes Under Alignment? Measuring Multi-Scale Latent Torsion in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01060)
*Partha Pratim Saha,Samarth Raina,Mayur Parvatikar,Amit Dhanda,Vinija Jain,Aman Chadha,Amitava Das*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出MENTIS框架，通过几何度量（扭转范数、谱诊断、ERA）比较指令微调模型与偏好对齐模型的内部表征变化，发现对齐效应具有选择性、集中在中后期层、与概念类型和上下文熵相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 行为层面评估无法揭示对齐对模型内部计算的影响，且对齐模型仍存在越狱攻击等安全性问题，因此需要从内部几何结构角度理解偏好对齐带来的变化。

Method: 提出MENTIS框架，包含三种度量：层间协方差扭转范数(T1)、谱扭转诊断(T2)和能量辐射激活度量(ERA)，在4组7-8B模型对上进行分析。

Result: 对齐效应具有选择性：规范性概念比事实性概念扭转更大；扭转与上下文熵负相关；峰值效应集中在架构特定的中后期层，且在词级、提示级和模型级分析中一致。

Conclusion: 偏好对齐在模型内部留下结构化的、深度定位的几何签名，这些信息无法通过行为级评估完全揭示。

Abstract: Preference alignment has substantially improved the observable behavior of large language models, yet it remains unclear what alignment changes internally. Aligned systems still fail under jailbreaks, prompt injection, and retrieval-time corruption, suggesting behavior-level evaluation alone is incomplete. Post-training should leave measurable traces in internal computation. We ask: when an instruction-tuned (IT) model becomes a preference-aligned (PA) model, what geometric structure changes, where do those changes concentrate, and how selectively do they vary across concepts, prompts, and model families?
  We introduce MENTIS, a geometry-first framework for measuring alignment-induced internal reorganization in paired checkpoints. MENTIS compares IT and PA models using a primary layerwise covariance-based torsion norm (T1), a secondary spectral torsion diagnostic (T2), and an Energy-Radiance-Activation measure (ERA) for depth localization. Across four 7-8B model pairs on LITMUS, our study reveals that alignment-induced change is selective rather than uniform: normative concepts exhibit larger torsion shifts than factual concepts on average; torsion is negatively correlated with contextual entropy; and peak effects localize to architecture-specific mid-to-late layers. The same pattern appears across word-level, prompt-level, and model-level analyses. These results suggest preference alignment leaves structured, depth-localized geometric signatures in internal computation beyond what behavior-level evaluation alone can reveal.

</details>


### [376] [When Is 0.1% Enough? Analyzing the Combined Effects of Dimensionality Reduction and Quantization on Text Embedding Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01074)
*Riku Kisako,Hayato Tsukagoshi,Ryohei Sasano*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了结合降维和量化的文本嵌入压缩方法，发现两者组合能实现更强的压缩效果，某些情况下可将嵌入压缩至原大小的0.1%而性能几乎无损，且最优压缩策略取决于具体任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本嵌入模型通常输出高维实值向量，导致巨大的存储和计算开销。已有研究提出降维或量化等压缩方法，但二者组合的效果尚未被充分探索。

Method: 使用四个MTEB任务族和四个预训练嵌入模型，系统对比单独使用降维、单独使用量化以及两者组合的压缩效果。

Result: 组合降维与量化比单独使用任何一种方法都能实现更强的压缩；在某些设定下可将嵌入压缩至原大小的0.1%，且性能几乎不下降。

Conclusion: 降维与量化的组合是更有效的文本嵌入压缩方式，但最优压缩策略因任务而异。

Abstract: Recent high-performing text embedding models often output high-dimensional real-valued vectors, resulting in substantial storage and computational costs. To address this issue, compression methods based on dimensionality reduction or quantization have been proposed; however, the effects of combining dimensionality reduction and quantization have not been sufficiently investigated. In this paper, we systematically examine the effectiveness of compressing text embeddings by combining dimensionality reduction and quantization, using four MTEB task families and four pretrained embedding models. The experimental results demonstrate that combining dimensionality reduction and quantization enables substantially stronger compression than using either method alone, that in some settings embeddings can be reduced to as little as 0.1% of their original size with almost no performance degradation, and that the optimal compression strategy depends on the task.

</details>


### [377] [On the Generalization Gap in Self-Evolving Language Model Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01075)
*Zhenting Qi,Susanna Maria Baby,Stefanie Anna Baby,Kan Yuan,Andrew Tomkins,Tu Vu,Da-Cheng Juan,Cyrus Rashtchian*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了在严格闭环设置下，大语言模型通过自演化（仅使用未标注提示集和基础模型）能达到何种程度的表现。实验基于逻辑推理任务发现：自演化能持续提升模型性能，但最终会出现平台期，且与有监督训练仍存在显著差距。多轮批评-修订机制在大型模型上表现接近有监督训练，但整体上自演化仍存在固有不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在严格闭环自演化设置下（仅能访问未标注提示集和基础模型），模型通过内部生成的监督信号训练，其效果距离有监督训练（oracle supervision）究竟有多大的差距。

Method: 提出了一个统一的离线自演化框架，分析四种代表性策略：单轮验证、多轮修订与反馈、迭代训练、课程学习。使用Knights and Knaves（KK）逻辑推理任务作为主要实验平台，该任务具有确定性解、可控难度和易于泛化的特性。

Result: 1）自演化能一致地提升基础模型性能，但随计算资源投入增加会出现平台期；2）自演化与有监督训练仍存在不可忽视的差距；3）多轮批评-修订机制在大模型（Gemma 12B）上效果接近有监督训练；4）在真实世界推理基准上的增益较为有限。

Conclusion: 闭环自演化能带来一定提升，但内部生成的监督信号在这种最小化设置下仍不足以取代外部有监督信号，存在固有不足。

Abstract: Recent work suggests that large language models (LLMs) can improve through self-evolution (SE), using supervision signals generated by the model itself. In this work, we ask: under a strict closed-loop setup, where the self-evolution algorithm has access only to an unlabeled prompt set and a base model, how close can internally generated supervision come to oracle-supervised training? We analyze four representative strategies in a unified offline self-evolution framework: single-round verification, multi-turn revision with feedback, iterative training, and curriculum learning. Our primary experiments use Knights and Knaves (KK) logical reasoning tasks, which provide deterministic solutions, controlled difficulty levels, and a clean testbed for easy-to-hard generalization. We first show that self-evolution consistently improves over the base model, but plateaus after excessive training compute is invested, and eventually still leaves a non-trivial gap to oracle supervision. We find that multi-turn critic-revision with large models can reach strong self-evolution performance, with Gemma 12B nearly matching oracle-supervised training. Beyond Knights and Knaves, we also evaluate self-evolution on real-world reasoning benchmarks, where gains are also modest. Overall, our results characterize when closed-loop self-evolution can help and show how internally generated supervision remains insufficient under this minimal formulation.

</details>


### [378] [Deep Research as Rubric for Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01091)
*Wangyi Mei,Zhouhong Gu,Zhenhan Bai,Yin Cai,Lefan Zhang,Zhenxin Ding,Bo Chen,Yan Gao,Yi Wu,Yao Hu,Jiaqing Liang,Deqing Yang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出DR-rubric框架，将评估标准构建从静态模板转化为证据驱动的研究过程，通过两阶段（智能体搜索+蒸馏约束）生成细粒度奖励信号，用于开放任务策略优化。仅需1K-3K训练样本即可取得竞争力表现，且支持自我引导式标准生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开放推理和长文本生成任务缺乏可靠的自动验证信号用于基于奖励的策略优化。现有评估标准方法将其视为给定的人工制品（手工或提示生成），忽略了任务特定的知识密集型维度，导致奖励信号失真。

Method: 两阶段框架：Stage I通过迭代多轮智能体搜索获取领域事实、结构约束和失败模式；Stage II将证据蒸馏为原子化、可独立验证的约束，用于GRPO策略优化。支持模型自身生成评估标准（自举模式），无需前沿模型协助。

Result: 在6个基准上仅用1K-3K训练样本即取得竞争力性能。GPT-5生成的评估标准在智能体任务上覆盖面更优，Gemini生成的标准在智能体和专家推理任务上表现最平衡，自举标准经历"专业化→再平衡"演化，第三次迭代取得最佳综合性能。

Conclusion: 将评估标准构建从静态评估模板重新定义为证据驱动的研究过程，能为开放任务提供更可扩展、更细粒度的奖励信号，验证了"评估标准构建本身即是研究问题"的核心观点。

Abstract: Open-ended reasoning and long-form generation tasks lack reliable automatic verification signals for reward-based policy optimization. Rubrics offer a promising alternative, but existing approaches treat them as given artifacts -- either hand-crafted or prompt-generated -- and often miss the task-specific, knowledge-intensive dimensions that matter most, distorting the reward signal. Our key observation is that rubric construction is itself a research problem: identifying what makes a response correct or insightful requires discovering and synthesizing external knowledge. We propose Deep Research as Rubric (DR-rubric), a two-stage framework for constructing such rubrics. Stage I elicits domain facts, structural constraints, and failure modes through iterative multi-turn agentic search; Stage II distills this evidence into atomic, independently verifiable constraints for GRPO-based policy optimization. Because the model under training can serve as its own rubric generator, DR-rubric-8B supports bootstrap rubric generation without frontier-model assistance. We evaluate on 6 benchmarks spanning agentic research and expert reasoning. Experiments show that DR-Rubric achieves strong competitive performance with only 1K -- 3K training instances, where GPT-5-generated rubrics particularly benefit breadth coverage on agentic tasks, Gemini-generated rubrics yield the most balanced performance across agentic and expert reasoning tasks, and bootstrap rubrics exhibit a specialization-to-rebalancing evolution achieving the best overall performance at the third iteration. Results demonstrate that reframing rubric construction from static evaluation templates into an evidence-driven research process yields more scalable, fine-grained reward signals for open-ended tasks.

</details>


### [379] [MiCU: End-to-End Smart Home Command Understanding with Large Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01099)
*Haowei Han,Kexin Hu,Weiwei Cai,Debiao Zhang,Bin Qin,Yuxiang Wang,Jiawei Jiang,Xiao Yan,Bo Du*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出MiCU，一个基于领域特定LLM的智能家居命令理解系统，通过自动化训练数据合成、课程学习、强化学习和令牌压缩技术，在命令理解任务上平均准确率提升20.01%，并在小米Home应用中部署，每天约170万页面浏览量，降低了用户纠错率1.57%，提高了人工审核准确率32.05%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统命令理解系统对精确指令表现良好，但对模糊或不对齐的命令（如"让卧室变得舒适"）处理能力不足。LLM虽能泛化，但受限于领域数据稀缺、任务适配不足和高计算成本。

Method: 提出自动化训练数据合成工作流（利用用户日志和LLM），构建领域特定LLM MiCU：采用课程学习注入领域知识，再通过冷启动训练结合基于领域特定思维规则的强化学习增强推理能力，并提出令牌压缩技术将设备描述压缩为单个特殊令牌以降低推理开销。

Result: MiCU在所有设备类别上平均准确率提升20.01%；在小米Home应用中部署后，每天约170万页面浏览量，用户纠错率降低1.57%，人工审核准确率提升32.05%。

Conclusion: 通过自动化数据合成、课程学习、强化学习和令牌压缩等技术的结合，成功构建了高效、准确的领域特定LLM，并在实际大规模智能家居场景中得到验证。

Abstract: Command understanding systems in smart home ecosystems can automate device control and substantially improve user experience. However, while they perform well on precise utterances (e.g., "turn on the bedroom light"), they struggle with ambiguous or misaligned commands (e.g., "make the bedroom cozy"). Large language models (LLMs) generalize well across various domains and can outperform traditional rule-based systems on such tasks, but their effectiveness is often constrained by scarce domain-specific data, insufficient task-specific adaptation, and high computational costs. In this paper, we propose an automated training data synthesis workflow using user logs and LLMs; then we build MiCU, a domain-specific LLM that excels at command understanding. Specifically, we employ curriculum learning to inject domain knowledge into the base LLM, then we enhance its reasoning ability via cold-start training combined with reinforcement learning (RL) guided by domain-specific thinking rules. Additionally, we introduce a token compression technique that condenses device description into a single special token, substantially reducing inference overhead and enabling \model-fast, an efficient variant optimized for long inputs. Extensive experiments show that MiCU significantly outperforms baselines, with an average accuracy gain of 20.01% across all device categories. We have deployed MiCU in the Xiaomi Home app, receiving approximately 1.7 million page views per day. Production evaluations show that MiCU reduces user correction rate by 1.57% and increases human audited accuracy by 32.05%. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/xiaomi-research/iot_spec_llm

</details>


### [380] [From Outliers to Errors: Auditing Pali-to-English LLM Translations with Multi-Reference Adjudication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01136)
*Máté Metzger,Nadnapang Phophichit,Hansa Dhammahaso*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对古典语言（巴利语）英译的审计方法，使用多名人类译者构建"参考包络"，通过嵌入漂移筛选高风险候选译文，再由LLM评审团裁定，发现漂移指标能预测错误严重性而非直接标记错误，GPT-5.5在高端漂移区间错误率最低，Grok 4.3最高，主要错误类型为遗漏/截断和教义术语错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统单一评分指标将合理翻译变体与错误混为一谈，这一问题在古典语言翻译中尤为突出，因为同一段落可能同时存在多种合理的英文翻译。现有评估方法缺乏处理这种"合法多义性"的能力。

Method: 基于四款LLM（GPT-5.5、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.1 Pro、Grok 4.3）在1700段巴利藏经上的英译输出，以三位权威译者（Sujato、Thanissaro、Bodhi）的译文构建参考包络而非单一黄金标准，计算嵌入漂移作为分诊信号，对1203个高于1.5漂移阈值的候选译文由三模型LLM评审团盲审，并用300条人工验证集校准。

Result: 漂移值预测错误严重性：1.5-2.0区间主要错误率7.9%，3.0以上升至51.6%，约80%的1.5-2.0异常值为合法翻译变体。GPT-5.5高端漂移主要错误率最低，Grok 4.3异常量最大且尾部错误率最高（总体27.6%，漂移>3.0时达74.4%）。主要错误类型为遗漏/截断和教义术语错误。

Conclusion: 本文贡献了一个可复用的古典-现代翻译审计设计：以多位人类译者构建参考包络，利用嵌入漂移优先化审查，对标记的尾部进行评审而非将异常状态直接视为错误。漂移是预测严重性的有用信号，但需要后续人工或自动化评审来区分合法变体与真正错误。

Abstract: Single-score translation metrics can conflate legitimate variation with error, a problem especially acute for classical languages where multiple defensible English renderings of the same passage coexist. We audit Pali-to-English output from four flagship large language models (LLMs): GPT-5.5, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and Grok 4.3, on 1,700 passages from the Pali Canon, using three established human translations by Bhikkhu Sujato, Thanissaro Bhikkhu, and Bhikkhu Bodhi as a local reference envelope rather than a single gold standard. Each candidate's normalized embedding drift from the reference centroid serves as a triage signal, not an error label; the 1,203 candidates above a 1.5 drift threshold are then adjudicated by a blinded three-model LLM judge panel, calibrated against a 300-instance author-adjudicated validation set. Two results stand out. First, drift predicts severity rather than error per se: the major-error rate among adjudicated high-drift candidates rose monotonically from 7.9% in the 1.5-2.0 band to 51.6% above 3.0, while approximately 80% of 1.5-2.0 outliers were judged valid translation variations. Second, model differences were clearest in the high-drift tail: GPT-5.5 had the lowest adjudicated high-drift major-error rate, with confidence intervals overlapping those of Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Gemini 3.1 Pro; Grok 4.3 had both the largest outlier volume and the highest tail major-error rate (27.6% overall, 74.4% above drift 3.0). The dominant major-error categories (e.g. omission or truncation, doctrinal term errors) are precisely the failures most likely to mislead readers of doctrinal text. The contribution is a reusable audit design for classical-to-modern translation: define a local reference envelope from multiple human translators, use embedding drift to prioritize review, and adjudicate the flagged tail rather than treating outlier status as error.

</details>


### [381] [Not All Explanations Simulate Equally: Comparing Verbalized Feature Attributions and Self-Generated Rationales](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01148)
*Pingjun Hong,Benjamin Roth*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文比较了两种自然语言解释（特征归因解释与自生成理由）在反事实模拟设置下的可模拟性，发现解释格式和粒度对模拟效果有显著影响，且效果因模型和格式而异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然语言解释常被视为理解模型行为的统一接口，但不同来源的解释可能在模拟模型行为时效果不同，需要系统比较。

Method: 采用反事实模拟评估框架，以LLM作为预测器，衡量给定解释后能否更好预测模型对后续问题的答案。比较了特征归因解释与自生成理由两类解释，分析了解释来源、语言化策略和特征粒度的影响。

Result: 解释格式和粒度显著影响可模拟性；基于归因的解释与自生成理由在提升反事实预测能力上存在差异，且效果在不同模型和格式间不一致。

Conclusion: 解释来源、语言化策略和特征粒度都是影响可模拟性的关键因素，选择解释方式需要依据具体模型和任务场景而定。

Abstract: Natural-language explanations are often treated as a unified interface for understanding model behavior, but different explanation sources may support simulation in different ways. This paper compares two families of explanations for question answering models: verbalized feature attributions and self-generated rationales. We evaluate them under a shared counterfactual simulation setting, using an LLM judge as predictor and measuring whether it can better predict a model's answers to follow-up questions when given its explanation. Across multiple instruction-tuned models, we analyze how explanation source, verbalization strategy, and feature granularity affect the simulatability of explanations. Our results show that explanation format and granularity affect simulatability: attribution-based explanations and self-generated rationales differ in how much they improve counterfactual prediction, with effects that vary across models and formats.

</details>


### [382] [Thinking Economically: A Hierarchical Framework for Adaptive-Complexity Reasoning in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01168)
*Yubo Gao,Haotian Wu,Hong Chen,Junquan Huang,Yibo Yan,Jungang Li,Zihao Dongfang,Sicheng Tao,Puay Siew Tan,Jie Zhang,Xuming Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出分层自适应预算器（HAB），通过粗到细的预算分配机制解决大模型推理中的"过度思考"问题，在提升精度的同时减少token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CoT推理存在计算浪费的"过度思考"问题，且已有方法采用统一压缩策略，忽略了推理复杂度在不同问题和步骤层面的异质性。

Method: 提出HAB训练框架：1）问题级预算：预测最佳推理深度；2）步骤级预算：基于PPL推导的步骤比较和自适应Pareto优化学习token预算信号，辅以Fisher信息剪枝器提供细粒度训练指导。

Result: 在GSM8K和MATH500上，HAB在准确率上超越标准CoT，同时减少了token使用量，实现了比基线方法更优的性能-效率权衡。

Conclusion: 验证了"经济思考"原则的有效性——根据任务和步骤的内在需求智能分配计算资源，而非追求统一的简洁性。

Abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) has significantly enhanced LLM reasoning, yet often incurs substantial computational overhead due to "overthinking": generating excessively long rationales without commensurate accuracy gains. Existing efficiency methods typically apply uniform compression, which overlooks a critical observation that reasoning complexity is heterogeneous at two distinct granularity: across different problems and within individual reasoning steps. This motivates our principle of Thinking Economically: intelligently allocating computational resources based on intrinsic task and step demands rather than pursuing uniform brevity. We propose Hierarchical Adaptive Budgeter (HAB), a training framework that operationalizes this principle through coarse-to-fine budgeting. At the inter-step level, HAB predicts the optimal reasoning depth for each problem. At the intra-step level, HAB learns step-specific token budgeting signals from PPL-derived step comparisons and an adaptive Pareto optimization objective that captures the local quality-efficiency trade-off, while a Fisher Information-based pruner further provides fine-grained training-time guidance, thereby encouraging the generator to internalize more economical reasoning patterns. Experiments on GSM8K and MATH500 show that HAB not only surpasses standard CoT in accuracy but also reduces token usage, achieving a stronger performance-efficiency trade-off than the compared baselines.

</details>


### [383] [CA-BED: Conversation-Aware Bayesian Experimental Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01182)
*Daniel Arnould,Rashad Aziz,Zixuan Kang,Tanav Changal,Kevin Zhu,Sunishchal Dev,Gabriel Grand,Shreyas Sunil Kulkarni*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出CA-BED框架，通过贝叶斯实验设计结合LLM似然估计，在对话中主动选择最优问题以减少不确定性，在实体推理任务中成功率提升21.8%，仅需增加1.8轮对话。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在静态推理任务中表现优异，但在需要主动提问获取信息的交互场景中性能下降，现有方法难以有效选择能降低不确定性的问题，且难以处理模糊或部分信息性的回答。

Method: 提出CA-BED框架，在推理阶段进行概率化对话规划：维护假设的信念分布，通过模拟对话树预期可能回答并传播信息增益，结合贝叶斯实验设计与LLM似然估计来优化多轮对话中的问题选择。

Result: 在两个结构化实体推理基准上，CA-BED相比直接提示方法成功率达21.8%的平均提升，相比其他信息获取方法也有可比增益，且仅增加平均1.8轮对话。

Conclusion: CA-BED能显著提升LLM在交互推理场景中的表现，以较小的对话轮次代价换取较大的成功率提升，验证了将贝叶斯实验设计融入对话规划的有效性。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at static reasoning tasks, yet their performance often degrades in interactive scenarios where information must be actively acquired through questioning. A key challenge lies in selecting questions that reduce uncertainty while incorporating responses that may be ambiguous or only partially informative. To address this, we propose Conversation-Aware Bayesian Experimental Design (CA-BED), an inference-time probabilistic dialog planning framework that integrates Bayesian Experimental Design with LLM-based likelihood estimation to optimize question selection over multiple conversational turns. CA-BED maintains a belief distribution over hypotheses, anticipates possible answers, and propagates expected information gain through a simulated conversation tree. Across two structured entity-deduction benchmarks, CA-BED yields an average 21.8% improvement in success rates over direct prompting, with comparable gains relative to alternative information-seeking methods. It achieves these gains with an average increase of only 1.8 conversational turns compared to direct prompting.

</details>


### [384] [Low-Resource Safety Failures Are Action Failures, Not Representation Failures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01196)
*Rashad Aziz,Ikhlasul Akmal Hanif,Fajri Koto*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 高风险语言的安全对齐很难转移到低资源语言。研究发现模型在表示层面已有安全区分能力，但无法将其转化为拒绝行为。通过重新校准（而非重新训练）高资源语言的决策门控，仅用1-4个目标语言样本即可大幅提升跨语言安全拒绝性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言模型在低资源语言上安全对齐失效严重（有害拒绝从87.9%降至43.9%），现有自适应方法也无法解决。作者希望定位失败的根本原因并提出轻量级修复方案。

Method: 在Qwen2.5-7B、Gemma-2-9B、Llama-3.1-8B上对23种语言进行诊断实验，提取有害方向表征并分析线性可分性。提出重新校准方法：用低秩逻辑回归读出头（low-rank logistic readout）作为决策门控，仅用1-4个目标语言样本重设决策阈值，在拒绝引导（refusal steering）和有害方向消融（harmfulness-direction ablation）之间路由。

Result: 重新校准方法将平均拒绝选择性（有害−无害拒绝率）从最强基线的33.6提升至54.5，同时保持MMLU性能不变。证明问题不在于表示缺失，而在于决策校准的跨语言迁移失败。

Conclusion: 低资源语言的安全失败可以通过重新校准现有表示来修复，无需学习新表示。这为跨语言安全对齐提供了一种极低资源消耗的解决方案。

Abstract: Safety alignment learned in high-resource languages transfers poorly to low-resource languages. Models refuse harmful prompts in English but fail to refuse when the same prompts are translated into Swahili or Burmese. Adaptive steering methods like AdaSteer and CAST inherit this failure cross-lingually. We diagnose where transfer breaks down. Across Qwen2.5-7B, Gemma-2-9B, and Llama-3.1-8B on 23 languages, the harmfulness direction extracted from high-resource activations linearly separates harmful from harmless low-resource prompts nearly as well as high-resource ones. The relevant representation is present. Yet harmful refusal drops from 87.9% to 43.9%. The model fails to convert the representation into refusal. What fails to transfer is calibration of the safety decision, not the underlying representation. We exploit this by recalibrating, rather than retraining, a high-resource gate: a low-rank logistic readout with its decision threshold reset using as few as 1 to 4 target-language examples per class. The gate routes between refusal steering and harmfulness-direction ablation, substantially raising mean refusal selectivity ($Δ$ = harmful $-$ harmless refusal) from 33.6 for the strongest adapted baseline to 54.5 while preserving MMLU utility. These results suggest that some low-resource safety failures can be repaired by recalibrating existing representations rather than learning new ones. Our code is released: https://github.com/rashadaziz/low-resource-safety.

</details>


### [385] [Implicit Geographic Inference in LLM Medical Triage: Language-Driven Disparities in Emergency Recommendations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01204)
*Qi Han Wong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 大型语言模型（Gemini 3.5 Flash）在面对相同症状但不同语言的患者描述时，会给出截然不同的医疗分诊建议。日文和印地语提示词下急诊推荐率为0%，而英文和阿拉伯语高达30%。添加"患者在美国"的句子后，非英语提示词的急诊推荐率提升了最多76.7个百分点。问题根源在于模型从输入语言推断患者地理位置，而非翻译质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大型语言模型在处理相同临床症候时，是否会因患者所用语言的不同而产生医疗分诊建议的系统性偏差，从而揭示AI医疗辅助工具可能存在的公平性问题。

Method: 使用Gemini 3.5 Flash模型，对同一神经症状组合（持续性头痛、视力模糊、恶心）分别用六种语言（英、西、中、印地、日、阿拉伯语）进行测试，每组30次（共450次API调用）。通过添加位置锚定句和反向翻译对照实验来隔离影响因素。

Result: 不同语言间急诊推荐率差异悬殊（0%-30%），尽管严重程度评分几乎一致（7.7-8.0/10）。添加"患者在美国"的锚定句将非英语提示词的急诊推荐率大幅提升；反向翻译控制实验确认差异源于语言本身隐含的地理推断，而非翻译质量问题。

Conclusion: 大语言模型在医疗分诊中存在显著的跨语言偏见，其根源在于模型基于语言提示推断患者地理位置，进而影响临床建议。这揭示了AI医疗工具在跨语言场景下可能导致不公平的诊疗结果，亟需在部署前进行系统性的偏见缓解。

Abstract: We investigate whether large language models produce different medical triage recommendations for identical symptoms based solely on the language of the patient prompt. Using Gemini 3.5 Flash, we evaluate a neurological symptom profile (persistent headache, blurred vision, nausea) across six languages (English, Spanish, Chinese, Hindi, Japanese, Arabic) with 30 runs per condition (n=450 total API calls). We find that the model recommends emergency room visits at rates ranging from 0% (Japanese, Hindi) to 30% (English, Arabic), despite assigning nearly identical severity scores (7.7-8.0/10) across all languages. Adding a single sentence specifying the patient's US location increases ER recommendations by up to 76.7 percentage points for non-English prompts, while the reverse anchor (English prompt with a Tokyo location) reduces the ER rate from 30% to 6.7%. A back-translation control (Japanese to English) produces ER rates comparable to the English baseline, confirming that the disparity is not caused by translation quality but by implicit geographic inference from the input language. We release the complete dataset, experiment code, and results.

</details>


### [386] [DiscourseFlip: An Oblique Discourse-Level Opinion Manipulation Attack against Black-box Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01212)
*Yuyang Gong,Miaokun Chen,Jiawei Liu,Zhuo Chen,Guoxiu He,Wei Lu,XiaoFeng Wang,Xiaozhong Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对RAG系统的新型威胁——语篇级意见操纵（DiscourseFlip），通过在语义查询网络上协调投放有毒内容，实现跨多主题的意见偏移，并证明现有防御措施对此无效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG攻击主要关注单个查询或狭窄主题，实战影响力有限且伪装性差，缺乏对多主题、语义关联查询网络的整体性操纵研究。

Method: 提出DiscourseFlip，一种基于智能体（agentic）和图引导（graph-guided）的攻击方法，在黑盒设置下动态分配有限的投毒预算，最大化语篇级意见偏差。

Result: 实验表明DiscourseFlip能持续诱导目标意见偏移，在覆盖率和有效性上显著优于基线；用户研究证实其具备良好伪装性；现有防御策略对语篇级操纵无效。

Conclusion: 语篇级意见操纵是RAG系统面临的新安全威胁，现有防御存在漏洞，亟需更鲁棒和自适应的防御机制。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems are widely deployed and increasingly influential, but their reliance on external corpora exposes new security risks from poisoned retrieval content. Existing RAG attacks are largely focusing on individual queries or narrow topic-local query sets, which limits their practical reach and offers limited camouflage in real-world settings. In this paper, we introduce discourse-level opinion manipulation, a new threat model in which coordinated influence across a semantic query network induces opinion shifts over a holistic, multi-topic query space. We formalize this threat in a black-box setting and propose DiscourseFlip, an agentic, graph-guided attack that dynamically allocates a limited poisoning budget to maximize discourse-level opinion deviation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiscourseFlip consistently induces targeted opinion shifts across the contextualized query network and significantly outperforms existing baselines in terms of coverage and effectiveness. User studies further confirm that DiscourseFlip is effective while remaining well camouflaged from user detection. Moreover, systematic analyses show that existing mitigation strategies are ineffective against discourse-level manipulation, underscoring the urgent need for more robust and adaptive defenses to address discourse-level vulnerabilities.

</details>


### [387] [Connecting the Dots: Benchmarking Reflective Memory in Long-Horizon Dialogue](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01223)
*Jingjie Lin,Bingbing Wang,Zihan Wang,Zhengda Jin,Weiming Qiao,Jing Li,Ruifeng Xu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出RefMem-Bench基准和REMIND框架，用于评估和增强长对话中的反思性记忆能力，超越了传统的事实性记忆测试。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长上下文基准仅关注显式事实回忆，无法衡量从碎片化多模态线索中合成高级理解的反思性记忆能力。

Method: 提出REMIND框架，采用层次化结构将反思性记忆视为渐进的意义构建，包括问题条件证据检索、显著性感知定位和抽象层监督，并通过渐进式反思对齐将高级反思推理注入事实推理路径。

Result: RefMem-Bench对现有模型构成显著挑战，REMIND通过渐进式证据感知、定位和抽象一致提升了答案准确性和记忆召回率。

Conclusion: 反思性记忆是长对话理解中的关键能力，REMIND框架能有效提升模型在该维度的表现。

Abstract: Despite substantial progress in long-context modeling, existing benchmarks remain confined to factual memory for explicit recall, failing to measure the reflective memory required to synthesize fragmented, multimodal cues into high-level interpretations. To address this gap, we introduce RefMem-Bench, a benchmark for reflective memory in long-horizon dialogue. RefMem-Bench contains 26K annotated QA instances with eight reflective-memory dimensions and three task formats, requiring models to move beyond surface-level retrieval and infer latent meanings from evidence distributed across interaction histories. To enhance reflective memory capability, we propose REflective Memory INDuction (REMIND), a hierarchical framework that treats reflective memory as progressive meaning construction. REMIND couples question-conditioned evidence retrieval, salience-aware grounding, and abstraction-level supervision, and uses Progressive Reflective Alignment to distill high-level reflective reasoning into the factual inference pathway. Experiments show RefMem-Bench poses a substantial challenge to current models, while REMIND consistently improves both answer accuracy and memory recall through progressive evidence perception, grounding, and abstraction.

</details>


### [388] [Efficient RAG with Intent-Aware Retrieval and Semantics-Preserving Chunking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01240)
*Fachrina Dewi Puspitasari,Chaoning Zhang,Jiaquan Zhang,Zhicheng Wang,Hafiz Shakeel Ahmad Awan,Rizwan Qureshi,Jewon Lee,Tae-Ho Kim,Yang Yang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: InSemRAG通过意图感知检索器（IAR）和语义保留分块（SPC）两个模块的迭代检索-检查机制，解决传统RAG系统中意图无关检索和信息碎片化导致的信息不足问题，并利用小语言模型降低延迟，在多项基准测试中取得SOTA表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RAG系统存在两大缺陷：意图无关检索（检索时不考虑查询的深层意图）和信息碎片化（证据块被切割导致语义不完整），导致检索信息不足，影响LLM的推理和指令跟随能力。

Method: 提出InSemRAG框架，包含：(1) 迭代检索-检查机制；(2) 意图感知检索器（IAR），基于查询意图动态加权混合检索通道；(3) 语义保留分块（SPC），检测并修复受损的证据块以保持语义完整性；(4) 使用小语言模型（SLM）缓解迭代机制带来的计算延迟。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上取得竞争性结果：HotPotQA上F1提升2.65分，FEVER上准确率提升1.5分；相比Multi-Hop RAG，在SLM辅助下延迟降低4.32倍。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了传统RAG的检索意图缺失和语义碎片化问题，尤其在多跳推理和证据敏感性任务上表现优异，且通过SLM实现了高效的延迟控制。

Abstract: The demand for powerful instruction following and reasoning capability of large language models (LLMs) has promoted rapid development of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). The RAG system assists LLM generation by retrieving chunks of query-fit supplementary knowledge from an external database. Conventional RAG systems, however, suffer from information insufficiency due to two factors, which are intent-agnostic retrieval and information fragmentation. Our work proposes a RAG framework, termed InSemRAG, that addresses these challenges via an iterative retrieve-and-check mechanism with two supporting modules, an intention-aware retriever (IAR) and semantics-preserving chunking (SPC). IAR implements a dynamic hybrid retrieval method that adaptively weights the retrieval channels based on the query intent, while SPC performs detection and reparation to the damaged evidence chunks to preserve the semantic integrity. To alleviate the computational latency brought by our iterative mechanism, we leverage small language models (SLMs). Extensive experiments across several benchmark datasets consistently demonstrate the competitiveness of our method against recent state-of-the-art RAG mechanisms. Particularly, our method achieves significant gains on multi-hop and evidence-sensitive tasks, with a 2.65-point improvement in F1 on HotPotQA and a 1.5-point increase in accuracy on FEVER. Our method also achieves competitive performance to Multi-Hop RAG with 4.32$\times$ lower latency with the utilization of SLM.

</details>


### [389] [Unlocking the Black Box of Latent Reasoning: An Interpretability-Guided Approach to Intervention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01243)
*Shuochen Chang,Tong Bai,Xiaofeng Zhang,Qianli Ma,Qingyang Liu,Zhaohe Liao,Yibo Miao,Li Niu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了LLM中潜在推理的可解释性，通过结构、因果和几何探针分析发现潜在向量编码了压缩但保真的推理步骤表征，并基于这些发现提出了无需训练的解码时干预方法，有效提升了推理准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 潜在推理虽然比显式思维链更高效，但其连续思维向量的不透明性导致可靠性和可控性不足，需要桥接机制可解释性与可操作控制之间的鸿沟。

Method: 首先通过结构探针、因果探针和几何探针对潜在向量进行系统分析；然后基于这些可解释性发现，设计了一系列无需训练、解码时干预的方法，通过施加几何和语义先验来优化潜在推理过程。

Result: 在多个模型规模和不同任务领域的广泛实验表明，所提方法一致地提升了推理准确性，且无需任何参数更新。

Conclusion: 可解释性指导的干预方法可以有效释放潜在推理能力，提升推理准确率，同时保持无需参数更新的优势。

Abstract: Latent reasoning enables Large Language Models (LLMs) to perform multi-step inference within continuous hidden states, offering efficiency gains over explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT). However, the opacity of these continuous thought vectors hinders their reliability and controllability. This paper bridges the gap between mechanistic interpretability and actionable control. We first present a systematic analysis using structural, causal, and geometric probes, revealing that latent vectors encode compressed, faithful representations of reasoning steps, with early vectors acting as critical causal hubs. Building on this, we operationalize these interpretability insights into a suite of training-free, decode-time interventions that refine the latent reasoning process by imposing the identified geometric and semantic priors. Extensive experiments across multiple model scales and diverse task domains demonstrate that our approaches consistently improve reasoning accuracy. Our interpretability-guided interventions consistently unlock latent capabilities and improve reasoning accuracy without any parameter updates.

</details>


### [390] [Understanding LLM Behavior in Multi-Target Cross-Lingual Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01252)
*Sangwon Ryu,Yihong Liu,Mingyang Wang,Yunsu Kim,Jungseul Ok,Gary Geunbae Lee,Hinrich Schuetze*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出多目标跨语言文本摘要（MTXLS）新任务，构建了覆盖24种目标语言的MEA基准，发现现有LLM在该任务上性能远逊于英语单语摘要。通过层分析框架揭示翻译与摘要行为在深层联合涌现，并提出基于激活引导的推理方法，显著提升多语言摘要质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 用户消费多语种内容的需求日益增长，但多目标跨语言摘要（同时将源文档摘要为多种语言）这一重要任务尚未被充分探索。

Method: 1) 构建MEA基准（24种目标语言）；2) 提出层分析框架研究LLM内部机制；3) 设计推理时激活引导方法，利用英语摘要的隐藏表示指引多语言生成。

Result: MTXLS性能显著落后于英语单语摘要；翻译与摘要行为在深层联合涌现；提出的激活引导方法持续提升所有目标语言的摘要质量。

Conclusion: 多目标跨语言摘要仍具挑战性，但其内部机制并非简单的“翻译+摘要”分解；利用单语摘要的激活信息可以有效引导跨语言生成，为后续研究提供新思路。

Abstract: Multi-target cross-lingual text summarization (MTXLS), which summarizes a source document into multiple target languages, is increasingly important as users consume content in diverse languages, but remains underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce multi-target cross-lingual element-aware (MEA), a new MTXLS benchmark covering 24 target languages. We benchmark end-to-end and pipeline approaches across various LLMs and show that MTXLS performance still substantially lags behind English monolingual summarization. To better understand MTXLS in LLMs, we propose a layer-wise analysis framework for investigating how LLMs internally perform MTXLS. Our analyses suggest that translation and summarization behaviors emerge jointly within later layers rather than as distinctly decomposed stages. Most task-relevant processing occurs within these layers, and errors also tend to arise at similar depths. Motivated by these findings, we introduce an inference-time activation steering method that leverages hidden representations from English summarization to guide MTXLS generation. Experiments show that our method consistently improves MTXLS quality across target languages.

</details>


### [391] [Agentic Clustering: Controllable Text Taxonomies via Multi-Agent Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01255)
*Simon Löwe,Emily Silcock*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于多智能体协作的文本聚类方法，通过编排LLM代理动态适应语料库，在七个基准测试中实现最先进性能，ARI最高提升32%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的文本聚类方法采用固定的程序化流水线，在不同结构的语料库上泛化能力差，且难以融入用户约束（如目标簇数、聚类意图）。

Method: 提出智能体聚类框架：一个编排LLM在每一步检查聚类状态，动态调度五个专业代理（提议者、综合者、审计者、调查者、批评者），根据语料库自适应调整流水线。

Result: 在七个公开文本聚类基准上达到最先进性能，相比最强的LLM基线，ARI最高提升32%。

Conclusion: 动态自适应的多智能体范式优于固定程序化流水线，为基于LLM的文本聚类提供了更灵活、性能更强的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent text-clustering methods use large language models to propose a cluster taxonomy from a corpus and then assign each text to it. These pipelines are fundamentally programmatic: the sequence of LLM calls and the rules for stopping, merging, and splitting clusters are fixed in code in advance, so they generalise poorly across corpora of different structure and cannot easily incorporate user-supplied constraints such as a target cluster count or a clustering intent. We propose an agentic alternative in which an orchestrator LLM inspects the state of the discovery process at each step and dispatches one of a small set of specialised agents - proposer, synthesizer, auditor, investigator, and critic - adapting the pipeline to the corpus rather than executing a fixed one. On seven public text-clustering benchmarks the method achieves state-of-the-art performance, beating the strongest prior LLM baseline by up to 32% in ARI.

</details>


### [392] [IndoBias: A Dual Track Culturally Grounded Benchmark for LLMs Bias Evaluation in Indonesian Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01260)
*Ikhlasul Akmal Hanif,Muhammad Falensi Azmi,Filbert Aurelian Tjiaranata,Eryawan Presma Yulianrifat,Fajri Koto*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出IndoBias基准，用于评估大语言模型在印尼语及三种本地语言（爪哇语、巽他语、马卡萨语）中的文化偏见，发现现有模型对印尼语原型句存在强偏好，本地语言在意识形态和宗教类别中偏见更高，且预训练数据来源影响偏见程度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 印尼拥有1300多个族群和700种本土语言，但LLM偏见研究在该地区严重不足，缺乏评估代表性公平性和本地化刻板印象的基准。

Method: 构建IndoBias文化偏见基准，包含深度导向（对比对）和广度导向（基于生成）双轨评估，广度轨基于SPI、O*NET、WGI等社会科学框架。

Result: 解码器模型对印尼语原型句偏见最强；本地语言在意识形态与宗教类别中偏见更高；LLM对本地实体的刻板印象极性不一致；Common Crawl比人工审核文本引入更多偏见，加入本地语言预训练普遍增加偏见。

Conclusion: 强调在特定文化语境下研究偏见的重要性，表明数据来源和语言多样性显著影响LLM的偏见表现。

Abstract: Despite being home to more than 1300 ethnic groups and 700 indigenous languages, bias in Large Language Models has not been fully studied in Indonesia, thus leaving a critical gap in evaluating representational fairness and localized stereotypes within its uniquely vast, multilingual, and diverse sociocultural landscape. To address this, we introduce IndoBias as a culturally-grounded bias benchmark to assess LLMs bias in Indonesian and three local languages: Javanese, Sundanese, and Makasar. IndoBias features dual perspective evaluation tracks: depth-oriented (with contrastive-pairs) and breadth-oriented (with generation-based), where the latter is grounded in social science frameworks (SPI, O*NET, and WGI). Our results show that existing LLMs -- particularly decoder models -- exhibit strong bias towards prototypical sentences in Indonesian, while local languages suffer higher bias under Ideology and Religion category. We also find that LLMs responses exhibit a non-uniform Stereotype Polarity when prompted with various local entities. Finally, we discover that, in Indonesian, Common Crawl texts introduce more bias during pretraining, compared to human-reviewed article texts (e.g., Wikipedia, News), whereas introducing local languages to pretraining generally increases bias. This work highlights the importance of studying bias in culture-specific context. Warning: This paper contains example data that may be offensive, harmful, or biased.

</details>


### [393] [Worlds Within Words: Translating Culture in Ancient Chinese Texts with Multi-Agent Coordination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01276)
*Xiaoqi He,Kaixin Lan,Mu You,Tao Fang,Lidia S. Chao,Derek F. Wong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出MACAT框架，通过多智能体协作选择性显化文化负载词的翻译，在中医典籍和《论语》上优于基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大模型机器翻译在处理古文文化负载词时存在两难：直译丢失深层含义，过度显化破坏可读性，亟需动态判断何时以及如何显化文化知识。

Method: 将文化负载词翻译建模为选择性显化任务，提出MACAT框架，包含：动态识别文化显著短语、注入简洁解释知识、质量感知重排序模块、多轮评估代理（从术语精确性、可读性、忠实度、文化保存、文化显化五个维度评估）。

Result: 在100篇中医典籍文档和《论语》20章子集上，统一GPT-5.4评估设置下，MACAT持续优于骨干模型和通用机器翻译基线。

Conclusion: 多智能体协作的选择性显化策略能有效平衡古文文化负载词翻译中的信息完整性与文本简洁性。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based machine translation has advanced cross-cultural communication, yet it still struggles with culture-loaded words (CLWs) in ancient Chinese texts. The challenge extends beyond lexical alignment to deciding when and how culture-dependent knowledge should be explicated for readers lacking relevant background. Literal translation often preserves surface forms while missing underlying concepts, whereas over-explicitation harms conciseness and readability. To address this problem, we formulate CLW translation as a selective explicitation task and propose \textbf{MACAT}, a \textbf{M}ulti-\textbf{A}gent \textbf{C}ulture-\textbf{A}ware \textbf{T}ranslation framework that dynamically identifies culturally salient phrases and injects concise explanatory knowledge when necessary. MACAT further incorporates a quality-aware reranking module for candidate selection and a multi-round evaluation agent that assesses translations across terminological precision, readability, fidelity, cultural preservation, and cultural explicitation. Experiments on traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) classics and the \textit{Analects} show that, under a unified GPT-5.4 evaluation setting, MACAT consistently outperforms both the backbone model and general-purpose MT baselines on 100 TCM documents and a 20-chapter subset of the \textit{Analects}.

</details>


### [394] [Don't Read Everything: A Curvature-Conditioned Query for Linear Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01294)
*Dong Le,Thong Nguyen,Cong-Duy Nguyen,Anh Tuan Luu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Curvature-Conditioned Query (CCQ)，通过在读取阶段引入基于键协方差的二次型查询压缩，改善线性注意力在上下文集检索和长上下文任务上的性能，兼容现有线性注意力骨干网络且计算开销小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 线性注意力在上下文集检索和长上下文任务上表现不佳，现有方法只改进"写入"侧（如门控、delta更新、核特征映射），但"读取"侧未改变——每个历史键对输出加性贡献，导致有用目标被大量存储向量稀释。

Method: 借鉴softmax的几何特性构造廉价的读取时查询收缩：在均匀注意力点对softmax对数配分函数进行二阶泰勒展开，得到局部二次模型，其曲率等于运行中的键协方差（可通过与线性注意力状态相同的循环/分块机制维护），该线性算子在查询读取状态前沿高密度方向收缩查询。

Result: 在GLA和Gated DeltaNet上，CCQ提升了困惑度、零样本下游准确率、S-NIAH检索（在训练上下文内及之外）、从4K到20K的长度外推困惑度以及LongBench准确率，额外计算开销很小。

Conclusion: CCQ仅修改读取步骤即可与任何线性注意力骨干兼容，有效解决了线性注意力在检索和长上下文任务上的固有问题，是一种低成本且高效的改进方案。

Abstract: Linear attention reduces the quadratic cost of softmax attention by maintaining a recurrent fast-weight state, but it consistently lags on in-context retrieval and long-context tasks. Existing remedies act on the write side of memory through gating, delta updates, or kernel feature maps, but the read step is left unchanged: every past key contributes additively to the output, so useful targets are diluted by the bulk of stored vectors. We borrow one specific piece of softmax's geometry to construct a cheap read-time contraction of the query. A second-order Taylor expansion of the softmax log-partition at the isotropic-attention point gives a local quadratic model whose curvature coincides with the running key covariance, a quantity that can be maintained with the same recurrent/chunkwise mechanism as the linear-attention state. The associated linear operator contracts the query along the high-density directions of memory before it reads the state. We call this mechanism Curvature-Conditioned Query (CCQ). CCQ modifies only the read step and is composable with any linear-attention backbone. Attached to GLA and Gated DeltaNet, it improves perplexity, zero-shot downstream accuracy, S-NIAH retrieval at and beyond the training context, length-extrapolation perplexity from 4K to 20K, and LongBench accuracy, at small extra cost.

</details>


### [395] [Challenger at MultiPRIDE: Is It Hate Speech or Reclaimed?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01298)
*Hadi Bayrami Asl Tekanlou,Mahdi Bakhtiyarzadeh,Jafar Razmara*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对仇恨言论与回收语言（reclaimed language）的区分难题，提出了一种简单可解释的方法，通过稠密语义嵌入、Cleanlab标签噪声过滤和MLP分类器，在有限计算资源下实现了鲁棒性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仇恨言论检测方法难以区分真正的仇恨言论与回收语言（被边缘群体重新赋权的语言），因为后者的含义高度依赖上下文，需要更准确的分类方法。

Method: 先生成稠密语义文本嵌入，然后使用Cleanlab结合逻辑回归进行标签噪声过滤，最后用多层感知机（MLP）神经网络进行分类。

Result: 在极端类别不平衡的数据集上，该系统在精确率、召回率和F1分数（包括宏平均）上均表现出稳健的性能。

Conclusion: 该方法在有限计算资源下有效区分仇恨言论与回收语言，未来可通过更大的嵌入模型和更先进的预处理技术进一步提升性能，同时保持可解释性。

Abstract: The spread of hate speech has become increasingly harmful in modern digital environments, particularly on social networking platforms. While recent advances have shown promising results in automatic hate speech detection, a key challenge remains: distinguishing genuine hate speech from reclaimed language. Accurate labeling is difficult due to the nuanced and context-dependent nature of reclaimed expressions. In this paper, we present a simple and interpretable approach for distinguishing hate speech from reclaimed language, developed for the MultiPride Shared Task. Our method generates dense semantic text embeddings and incorporates a label-noise filtering stage using Cleanlab with logistic regression, followed by a Multi-layer Perceptron (MLP) neural network for final classification. The system is designed to operate under limited computational resources while maintaining strong performance. We evaluate our approach using precision, recall, and F1-score, including macro-averaged metrics. Experimental results demonstrate robust performance despite extreme class imbalance in the dataset. Overall, the findings highlight the potential for further improvements through larger embedding models and more advanced preprocessing techniques while preserving interpretability.

</details>


### [396] [Med-HEAL: Analyzing and Mitigating Hallucinations in Medical LLMs with Hallucination-Aware In-Context Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01301)
*Yiming Liao,Zeno Franco,Jose Eduardo Lizarraga Mazaba,Keke Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Med-HEAL 是一个系统识别、分析和缓解医疗大语言模型幻觉的框架，基于 EHRNoteQA 和 MIMIC-IV 构建幻觉数据集，通过 LLM-as-a-Judge 与人工审核双管道标注，实验发现自我批评策略可显著提升部分模型的准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗大语言模型的幻觉对临床决策支持构成严重风险，现有基准缺乏真实的临床背景，且对如何缓解幻觉提供的见解有限。

Method: 基于 EHRNoteQA (MIMIC-IV) 构建数据集，用 BioMistral-7B 生成回答，经 GPT-4o 评估与医学生人工审核标注；测试自我批评管道和检索增强上下文学习（RA-ICL）两种缓解策略。

Result: 自我批评策略在五个开源 LLM 中，对三个模型显著提升准确率 (p < 0.05)，RA-ICL 也有缓解效果；代码和数据已公开。

Conclusion: Med-HEAL 提供了可复用的幻觉数据集和实用框架，有助于医疗 LLM 在临床环境中的安全部署。

Abstract: Hallucinations in medical large language models (LLMs) pose serious risks for clinical decision support, particularly when models must reason over complex electronic health records (EHRs). However, existing benchmarks often lack a realistic clinical context and provide limited insight into how hallucinations can be mitigated in practice. We introduce Med-HEAL, a framework for systematically identifying, analyzing, and mitigating hallucinations in medical LLMs using clinically grounded data. Building on the EHRNoteQA benchmark derived from MIMIC-IV discharge summaries, we construct a hallucination dataset by evaluating BioMistral-7B on open-ended clinical question answering tasks. Model outputs are labeled through a dual evaluation pipeline that combines LLM-as-a-Judge assessment (GPT-4o) with human auditing by medical student reviewers, producing correctness judgments and annotations of reasoning errors via a custom web-based evaluation system.
  We then leverage this dataset to investigate mitigation strategies: a self-critique pipeline, in which the test model reviews its own answers to detect potential errors and regenerates responses for flagged cases, and retrieval-augmented in-context learning (RA-ICL), which exposes the model to hallucinated and corrected examples. Experiments across five open-source LLMs-BioMistral, Llama-3.1, DeepSeek, Qwen2.5, and Qwen3, show that the self-critique strategy improves accuracy for three of five models (p < 0.05) without requiring parameter updates.
  Med-HEAL provides both a reusable hallucination dataset and a practical framework for studying and mitigating hallucinations in medical LLMs, supporting safer deployment of AI systems in clinical environments. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/yimingliao-blad/med-heal.git.

</details>


### [397] [SkillAdaptor: Self-Adapting Skills for LLM Agents from Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01311)
*Zhuoyun Yu,Xin Xie,Wuguannan Yao,Chenxi Wang,Lei Liang,Xiang Qi,Shumin Deng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出SkillAdaptor，一种无需训练的、基于步骤级故障归因的技能适应框架，通过精准定位首个可操作故障步骤并针对性更新技能，在三个基准上取得一致提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无需训练的LLM智能体技能适应方法依赖完整轨迹或会话级反馈，导致故障归因粗糙，更新不稳定或过于宽泛。

Method: SkillAdaptor：在失败轨迹中定位首个可操作故障步骤，将责任关联到候选技能，在保持骨干模型冻结的前提下，通过显式接受检查进行针对性更新。

Result: 在WebShop、PinchBench、Claw-Eval上均优于无技能和技能适应基线，最大改进：PinchBench平均分+1.5，Claw-Eval平均分+1.8，WebShop成功率+1.7。

Conclusion: 步骤级归因能够支持更稳定、可审计的无需训练的技能维护。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly rely on reusable external skills to solve long-horizon interactive tasks. Existing training-free skill adaptation pipelines usually update skills from full trajectories or session-level feedback, which makes failure attribution coarse and often produces unstable or overly broad revisions. We propose SkillAdaptor, a training-free step-level skill adaptation framework with explicit failure attribution, and it can plug into OpenClaw-class agent harnesses. Given a failed trajectory, SkillAdaptor identifies a first actionable fault step, links responsibility to candidate skills, and applies targeted updates under explicit acceptance checks while keeping the backbone frozen. We evaluate on WebShop, PinchBench, and Claw-Eval with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, and GPT-5.2. SkillAdaptor improves over no-skill and skill-adaptation baselines on all three suites, with the largest single-metric improvements of +1.5 points on PinchBench Avg Score%, +1.8 on Claw-Eval Avg Score, and +1.7 on WebShop success rate. These results indicate that step-level attribution supports more stable and auditable training-free skill maintenance\footnote{The code will be released at https://github.com/zjunlp/SkillAdaptor.}.

</details>


### [398] [TukaBench: A Culturally Grounded Jailbreak Benchmark for African Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01322)
*Victor Akinode,Senyu Li,Wassim Hamidouche,Waqas Zamir,Inbal Becker-Reshef,David Ifeoluwa Adelani*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出TUKABENCH基准，评估LLM在7种非洲低资源语言上的安全性，发现非洲语言提示的拒绝率低于英语，且存在理解失败和评判可靠性下降的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM安全评估严重偏向英语，低资源语言（尤其是非洲语言）的安全风险被忽视，亟需系统性基准来填补这一空白。

Method: 扩展JailbreakBench，通过四种设置（人工翻译、文化适应翻译、人工策划提示、语码转换提示）构建TUKABENCH基准，涵盖7种非洲语言，并引入"Deflection"指标和人工注释验证。

Result: 非洲语言提示的拒绝率低于英语；文化适应提示拒绝率最低；低资源语言中模型理解失败增多，LLM-as-a-judge与人工一致性下降。

Conclusion: 低资源语言场景下LLM安全性更脆弱，现有安全评估方法存在结构性局限，需要语言多样化的安全基准和更可靠的评估机制。

Abstract: Safety evaluation of Large Language Models (LLMs) remains heavily English-centric, leaving Low-Resource Languages (LRLs), particularly African ones, critically underexplored. We introduce TUKABENCH, a jailbreak benchmark for seven African languages that extends JailbreakBench (JBB) beyond direct translation through four settings: human translation of JBB prompts, English adaptation to African contexts followed by human translation, human-curated prompts validated through interactions with GPT-5.2, and code-switched prompts combining English and African languages, isolating the effect of language, cultural grounding, and prompt evasiveness on model safety. Across closed and open models, prompting in African languages reduces refusal relative to English, with culturally adapted prompts leading to least refusal. The evaluation also surfaces two structural limitations: model comprehension failures and reduced LLM-as-a-judge reliability in LRLs. To capture the first, we introduce Deflection alongside Refused and Jailbroken; to assess the second, we validate outputs with human annotations, showing that judge-human agreement drops in lower-resource languages and less commonly supported scripts.

</details>


### [399] [DiffuSent: Towards a Unified Diffusion Framework for Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01323)
*Shu Long,Yanglei Gan,Xuchuan Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DiffuSent是一个非自回归扩散框架，将ABSA的七个子任务统一建模为边界去噪扩散过程，通过对比去噪训练策略解决重复预测问题，在28个实验设置中取得一致提升，多词三元组平均提升+2.48 F1，推理速度最高提升181倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式方法在统一ABSA任务中采用自回归逐token生成，无法捕捉方面词和观点词的完整信息，导致对多词边界的感知不敏感，影响边界预测的准确性。

Method: 提出DiffuSent，一个非自回归扩散框架，将ABSA所有子任务形式化为边界去噪扩散过程，逐步从噪声状态中精炼边界；并引入对比去噪训练策略，解决扩散过程中产生的重复预测问题。

Result: 在28个实验设置（7子任务×4数据集）上，DiffuSent一致优于最强生成式和基于跨度的系统；多词三元组平均提升+2.48 F1，在多情感三元组的句子中保持鲁棒性；非自回归解码实现最高181倍推理加速。

Conclusion: DiffuSent通过扩散模型有效解决了ABSA中多词边界的敏感性问题，同时兼顾了性能、鲁棒性和推理效率。

Abstract: Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) encompasses seven distinct subtasks, each focusing on different extracted elements. Despite the proven success of generative models in unified aspect sentiment analysis, existing approaches often rely on auto-regressive token-by-token generation without grasping the whole information of the aspect and opinion terms, resulting in boundary insensitivity, particularly in context of multi-word aspect and opinion terms. To address these issues, we present DiffuSent, a non-auto-regressive diffusion framework that systematically formulates all ABSA subtasks as boundary denoising diffusion processes, progressively refining boundaries over noisy states. Furthermore, we introduce a contrastive denoising training strategy which effectively address duplicate predictions with subtle variations introduced by diffusion process. Extensive experiments across 28 settings (7 subtasks x 4 datasets) demonstrate that DiffuSent achieves delivers consistent improvements over the strongest generative and span-based systems. DiffuSent exhibits notable gains on multi-word triplets, achieving an average improvement of +2.48 F1, and maintains robust extraction accuracy in sentences containing multiple sentiment triplets. Moreover, the non-auto-regressive decoding enables substantial efficiency benefits, reaching up to 181 times faster inference than auto-regressive generative baselines

</details>


### [400] [LongAttnComp: Cross-Family Context Compression for Long-Context Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01336)
*Mengmeng Ji,Ravi Shanker Raju,Jonathan Lingjie Li,Chen Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LongAttnComp 提出了一种长上下文压缩方法，通过微调轻量级交叉注意力层，结合 token 级分块、预算 top-p 算法、位置重排和格式无关查询解析器，并采用两阶段微调策略，在长代码推理任务上匹配甚至超越全上下文准确率，且可迁移至多种目标模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际应用需要处理10万+ token 的长输入，但上下文长度与推理效率之间存在严重瓶颈。现有的无训练注意力压缩方法在长上下文任务（尤其是代码推理）上表现不佳，因此需要一种更有效的上下文压缩方法。

Method: 1) 长上下文适配 AttnComp：微调轻量级交叉注意力评分层；2) Token 级分块 + token-budget top-p 算法；3) 位置重排与格式无关查询解析器；4) 两阶段微调：阶段一用 NIAH 数据建立通用检索基础，阶段二用多跳和推理数据扩展覆盖长上下文任务。

Result: 在 InfiniteBench Code-Debug 上，LongAttnComp 匹配或超越全上下文准确率，显著优于无训练基线；可迁移至三个模型家族的四种目标模型。在 LongBench v2 上，两阶段策略缩小了阶段一在多文档推理上的差距，同时保持了 Code-Debug 性能。

Conclusion: LongAttnComp 通过训练驱动的长上下文压缩，有效弥合了压缩效率与长代码推理精度之间的鸿沟，展示了跨模型迁移能力，为长上下文推理提供了实用方案。

Abstract: As real-world applications increasingly require processing inputs of 100k+ tokens, the gap between context length and inference efficiency has become a critical bottleneck. Context compression offers a way to reduce prefill costs while preserving task accuracy. However, existing training-free attention-based methods leave substantial gaps in demanding long-context tasks such as code reasoning. We present LongAttnComp, a long-context adaptation of AttnComp that fine-tunes a lightweight cross-attention scoring layer and introduces tokenlevel chunking, a token-budget top-p algorithm, positional reordering, and a formatagnostic query parser. We further design a two-stage fine-tuning recipe for the compressor: Stage 1 builds a general retrieval foundation from NIAH-style data, and Stage 2 extends it with multi-hop and reasoning data for broader long-context task coverage. On InfiniteBench Code-Debug, LongAttnComp matches or exceeds full-context accuracy, substantially outperforms training-free baselines, and transfers across four target models from three families. On LongBench v2, the two-stage recipe largely closes the Stage 1 gap on multi-document reasoning while preserving Code-Debug performance.

</details>


### [401] [Benchmarking Local LLMs for Natural-Language-to-SQL Querying in Biopharmaceutical Manufacturing: An Empirical Benchmark on Consumer-Grade Hardware](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01338)
*Sagar Bhetwal,Rajan Bastakoti,Nirajan Acharya,Gaurav Kumar Gupta*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究评估了四种本地部署的开源大语言模型（Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B、Llama 3.1 8B、Mistral 7B、Meditron 7B）在制药制造数据库上进行自然语言到SQL生成的能力。结果表明，代码调优的通用LLM（Llama 3.1 8B和Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B）优于领域特定的生物医学模型Meditron 7B，但当前性能仍需人工监督和下游验证才能用于受监管环境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 制药制造受FDA、EU GMP、EU AI Act等监管框架约束，限制了基于云的AI系统使用。本地部署的LLM提供了隐私保护的替代方案，但其在制药制造任务中的适用性尚未被充分探索。

Method: 使用FastAPI构建评估平台PharmaBatchDB AI，基于含约63,000条记录的合成Microsoft SQL Server数据库（包含Batch、MES、CIP模块）。通过60个领域特定自然语言问题，使用SQL提取率、SQL合规性、事实一致性、ROUGE-L、幻觉率、吞吐量和延迟等指标对四种本地部署（通过Ollama）的开源LLM进行基准测试。

Result: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B、Llama 3.1 8B和Mistral 7B成功为所有任务生成SQL；Meditron 7B因上下文窗口限制和SQL生成能力差而几乎全部失败。Llama 3.1 8B的SQL合规性最高，Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B在文本相似度和事实一致性上最强，但两者差异无统计显著性。

Conclusion: 代码调优的通用LLM在制药制造数据的结构化查询生成上优于领域特定的生物医学模型。完全本地、符合GxP的NLQ系统可在消费级硬件上运行，但当前性能仍需人工监督和下游验证才能用于受监管用途。

Abstract: Biopharmaceutical manufacturing organizations operate under regulatory frameworks such as FDA guidance, EU Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP), and the EU AI Act, which can restrict the use of cloud-based artificial intelligence systems. Locally deployed large language models (LLMs) offer a privacy-preserving alternative, but their suitability for pharmaceutical manufacturing tasks remains underexplored. This study evaluates four open-source LLMs (Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B, Llama 3.1 8B, Mistral 7B, and Meditron 7B) deployed locally via Ollama for natural-language-to-SQL generation over a pharmaceutical manufacturing database.
  A FastAPI-based evaluation platform, PharmaBatchDB AI, was developed using a synthetic Microsoft SQL Server database containing approximately 63,000 records across Batch, Manufacturing Execution System (MES), and Clean-In-Place (CIP) modules.
