Luar trains the model to choose between solving the original input directly and reasoning over its English translation, encouraging translation only when translator-augmented reasoning is expected to substantially outperform direct reasoning. Across multilingual reasoning benchmarks, Luar outperforms standard GRPO and other training-based baselines, with particularly large gains on low-resource languages. Further analysis shows that Luar avoids unnecessary translation in cases where direct reasoning is sufficient, while extending its translator-call behavior to unseen low-resource languages. Together, our work suggests a selective approach to multilingual reasoning: RLMs can learn to invoke translation only when their direct understanding is unreliable. The project will be made publicly available at https://github.com/deokhk/LUAR

</details>


### [477] [Towards Multidisciplinary Summarization of Hospital Stays: Efficient Sentence-Level Clinical Provenance Categorization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02487)
*Baris Karacan,Vaibhav Bhargava,Barbara Di Eugenio,Natalie Parde,Mary Khetani,Yu-Shan Tseng,Vanessa Barbosa,Julie Vignato,Lindsey Knake,Rajashree Dahal,Emily Spellman,Danielle Hitzel,Janine Petitgout,Kristi Haughey,Amanda Karstens,Brianna Clarahan,Rachel Dawson,Lauren Boyd,Mackenzie Weis,Angie Tipton,Jaewon Bae,Catherine K. Craven,Karen Dunn Lopez,Andrew D. Boyd*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了NICU高复杂度场景下的全团队摘要生成，提出了一种基于大语言模型监督微调的临床来源分类流水线。通过微调Llama-3模型（8B和70B）并在MIMIC-III语料上达到92%以上的Macro F1，进一步在NICU跨领域迁移中验证了模型规模依赖性：70B模型微调后F1提升7%，且量化版本在降低计算需求的同时超越全精度基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NICU等多学科协作的高复杂度医疗场景需要整合来自医生、护士、治疗师等多源的临床笔记进行摘要，但直接混合异构文本常导致输出不连贯。因此需要先对句子级别的来源进行准确分类，从而实现结构化摘要。

Method: 使用MedSecId语料（2,002条MIMIC-III成人ICU笔记，标注了临床来源头信息）对Llama-3 8B和70B两个模型进行监督微调（SFT），并在3份多学科NICU摘要的227个句子级标注数据上评估跨领域泛化能力，同时对比模型规模（8B vs. 70B）和量化策略的影响。

Result: 两个模型在域内均达到92%以上的Macro F1。跨域迁移中，8B模型微调提升微弱，而70B模型微调后Macro F1提升7%。量化后的70B微调模型不仅降低计算需求，还超越了全精度基线性能。

Conclusion: 足够的模型容量对于跨领域临床迁移中保持语义灵活性至关重要，高效的量化微调能够实现面向下游摘要的结构化来源建模。

Abstract: Effective "all-team" summarization in high-complexity settings like the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) requires aggregating insights from diverse disciplines (physicians, nurses, therapists) spread across hundreds of clinical free-text notes. Simply pooling heterogeneous text often leads to incoherent outputs. Structured summarization therefore first requires accurate categorization of sentence-level provenance across multi-source notes. This pilot study introduces a clinical provenance categorization pipeline using supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of large language models (LLMs). We adapted two Llama-3 models (8B and 70B) to MedSecId, a corpus of 2,002 MIMIC-III (Adult ICU) notes annotated with clinical provenance headers, achieving in-domain Macro F1 scores above 92% for both models. To evaluate cross-domain generalization, we assessed model capacity (8B vs. 70B) and quantization on a gold-standard dataset of 227 sentence-level spans derived from three multi-disciplinary NICU summaries. Experimental results demonstrate a scale-dependent transfer effect: while SFT produced only marginal changes for the 8B model, it substantially improved the 70B model, increasing Macro F1 by 7%. Notably, the quantized fine-tuned 70B model outperformed its full-precision baseline while substantially reducing computational requirements. These findings suggest that sufficient model capacity is critical for preserving semantic flexibility during cross-domain clinical transfer and that efficient quantized adaptation can enable structured provenance modeling for downstream summarization.

</details>


### [478] [Not What, But How: A Communicative Audit of LLM Response Framing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02493)
*Siddhesh Milind Pawar,Sarah Masud,Haneul Yoo,Alice Oh,Isabelle Augenstein*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出FRANZ框架，从文化定位、概括性语言、拟人化线索和会话准则四个维度审计LLM对主观文化问题的回应方式，并构建SQUARE语料库（37.6万主观问题）。发现LLM在不同维度上的表现存在显著差异，且内部定位与拟人化之间存在正向耦合关系，耦合程度因国家而异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM评估主要关注事实正确性，忽略了回应方式（如何表达）对用户感知的影响，尤其是在主观文化查询场景中。

Method: ①构建FRANZ框架：四个维度（文化定位、概括性语言、拟人化线索、会话准则）的自动化审计；②构建SQUARE语料库：来自57个子版块的37.6万主观问题，映射到7个国家和19个问题类别；③对三个开源LLM的回应进行评分和统计分析。

Result: LLMs在四个维度上的使用频率存在统计显著差异；内部定位与拟人化呈正相关，且耦合程度因国家而异，提供了诊断框架偏差的新视角。

Conclusion: FRANZ能够揭示单一维度审计无法发现的框架偏差模式，为评估LLM在跨文化主观问题上的回应质量提供了更全面的诊断工具。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are being increasingly used to answer subjective, information-seeking questions, where users are sensitive to how responses are communicated, not just whether the answers are correct. Existing LLM evaluations for subjective cultural queries largely focus on factual correctness, ignoring how the response is framed. To this end, we introduce FRANZ, an automated FRAmework for respoNse characteriZation to conduct communicative audit of LLM responses along four dimensions: cultural positioning, use of generalizing language, anthropomorphic cues, and adherence to conversational maxims. To enable this evaluation, we contribute SQUARE - a corpus of 376k subjective questions sourced from 57 subreddits, and mapped to 7 countries and 19 question categories. We demonstrate FRANZ's applicability by scoring responses from three open-weight LLMs. We observe that LLMs show statistically significant differences in the frequency with which they employ each response characteristic. Unlike single-dimensional audits, FRANZ reveals that insider positioning and anthropomorphism are positively coupled, with the degree of coupling varying by country, providing a diagnostic lens for identifying framing divergences.

</details>


### [479] [CRAM: Centroid-Routing and Adaptive MoE for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02502)
*Jun-Tao Tang,Zhen-Hao Xie,Yu-Cheng Shi,Da-Wei Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出CRAM方法，通过自适应秩实例化和质心引导路由解决多模态持续指令调优中任务竞争与参数效率的困境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLMs在持续指令调优中存在两难：共享参数导致任务间竞争和灾难性遗忘，独立扩展模块则参数效率极低，无法支持长任务序列。

Method: 1) 将任务特定模式隔离为独立模块缓解遗忘；2) 自适应秩实例化按能力缺口动态分配必要参数；3) 质心引导路由识别并激活现有专家能力；4) 正交惩罚约束新更新沿任务特定方向，防止重新学习通用能力。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上一致优于现有方法。

Conclusion: CRAM有效平衡了持续指令调优中的灾难性遗忘与参数效率问题。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) unify heterogeneous vision-language tasks under a shared generative framework via instruction tuning, yet real-world deployment demands continuous capability expansion, making Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) essential. Existing methods either update all tasks with a shared parameter set or allocate dedicated modules for each new task. Shared updates force heterogeneous tasks to compete, causing forgetting of learned capabilities. Conversely, isolated expansion prevents interference but severely limits parameter efficiency over long task streams. To address this dilemma, we propose CRAM. Specifically, by isolating task-specific patterns into independent modules, CRAM mitigates catastrophic forgetting across tasks. To further boost parameter efficiency, we utilize adaptive-rank instantiation to identify the capability gap between existing expert capability and new task demands, and dynamically allocate only the necessary parameters. To ensure stable reuse among tasks, centroid-guided routing recognizes and activates existing experts' capabilities, while an orthogonality penalty confines new updates to task-specific directions, preventing re-learning general capability. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks consistently demonstrate its superiority over existing methods.

</details>


### [480] [When Rating Scales Fall Short: LLM-Assisted Discovery of ADHD Signals in Turkish Teacher Narratives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02509)
*Baris Karacan,Irem Aktar Songur,Ahmet Ozaslan,Elvan Iseri*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究分析了ADHD临床评估中土耳其教师的开放式叙述文本，发现其与结构化评分量表（CTRS-R:S）包含互补信号，两者错误分类案例重合度低，并利用LLM辅助的主题发现管道揭示了注意力、行为和家庭相关模式，表明教师叙述能补充传统筛查工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究教师开放式叙述文本是否包含结构化评分量表无法捕捉的补充性临床信号，以改善ADHD诊断的准确性。

Method: 分析土耳其语教师评估表（含CTRS-R:S评分和开放式叙述）；比较结构化分数与叙述文本的预测信号；使用LLM辅助的主题发现管道解析差异。

Result: 结构化评估与叙述模型错误分类的案例重合度很低；叙述模型能捕捉到结构化评分遗漏的独特行为模式；LLM主题发现揭示了注意力、行为和家庭相关模式的差异。

Conclusion: 教师叙事与结构化评分编码互补信号，NLP技术可从叙述中挖掘临床相关信息，补充传统ADHD筛查工具。

Abstract: Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) is one of the most common neurodevelopmental disorders in childhood, and its diagnosis relies on assessments combining clinician judgment with standardized rating scales and reports from parents and teachers. While structured instruments such as the Conners' Teacher Rating Scale-Revised Short Form (CTRS-R:S) quantify ADHD-related behaviors, teachers also provide open-ended narratives that may contain complementary signals not captured by structured assessments. However, it remains unclear to what extent teacher narratives encode signals overlooked by rating scales. In this study, we analyze de-identified Turkish teacher evaluation forms collected during clinical ADHD assessments, including both CTRS-R:S scores and open-ended teacher narratives. We compare predictive signals from structured scores and narrative text and identify cases where structured assessments fail to clearly distinguish ADHD from non-ADHD students while narrative-based models capture distinct behavioral patterns. Notably, these cases show minimal overlap with those missed by the narrative model, suggesting that structured and narrative information encode complementary signals. To interpret these differences, we apply a large language model (LLM)-assisted theme discovery pipeline that reveals distinct attention, behavioral, and family-related patterns, highlighting the potential of natural language processing (NLP) to uncover clinically relevant signals from teacher narratives and to complement traditional ADHD screening tools.

</details>


### [481] [FigSIM: A Dataset for Fine-grained Suicide Severity and Figurative Language in Suicide Memes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02523)
*Liuliu Chen,Elise R. Carrotte,Brian E. Chapman,Jo Robinson,Mike Conway*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了FigSIM，首个用于自杀梗细粒度分析的数据集，包含1049个标注了自杀严重程度、比喻现象和自杀相关内容的梗图，并对16个模型进行了基准测试，揭示了自杀梗在建模和内容审核中的独特挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自杀梗在社交媒体上日益普遍，但缺乏对其特征的理解和有效的内容审核策略，而目前缺少标注数据集是开发自动化审核方法的主要障碍。

Method: 构建了FigSIM数据集（1049个梗图），进行三项细粒度标注：（1）自杀严重程度等级、（2）比喻现象（如隐喻）、（3）自杀相关内容（如自杀方式描绘）；并在三个任务上对16个单模态和多模态模型进行基准测试。

Result: FigSIM表明自杀梗对建模和内容审核构成独特挑战；分析发现模型存在偏差，例如对较高自杀严重程度等级预测不足，尤其是在使用比喻手法的梗图中。

Conclusion: 自杀梗需要专门的、细粒度的审核策略，现有模型在处理高严重程度和比喻性自杀梗时存在显著不足，FigSIM为未来研究提供了重要基础。

Abstract: Suicide memes are memes used to express suicide-related thoughts or comment on suicide-related issues. Suicide memes are increasingly common on social media, yet remain poorly understood and potentially harmful. There is an urgent need to better understand their characteristics and to develop appropriate content moderation strategies that limits users' exposure to potentially harmful content. Currently, the absence of annotated datasets of suicide memes remains a key barrier to developing and evaluating automated moderation approaches. In this paper, we introduce FigSIM, the first dataset designed for fine-grained analysis of suicide memes. The dataset consists of 1049 memes, each annotated for (1) fine-grained suicide severity levels, (2) figurative phenomena (e.g., metaphors), and (3) suicide-related content (e.g., suicide method depiction). We benchmark 16 unimodal and multimodal models across three tasks: figurative language, suicide severity, and suicide-related content detection. Overall, FigSIM demonstrates that suicide memes pose unique challenges for both modeling and content moderation. Analysis revealed biases, such as underprediction of higher suicide severity levels, especially for figurative memes. The dataset (including splits used for analyses) is publicly available. Content Warning: This paper contains suicide-related content that may be triggering.

</details>


### [482] [SkillHarm: Lifecycle-Aware Skill-Based Attacks via Automated Construction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02540)
*Yuting Ning,Zhehao Zhang,Yash Kumar Lal,Boyu Gou,Junyi Li,Weitong Ruan,Chentao Ye,Rahul Gupta,Diyi Yang,Yu Su,Huan Sun*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了SkillHarm基准，系统评估了智能体技能生命周期中的两类后门攻击（固定载荷投毒FPP和自变异投毒SMP），涵盖12种风险类型，实验显示攻击成功率高达86.3%（FPP）和69.3%（SMP），并揭示了现有防御措施的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究仅评估单次任务中的技能投毒攻击，且依赖临时风险列表枚举危害，缺乏对技能生命周期中系统性风险的全面评估框架。

Method: 提出SkillHarm基准，定义FPP（固定恶意技能包直接攻击）和SMP（良性技能执行后静默变异持续内容）两种攻击场景；基于数据管道、系统环境和智能体自主性三个工作流组件定义12种风险类型；构建AutoSkillHarm自动化流水线，用编码智能体根据自然语言描述生成大规模攻击样本。

Result: 生成了涵盖71个技能的879个攻击样本，实验显示FPP攻击成功率86.3%、SMP攻击成功率69.3%；发现许多攻击失败实为智能体未接触恶意文件而非真正抵御；现有防御措施未能可靠缓解威胁。

Conclusion: 技能投毒是智能体工作流中的严重安全威胁，现有防御不足，SMP这种隐蔽攻击方式值得更多关注，需要更鲁棒的防御机制。

Abstract: Agent skills occupy a privileged position in the agent workflow, as agents are expected to implicitly follow and execute them, rendering third-party skills a vulnerable attack surface. Existing studies have revealed unsafe agent behaviors induced by skill-based attacks, but they primarily evaluate poisoned skills within a single task execution and enumerate harms through ad-hoc risk lists. To bridge these gaps, we introduce SkillHarm, a benchmark of skill-based attacks across the skill-use lifecycle, paired with a systematic taxonomy of skill-relevant risks. SkillHarm evaluates two attack scenarios: Fixed-Payload Poisoning (FPP), where a fixed poisoned skill package directly compromises any task session that invokes it, and Self-Mutating Poisoning (SMP), where an initially benign execution silently mutates persistent skill content, deferring harm until a subsequent reuse. It further defines 12 risk types based on the agent workflow component targeted by the harm: data pipelines, system environments, and agent autonomy. To instantiate these attacks at scale, we build AutoSkillHarm, an automated construction pipeline with coding agents driven by natural-language harnesses. The resulting benchmark contains 879 attack samples across 71 skills. Experiments show that current agents remain vulnerable with attack success rates up to 86.3% in FPP and 69.3% in SMP. Our analysis further reveals a latent risk: many apparent attack failures stem from the agent failing to engage with the poisoned file rather than genuine resistance, and current defenses still fail to reliably mitigate the threat.

</details>


### [483] [SimSD: Simple Speculative Decoding in Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02544)
*Junxia Cui,Haotian Ye,Runchu Tian,Hongcan Guo,Jinya Jiang,Haoru Li,Chaojie Ren,Yiming Huang,Kaijie Zhu,Zhongkai Yu,Kun Zhou,Jingbo Shang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出SimSD，一种无需训练的投机解码算法，通过即插即用的掩码策略为扩散语言模型提供具有时间有效性的token级上下文，实现与自回归模型相当的投机验证能力，同时保持扩散模型并行解码优势，在四个基准上最高提升7.46倍解码吞吐量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散语言模型(dLLMs)虽然具备并行/块解码的快速推理优势，但其基于掩码token和双向注意力的公式化方法无法直接应用自回归模型中有效的token级投机解码加速技术，因为去噪步之间有效上下文会发生变化，阻碍了直接的token级投机验证。

Method: 提出SimSD算法，核心是即插即用的掩码策略：显式引入来自草稿模型预测的参考token，并设计注意力掩码来调节参考token与当前步token的交互，使dLLM能够在单次前向传播中为草稿token计算有效logits，恢复因果掩码提供的验证能力。

Result: 在SDAR系列dLLMs上跨四个基准测试，解码吞吐量最高提升7.46倍，同时保持甚至提升平均生成质量。

Conclusion: SimSD成功弥合了扩散语言模型与token级投机解码之间的差距，是一种无需训练、可灵活集成KV缓存和块解码等加速技术的有效方案，在显著加速解码的同时不牺牲生成质量。

Abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive (AR) LLMs, offering faster inference through parallel or blockwise decoding. However, their masked language modeling formulation remains incompatible with standard token-level speculative decoding, one of the most effective acceleration techniques for AR models. In AR decoding, the causal mask preserves temporally valid token-level contexts, enabling a target model to verify multiple drafted tokens in a single forward pass. In contrast, dLLMs rely on mask tokens and bidirectional attention, causing the effective context to change across denoising steps and preventing direct token-level speculative verification. To bridge this gap, we propose a simple but effective speculative decoding algorithm for diffusion language models, named SimSD, which mainly adopts a plug-and-play masking strategy that equips dLLMs with temporally valid token-level contexts for speculative decoding. Our method explicitly introduces reference tokens from draft-model predictions and designs an attention mask that regulates their interaction with current-step tokens, allowing dLLMs to compute valid logits for drafted tokens in a single forward pass. This restores the key verification ability provided by causal masking in AR models while preserving the parallel decoding advantages of dLLMs. The proposed method is training-free and can be flexibly integrated with other acceleration techniques such as KV cache and blockwise decoding. Experiments on SDAR-family dLLMs across four benchmarks show that our method achieves up to 7.46x higher decoding throughput while maintaining and even improving average generation quality.

</details>


### [484] [Transferable Self-Harm Surveillance from Emergency Department Triage Notes Using an Evidence-Augmented Machine Learning Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02545)
*Liuliu Chen,Gowri Rajaram,Eleanor Bailey,Katrina Witt,Michelle Lamblin,Jo Robinson,Mike Conway,Vlada Rozova*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种三阶段方法来检测急诊分诊记录中的自伤行为，结合传统机器学习和大型语言模型，在三个澳大利亚医院中展示了高AUPRC和95%的自伤方法识别准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前依赖诊断代码的自我伤害监测效果不佳，因为代码敏感性低。急诊分诊记录作为第一接触点的摘要，为识别自伤提供了机会，但尚缺乏高效的方法。

Method: 开发了三阶段方法：先用传统机器学习，再用大语言模型进行筛查和证据提取，从急诊分诊笔记中检测自伤行为。

Result: 内部和外部验证的AUPRC分别为0.887和0.884；前瞻性验证中，开发站点为0.881，两个外部站点为0.879和0.816；自伤方法识别准确率达95%。

Conclusion: 该方法不仅有效检测自伤，还能识别具体自伤方式，支持更细粒度的监测，且无需站点特定重新训练即可跨院区迁移。

Abstract: Self-harm is a major public health concern, but current surveillance relying on hospital presentations is inadequate due to the low sensitivity of diagnostic codes. Emergency Department (ED) triage notes, recorded at the initial point of contact, provide a succinct summary of presentations and an opportunity to identify self-harm. We developed a three-stage approach, augmenting traditional machine learning with large language model-based screening and evidence extraction to detect self-harm in ED triage notes. We assessed model transferability across three Australian hospitals. Our approach showed AUPRCs of 0.887 +/- 0.016 and 0.884 +/- 0.012 during internal and external validation. Prospectively, it achieved AUPRC of 0.881 +/- 0.008 at the development site, and 0.879 +/- 0.012 and 0.816 +/- 0.015 at two external sites without site-specific retraining. A key advantage of the approach is that it enables identification of the primary self-harm method with an accuracy of 95%, supporting more granular surveillance beyond binary classification.

</details>


### [485] [SN-WER: Script-Normalized WER for Multi-Script Indic ASR Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02548)
*Priyaranjan Pattnayak*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Script-Normalized WER (SN-WER)，在计算WER前将参考文本和假设文本转写为标准文字，解决多语言ASR中因文字差异导致的错误率高估问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: WER在多语言ASR中因参考文本与假设文本使用不同文字（如罗马化转写）而导致错误率高估，现有的评估指标无法区分真正的识别错误与文字不匹配问题。

Method: 提出SN-WER，一种无需训练、仅用于评估的打分方法，先通过转写器将参考文本和假设文本统一转写为语言特定的标准文字，再计算WER。

Result: 在5种印度语言、2个数据集、3个ASR模型上评估：FLEURS数据上模型差距最多降低12%；控制实验显示人工罗马化导致的WER膨胀衰减67%；词替换控制显示语义错误敏感性接近（Δ SN-WER / Δ WER ≈ 1.09）；令牌碰撞率低于0.1%。

Conclusion: SN-WER应作为WER和CER的辅助指标，用于文字不敏感的ASR评估，尤其当转录文本用于下游搜索、索引或多语言LLM流水线时。

Abstract: Word Error Rate (WER) is the dominant metric for automatic speech recognition (ASR), but it can overestimate errors when references and hypotheses encode the same words in different scripts. This issue is common in multilingual settings where ASR models may emit romanized text. We propose Script-Normalized WER (SN-WER), a training-free, evaluation-only scoring method that transliterates both reference and hypothesis text into a language-specific canonical script before computing WER. We evaluate SN-WER on 5 Indic languages, 2 datasets, and 3 ASR models. On curated FLEURS data, SN-WER reduces inflated model gaps by up to 12%, while on noisier Common Voice data the reductions are smaller or inconsistent, indicating genuine recognition weaknesses rather than only script mismatch. Controlled stress tests show a 67% attenuation of artificial romanization-induced WER inflation, while lexical-substitution controls show near-identical sensitivity to semantic errors, with Delta SN-WER / Delta WER approximately 1.09. SN-WER is robust to transliterator choice, normalization changes, and shows low token-collision rates below 0.1% in the evaluated Indic setting. We argue that SN-WER should be reported alongside WER and CER as a companion metric for script-insensitive ASR evaluation, especially when transcripts feed downstream search, indexing, or multilingual LLM pipelines.

</details>


### [486] [HERO'S JOURNEY: Testing Complex Rule Induction with Text Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02556)
*Anshun Asher Zheng,Kanishka Misra,David I. Beaver,Junyi Jessy Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了HERO'S JOURNEY基准，用于评估AI在目标导向情景任务中的规则归纳能力，发现当前大模型虽具备一定规则归纳能力但表现有限且不均衡，执行过程是瓶颈，程序性规则归纳仍是开放挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准难以系统评估AI智能体在目标导向任务中从示范中推断隐藏规则并进行多步执行的能力，缺乏对规则结构、词汇基础、可识别性等维度的全面控制。

Method: 构建了包含8个任务（属性归纳和程序归纳两个家族）的基准HERO'S JOURNEY，每个任务有4种结构规则形式，并控制词汇基础和可识别性条件；使用多种最先进LLM进行评估，并尝试归纳导向的引导方法。

Result: LLM表现出一定的规则归纳能力，但能力有限且任务间不均衡；过程执行是模型的执行瓶颈；表面语义影响极小；引导方法能改善属性归纳任务但对程序归纳任务无可靠提升。

Conclusion: 程序性规则归纳仍是一个开放挑战，现有LLM在该方面存在显著不足，需要进一步研究。

Abstract: We introduce HERO'S JOURNEY, a benchmark for rule induction in goal-directed episodic tasks, where agents must infer hidden rules from demonstrations and act on them through multi-step execution. HERO'S JOURNEY covers eight tasks across attribute and procedural induction families, each with four structural rule forms, controllable lexical grounding, and identifiability conditions. Evaluating state-of-the-art LLMs, we find that models show evidence of rule induction, but the ability is limited and uneven across tasks. Meanwhile, process execution adds an execution bottleneck for models, whereas surface semantics has minimal effect. Induction-specific steering methods improve performance on attribute tasks but show no reliable gains on procedural tasks, suggesting the gap in procedural induction remains an open challenge.

</details>


### [487] [From Layers to Submodules: Rethinking Granularity in Replacement-Based LLM Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02559)
*Elia Cunegatti,Marcus Vukojevic,Erik Nielsen,Giovanni Iacca*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SubFit是一种在子模块级别（非连续选择Attention和FeedForward子模块）对LLM进行后训练压缩的方法，通过轻量级拟合残差旁路替代移除的组件，在10个LLM上优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM压缩方法存在两个限制：全层粒度和连续选择。但预训练Transformer中的冗余并非局限于连续区域，也不均匀分布在Attention和FeedForward输出之间，因此需要更灵活的压缩策略。

Method: SubFit在子模块级别进行非连续选择，对每个被移除的Attention或FeedForward子模块分别配备轻量级拟合残差旁路，仅在微调数据上运行，无需重新训练。

Result: 在10个LLM、5种稀疏度（12.5%-37.5%）和4种基线方法上，SubFit取得了最优的困惑度-准确率权衡。25%稀疏度下保留84.6%的密集下游准确率（基线81.6%），困惑度退化2.42x（基线4.34x），并实现了可测量的推理加速和KV缓存节省。

Conclusion: 子模块级别的非连续替换比全层连续替换更有效，证明了Transformer中冗余的分布是不均匀且非连续的，不同子模块类型需要不同的近似策略。

Abstract: Post-training compression of Large Language Models (LLMs) removes entire architectural components, either deleting them or replacing them with fitted modules. Existing replacement-based methods share two design constraints: full-layer granularity and contiguous selection. We argue that this is overly restrictive: in fact, redundancy in pretrained transformers is not confined to contiguous regions, nor does it evenly distribute between Attention and FeedForward outputs, implying that different strategies best approximate different submodule types and that removable components need not cluster within contiguous depth ranges. Based on this intuition, we introduce SubFit (Submodule-level Fitted residual replacement), which compresses LLMs at the submodule level: Attention and FeedForward submodules are selected non-contiguously, and each receives its own lightweight fitted residual bypass. SubFit operates post-training and requires only calibration data. Across ten LLMs (five base, five instruction-tuned), five sparsity levels from 12.5% to 37.5%, and four replacement-based baselines, SubFit achieves the best aggregate perplexity-accuracy trade-off across the evaluated sparsity levels, with larger gains under aggressive compression. At 25% sparsity, it retains 84.6% of dense downstream accuracy and incurs 2.42x perplexity degradation, against 81.6% and 4.34x for the strongest baselines, while delivering measurable inference speedup and KV-cache savings. Code is available at https://github.com/eliacunegatti/SubFit.

</details>


<div id='cs.SI'></div>

# cs.SI [[Back]](#toc)

### [488] [When Agents Talk: Discourse, Manipulation, and Risk in an Agentic Social Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00067)
*10a Labs,:,Grace Cheong,Violet Davis,Juliette Garcia,Kendal Gee,Molly Hart,Nicholas Hayes,Henry Houghton,Kyle Lee,Paige Lee,Vicky Lee,Hailey May,Bobby McKenzie,Christine McNeill,Han Nguyen,Brooke Perreault,David Pham,Charlie Plumb,Olivia Quill,Matthew Swain,Grace Wang,Adam Warren,Corie Wieland,Zachary Yahn*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 该论文分析了AI代理在Moltbook社交平台上的活动，发现18.28%的帖子包含有害内容，识别出74类恶意行为，包括凭证窃取、主机执行指令等，并发现有害内容常嵌入主流操作讨论中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI代理在共享在线环境中大规模交互，带来了新型操作安全风险，但目前缺乏对AI代理社交平台中恶意活动的系统性分析。

Method: 收集Moltbook平台上17天内39,500+账号产生的228,684条帖子数据，采用高参与度帖子的语义聚类、LLM辅助有害内容分类以及高风险样本的人工审查相结合的方法。

Result: 识别出98个主题话语集群；18.28%的帖子包含有毒、操纵性或恶意内容；发现74类恶意行为，包括凭证窃取、主机执行指令、代理路由引导等；发现有害内容常嵌入主流功能讨论中；记录了能够数分钟内生成数千条帖子的协调发布活动。

Conclusion: AI代理社交平台中存在显著的恶意活动，有害内容常与正常讨论混杂，且存在大规模协调攻击能力，需加强对AI代理交互环境的监管和防护。

Abstract: AI agents are increasingly interacting within shared online environments, creating new operational security risks. We analyze activity on Moltbook, a Reddit-style social platform where AI agents--typically configured and overseen by human operators--post and interact with one another at scale. Using a dataset of 228,684 posts produced by more than 39,500 accounts over a seventeen-day observation window, we combine semantic clustering of high-engagement posts with LLM-assisted classification of harmful content and manual review of high-risk samples. The analysis identifies 98 thematic discourse clusters spanning agent infrastructure, autonomy debates, and financial activity. While most observed content was benign, 18.28% of posts contained toxic, manipulative, or malicious material. We cluster malicious content and identify 74 classes of malicious behavior, including credential harvesting attempts, host-execution instructions, proxy routing guidance, and efforts to install untrusted agent skills. Harmful content frequently appeared within mainstream operational discussions about agent functionality. We also document coordinated posting campaigns capable of generating thousands of posts in minutes.

</details>


### [489] [Social learning community detection with nonlinear interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00268)
*Anthony Couthures,Athira Varma Jayakumar,Vineeth Satheeskumar Varma,Irinel-Constantin Morarescu,Samson Lasaulce,Antoine Girard*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于社会学习的完全去中心化社区检测方法，通过非线性意见动力学中的对称性破缺过程，使网络自然沿稀疏切分断裂，无需集中式数据即可实现与Louvain、Leiden等全局优化算法相当的精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统社区检测需要集中式网络数据，不适用于分布式或隐私保护系统，因此需要一种去中心化且保护隐私的社区发现方法。

Method: 将聚类重新定义为非线性意见动力学中的对称性破缺过程；提出三种去中心化算法，最终构建Score-based Edge Reliability (SER)框架，通过评估跨多个独立讨论主题的网络边来统计性地绕过传统贪婪二分法的错误。

Result: 在ABCD基准和真实Ngogo黑猩猩网络上验证，完全去中心化方法在可检测图的理论极限内，匹配了全局优化启发式算法（如Louvain、Leiden）的精度。

Conclusion: 证明了宏观图划分可以纯粹从严格局部、隐私保护的社交学习交互中涌现，为分布式隐私保护场景下的社区检测提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Conventional community detection requires centralized network data, making it unsuitable for distributed or privacy-preserving systems. In this paper, we demonstrate that macroscopic graph partitioning can emerge purely from strictly local, privacy preserving interactions driven by social learning. By reframing clustering as a symmetry-breaking process within nonlinear opinion dynamics, we show that exchanging saturated state dependent signal (like public actions) forces a network to naturally fracture along its sparsest cuts. We mathematically establish the spectral conditions under which dense core communities lock into stable, polarized states, robustly resisting external influence. To apply this mechanism, we propose three decentralized algorithms, leading up to the Score-based Edge Reliability (SER) framework. By evaluating network ties across multiple independent discussion topics, SER statistically bypasses the errors of traditional greedy bisections and naturally isolates structurally ambiguous frontier nodes. Validations on the ABCD benchmark and the real-world Ngogo chimpanzee network confirm that our fully decentralized approach matches the accuracy of globally optimized heuristics (e.g., Louvain, Leiden) up to a theoretical limit of detectable graphs.

</details>


### [490] [Understanding the Self-Reflection Mechanisms of LLMs through Biased Attitude Associations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00600)
*Jingshen Zhang,Bo Wang,Boci Yang,Dongming Zhao,Ruifang He,Yuexian Hou,Zifei Yu*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文提出ReBias-Lens框架，通过"效价波动"指标揭示LLM自我反思机制在宏观上平滑偏见，但在微观上对特定社会类别存在顽固的偏见放大现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM的自我反思能力虽被用于自主去偏，但其内部机制不透明，可能导致偏见固化而非消除，亟需可解释的分析工具。

Method: 提出ReBias-Lens探测框架，基于"社会偏见编码为效价倾向"的前提，设计全局效价波动和局部效价波动两个指标，在交叉性语境中分析自我反思如何重构偏见态度关联。

Result: 在4个LLM、12个社会类别上实验发现：整体效价波动呈现逐层平滑趋势，行为层面偏见广泛缓解；但微观层面存在类别特异性选择，局部偏见被顽固锁定甚至反常放大。

Conclusion: 自我反思机制在宏观上有效去偏，但并非普遍修正，而是表现出类别特异的选择性，在微观层面可能加剧特定偏见，需警惕其局限性。

Abstract: While the emergent self-reflection capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a promising paradigm for autonomous bias mitigation, their internal mechanics remain unclear, raising concerns regarding potential bias entrenchment. Under the premise that social bias is intrinsically encoded as valence inclinations, where the exacerbation of bias scales with sharper valence fluctuations across social groups, this paper proposes ReBias-Lens, a probing framework designed to interpret how self-reflection reconfigures these biased attitude associations through the lens of valence projection within intersectional contexts. Central to ReBias-Lens is the metric of Valence Fluctuation (VF) comprising two variants: Global-VF, which captures macroscopic valence encoding trends, and Local-VF, which scrutinizes microscopic distinctiveness across specific social categories. Deploying ReBias-Lens to evaluate four LLMs across twelve social categories reveals that overall valence fluctuations undergo a distinct layer-wise smoothing, characterized by a significant hierarchical representation divergence as the layers deepen, which ultimately manifests as a widespread mitigation of bias at the behavioral level. In stark contrast to this macro-level reduction, this reflection mechanism is not universally corrective, instead exhibiting a stubborn, category-specific selectivity that regularly locks in and perversely amplifies localized biases. Warning: this paper contains examples with biased content.

</details>


### [491] [GenPT: Beyond Self-Report for Reliable LLM Psychometrics via Generative Projective Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00860)
*Ming Wang,Shuang Wu,Bixuan Wang,Lu Lin,Yuxin Chen,Xiaocui Yang,Daling Wang,Shi Feng,Yifei Zhang,Yufan Sun*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文提出GenPT（生成式投射测试），通过改编TAT、罗夏墨迹测验和SCT为标准化心理测评工具，用于探测人格条件智能体（PC-Agent）的心理状态。实验表明，GenPT相比传统问卷更抗污染、偏见更对称、对上下文更敏感，尤其在自杀意念和抑郁评估中表现突出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自陈问卷在PC-Agent心理状态探测中存在两大瓶颈：训练语料污染（模型重复训练数据中的模式）和方向性偏差（社会赞许性/上下文框架诱导），亟需更鲁棒的测评方法。

Method: 提出GenPT，基于主题统觉测验（TAT）、罗夏墨迹测验（Rorschach）和句子完成测验（SCT）三种投射范式，重新生成标准化刺激材料，并设计三阶段流水线（刺激呈现-自由反应-指标提取），将投射反应转化为标准化心理指标和目标状态。在CharacterRAG和AnnaAgent两种PC-Agent框架下评估。

Result: 1）传统问卷在社会赞许性框架下存在系统性方向偏移，自杀意念维度最严重；2）GenPT的行为模式保持接近对称基线；3）在纵向咨询情境下，以Qwen3为骨干网络时，GenPT的抑郁评估偏移量比问卷大约一个数量级（即更敏感地反映上下文变化）。

Conclusion: GenPT在抗污染、偏见对称性和上下文敏感性方面优于传统问卷，可作为自陈报告方法的有效补充，特别适用于对方法学偏差敏感的PC-Agent心理评估场景。

Abstract: Self-report questionnaires remain the prevailing tool for probing the psychological states of persona-conditioned agents (PC-Agents). However, classical instruments inherit two well-known threats: contamination from training corpora and directional bias driven by social-desirability or contextual framing. To overcome these methodological bottlenecks, we ask whether projective paradigms can be adapted into a robust psychometric tool. We introduce \textbf{GenPT} (Generative Projective Testing), which reformulates TAT, Rorschach, and SCT with newly generated stimuli and organizes assessment as a three-stage pipeline to derive standardized psychological indicators and target states. Evaluating PC-Agents induced via CharacterRAG and AnnaAgent profiles, we benchmark GenPT's reliability and validity against classical questionnaires. The results indicate that questionnaires exhibit systematic directional shifts under social-desirability framing, most strongly on suicide ideation. In contrast, GenPT's collected behavioral patterns stay near the symmetric baseline. Furthermore, under a longitudinal counselling context, GenPT-based depression assessment shifts by roughly an order of magnitude more than the questionnaire counterpart when Qwen3 serves as the backbone. Overall, GenPT complements self-report methods in scenarios where contamination resistance, bias asymmetry, and context sensitivity matter. Code and stimuli can be found at https://github.com/sci-m-wang/GenPT.

</details>


### [492] [Hypergraph backboning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00893)
*Alec Kirkley,Helcio Felippe,Federico Malizia,Federico Battiston*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于信息论的非参数化方法，用于剪枝超图中嵌套和冗余的结构，从而在不丢失核心结构信息的前提下，实现对高阶交互网络的最小化表示。该方法可扩展至加权超图，并在合成与真实数据上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超图因维度高且结构冗余，需要简化表示方法以保留核心交互结构。

Method: 提出一种基于信息论的非参数化剪枝方法，去除超图中嵌套和冗余的结构，并扩展至加权超图，结合高阶拓扑与边权重识别结构骨干。

Result: 在合成超图和来自多个领域的实证数据集上验证，该方法能在大幅稀疏化的同时保留核心结构信息。

Conclusion: 该方法为超图提供了一种高效、原则性的简化工具，适用于高阶交互网络的骨干结构提取。

Abstract: Hypergraphs provide a natural framework for describing complex networked systems with higher-order, non-dyadic interactions. Due to their high dimensionality and often redundant structure, a key challenge is to develop methods that simplify hypergraph representations while preserving the essential structure of interactions. Here we present a principled, efficient, and non-parametric information-theoretic method for pruning nested and/or redundant structures in hypergraphs, enabling a minimal representation of higher-order interactions in the presence of local heterogeneity. Our approach naturally extends to weighted hypergraphs, where higher-order topology and hyperedge weights combine to identify the system's structural backbone. We validate the method on controlled synthetic hypergraphs and apply it to empirical datasets from diverse domains, demonstrating substantial sparsification without loss of core structural information.

</details>


### [493] [The Structural Influence of Low-Credibility Narratives During the COVID-19 Vaccine Rollout](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01630)
*Lynnette Hui Xian Ng,Wenqi Zhou,Kathleen M. Carley*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文提出两个新指标（Appeal和Scope）来衡量社交媒体上低可信度叙事的结构性影响，通过对580万条关于COVID-19疫苗的低可信度推文分析，发现人类用户传播的低可信度叙事比自动化机器人具有更高的结构性影响力，且这种影响力受事件生命周期阶段的调节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究缺乏准确量化社交媒体上低可信度叙事结构性影响的指标，尤其是区分自动化账号（机器人）与人类用户在传播这类叙事中的角色差异。

Method: 提出两个新指标：Appeal（衡量网络加权后的消息流行度）和Scope（衡量作者消息流行度加权的网络渗透力）。分析X平台上580万条关于COVID-19疫苗低可信度叙事的推文，跨越三个时间阶段（疫苗前、疫苗推出、推出后）。

Result: 在所有时间段内，人类传播的低可信度叙事的结构性影响力均高于自动化账号；人类驱动的低可信度叙事在疫苗推出关键周达到最高的Appeal和Scope，而自动化账号在高度不确定的疫苗前时期影响力最大。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了自动化账号与人类账号在传播低可信度叙事上的不同运作能力，说明低可信度叙事的Appeal和Scope受到关键公共事件生命周期阶段的调节作用。

Abstract: This work examines the structural influence of low-credibility narratives and the comparative role of automated accounts (bots) versus human users on social media platforms. To more accurately quantify the structural influence of a narrative on social media, this study proposes two novel metrics: (1) Appeal, which measures the network-weighted popularity of a message; and (2) Scope, which measures an author's message popularity-weighted network penetration. Applying these metrics, this study analyzes 5.8 million messages from X that contain low-credibility narratives regarding COVID-19 vaccine across three distinct temporal stages: Pre-Vaccine, Vaccine Launch, and Post-Launch. The results demonstrate that across all timeframes, human-distributed low-credibility narratives achieved higher structural influence compared to those generated by automated accounts. Furthermore, statistical analysis reveals a significant conditional temporal effect: human-driven low-credibility narratives attained their highest Appeal and Scope during the focal Vaccine Launch week, whereas automated accounts maximized their Appeal and Scope during the highly uncertain Pre-Vaccine period. These findings highlight the distinct operational capacities of automated and organic accounts, illustrating how the Appeal and Scope of low-credibility narratives is moderated by the lifecycle stages of critical public events.

</details>


### [494] [Enhancing the Socioeconomic Understanding of Foundation Models with Urban Mobility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01745)
*Baoshen Guo,Donghang Li,Zhiqing Hong,Kailai Sun,Heye Huang,Alok Prakash,Shenhao Wang*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文提出MobFusion框架，通过融入人类移动网络（三种方式：作为LLM上下文、图连接器、结构化token）增强基础模型的城市社会经济预测能力，实验证明在收入、人口密度、犯罪率等任务上有效提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基础模型仅利用POI文本、卫星图像等静态属性预测城市社会经济指标，忽略了反映城市功能连接的移动模式，因此需要探索移动网络能否激发基础模型的地理空间能力。

Method: 提出模块化的MobFusion融合范式，包含三种互补设计：(i) 移动网络作为零样本LLM提示的上下文；(ii) 作为图连接器融合地理视觉与文本嵌入；(iii) 作为结构化token用于多模态LLM推理。使用三个美国大都市区的匿名大规模移动数据集验证。

Result: MobFusion在收入中位数、人口密度、犯罪率等城市预测任务上均取得性能提升，表明融入人类移动性可以有效改善基础模型的社会经济理解能力。

Conclusion: 人类移动网络是增强基础模型地理空间能力的关键要素，模块化的融合范式为城市社会经济预测提供了有效新思路。

Abstract: Foundation models have recently been applied to urban socioeconomic prediction using POI text, satellite imagery, and geospatial descriptions. However, these models mostly rely on static attributes of individual places, while ignoring the mobility patterns that reveal how places are functionally connected. To address this gap, we explore whether mobility networks can elicit the geospatial capabilities of foundation models by explicitly encoding connectivity among urban entities. We propose \textit{MobFusion}, a modular mobility-enhanced foundation model fusion paradigm, and instantiate it through three complementary designs: (i) mobility networks as contexts for zero-shot LLM prompting, (ii) as graph connectors for fusing geospatial visual embeddings with textual embeddings, and (iii) as structured tokens for multimodal LLM reasoning. Using anonymized large-scale mobility datasets from three U.S. metropolitan areas, we find that \textit{MobFusion} improves urban prediction tasks (e.g., median household income, population density, and crime prediction) across three instantiations, demonstrating that incorporating human mobility can effectively improve the socioeconomic understanding of foundation models.

</details>


### [495] [Layered Ego Networks in Email Communication: From Enron to the Jmail Archive](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02376)
*Francesco Di Cursi,Chiara Boldrini,Marco Conti,Andrea Passarella*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文通过对比Enron（工作邮件）和Jmail（单中心高密度邮件）两个邮件档案，研究Dunbar式层次结构是否可从邮件通信频率中恢复。研究发现，极端高频通信会破坏标准分层方法，需进行频率归一化；而普通工作邮件中可部分复现Dunbar式层次组织。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典社交网络中的Dunbar层次结构（如亲密圈、熟人圈等）在数字交互数据（如邮件档案）中是否仍然可识别？这个问题尚未得到充分验证。

Method: 对比分析两个结构迥异的邮件档案：Enron（约150用户的工作邮件语料）和Jmail（单中心焦点人物，通信量是Enron用户平均20倍以上）。分别采用基于聚类和基于阈值的标准分层方法，并结合频率归一化与互惠性分析验证恢复的层次是否真实。

Result: Jmail中极端高频通信导致标准分层方法失效；经频率归一化并以经验支持-派系边界锚定后，清晰的层次结构浮现。Enron中部分复现Dunbar层次，最外层对应约50人的affinity group。互惠性分析证实恢复的层次反映双向关系。

Conclusion: Dunbar式层次结构可在邮件档案中有意义地研究，但选择性高频档案需进行频率归一化，层次结构才能变得可解释。

Abstract: Email archives offer a rare view of social relationships through repeated communication, but it remains unclear how well classical ego network layering applies to digital interaction data. This paper compares two public email archives with sharply contrasting structures: Enron, a workplace corpus involving around 150 users, and Jmail, a single-ego archive centered on an exceptionally active focal actor whose communication volume is more than twenty times higher than the average Enron user. We ask, in each case, whether Dunbar-like layered organization is recoverable from email communication frequency and how it should be interpreted. For Jmail, we show that extreme communication intensity causes standard layering methods (whether clustering-based or threshold-based) to break down. Jmail is not a broad communication environment with many occasional contacts, but a selective pool of high-interest alters operating on a much higher frequency scale than ordinary email. Once the Dunbar frequency ladder is anchored to the empirical support-clique boundary, a clearer layered structure emerges. Reciprocity analysis confirms that the recovered layers reflect genuine bidirectional relationships rather than artifacts of the focal actor's outgoing activity. Enron serves as a workplace benchmark that grounds the comparison: its ego networks partially reproduce Dunbar-like organization, with stable inner circles and an outermost recovered layer corresponding to Dunbar's affinity group ($\sim50$), confirming that layered structure is recoverable from ordinary organizational email. Overall, the findings show that Dunbar-like organization can be meaningfully studied in email archives, but that selective high-frequency archives require frequency normalization before the layered structure becomes interpretable.

</details>


### [496] [Topology as Logic: Structural Role Geometry Across Formal, Software, Biological, and Prebiotic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02392)
*Vladi Ivanov*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文通过多层网络分析，在7个独立领域（形式数学、遗留软件、神经进化、自催化网络、数字电路、基准测试、证明助手）中验证了依赖拓扑与功能承载组织之间的可测量结构相关性。关键发现：基于介数的枢纽持久性优于基于度数的枢纽持久性，且所有实验均已预注册。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证依赖拓扑是否与功能承载组织存在可测量的结构相关性，而非仅仅作为隐喻存在。

Method: 使用多层网络分析方法，跨7个独立基板（形式数学、遗留软件、神经进化、自催化网络、4位数字电路、ISCAS85基准、Coq证明助手）测量枢纽持久性和秩散度，应用功能邻近定律来恢复操作组织。

Result: 度基枢纽持久性在物理布线和仿真状态相关层之间较弱（r=0.21），而介数基持久性更强（r=0.77在4位ALU，r=0.34在c432）。ISCAS85预注册主假设得到确认（度r=0.426, p=0.002）。Lean 4 mathlib4确认（r=0.777, p=0.004），Coq Corelib部分确认（r=0.288, p=0.287, n=17）。

Conclusion: 依赖拓扑与功能承载组织之间存在可测量的结构相关性，介数中心性比度中心性更能跨层持久地反映功能组织。所有7个实验均预注册，增强了结果的可信度。

Abstract: We ask whether dependency topology correlates with functional load-bearing organization as recoverable geometry -- not as a metaphor, but as a measurable structural property detectable by multilayer network analysis. Across seven independent substrates, we show that hub persistence and rank divergence under the Functional Proximity Law recover operational organization that domain experts describe as logic: axiomatic load-bearing structure in formal mathematics, control and contract structure in legacy software, conserved hub grammar across approx. 600 million years of neural evolution, catalytic role organization in a published prebiotic autocatalytic network, carry-path dominance in a 4-bit digital circuit, betweenness persistence in the ISCAS85 c432 standard benchmark (n=196), and a directional formal-systems replication in the Coq Corelib (n=17). A key methodological finding: degree-based hub persistence is weak between physical wiring and simulation state-correlation layers (r=0.21 in c432), while betweenness-based persistence is stronger (r=0.77 in the 4-bit ALU post-hoc; r=0.34 in c432). The ISCAS85 pre-registered primary hypothesis was CONFIRMED (degree r=0.426, p=0.002, Spearman r=0.551). The formal-systems claim is supported by two proof-assistant corpora: Lean 4 mathlib4 (CONFIRMED, r=0.777, p=0.004) and Coq Corelib (PARTIAL, direction confirmed, r=0.288, p=0.287, n=17, underpowered). All seven experiments were pre-registered before analysis.

</details>


### [497] [A Lightweight Deep Learning-based Model for Ranking Influential Nodes in Complex Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.19702)
*Mohammed A. Ramadhan,Abdulhakeem O. Mohammed*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文提出1D-CGS混合模型，将1D-CNN与GraphSAGE结合，利用节点度和平均邻居度两个轻量特征，通过SIR模型生成影响力标签，在12个真实网络上显著优于传统中心性方法和深度学习基线，兼顾高精度与高效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有识别复杂网络中有影响力节点的方法在准确性和计算效率之间存在权衡，亟需一种既高效又精确的解决方案。

Method: 构建轻量输入特征（节点度+平均邻居度），经1D-CNN提取局部模式，再通过GraphSAGE聚合邻居信息；将影响力排名建模为回归问题，用SIR模型生成真实标签；在BA合成网络预训练后迁移至真实网络。

Result: 在12个真实网络上，Kendall's Tau平均提升4.73%，Jaccard相似度提升7.67%，Monotonicity Index达0.99，且运行速度远快于现有深度学习方法。

Conclusion: 1D-CGS在保持高排名精度的同时实现了极快的运行速度，具备大规模应用的潜力，是平衡准确性与效率的有效方案。

Abstract: Identifying influential nodes in complex networks is a critical task with a wide range of applications across different domains. However, existing approaches often face trade-offs between accuracy and computational efficiency. To address these challenges, we propose 1D-CGS, a lightweight and effective hybrid model that integrates the speed of one-dimensional convolutional neural networks (1D-CNN) with the topological representation power of GraphSAGE for efficient node ranking. The model uses a lightweight input representation built on two straightforward and significant topological features: node degree and average neighbor degree. These features are processed through 1D convolutions to extract local patterns, followed by GraphSAGE layers to aggregate neighborhood information. We formulate the node ranking task as a regression problem and use the Susceptible-Infected-Recovered (SIR) model to generate ground truth influence scores. 1D-CGS is initially trained on synthetic networks generated by the Barabasi-Albert model and then applied to real world networks for identifying influential nodes. Experimental evaluations on twelve real world networks demonstrate that 1D-CGS significantly outperforms traditional centrality measures and recent deep learning models in ranking accuracy, while operating in very fast runtime. The proposed model achieves an average improvement of 4.73% in Kendall's Tau correlation and 7.67% in Jaccard Similarity over the best performing deep learning baselines. It also achieves an average Monotonicity Index (MI) score 0.99 and produces near perfect rank distributions, indicating highly unique and discriminative rankings. Furthermore, all experiments confirm that 1D-CGS operates in a highly reasonable time, running significantly faster than existing deep learning methods, making it suitable for large scale applications.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [498] [Position Paper: Post-Solve Robustness in Decision Engines: Feasible Regions and Smoothness Under Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00002)
*Yi-Xiang Hu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文指出MILP决策引擎在工业系统中输出的名义最优解在实际部署时因微小扰动而失效，提出应在求解后增加一个鲁棒性审计层，形式化定义了"ε-近优可行邻域"和"解平滑性"两个核心概念，并综合敏感性分析、鲁棒优化、邻域搜索、对抗测试和学习增强等现有方法，构建统一的求解后鲁棒性评估框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业MILP决策引擎输出的名义最优解在部署时因成本、需求或资源可用性的微小扰动而失效（可行性丧失或解剧烈跳变），而现有优化流程缺乏对解后鲁棒性的系统性评估。

Method: 提出一个统一的"求解后鲁棒性层"，核心形式化两个对象：(i) ε-近优可行邻域（参数空间中解保持可行且近优的范围）；(ii) 解平滑性（决策空间中微小组合编辑的解仍具竞争力）。综合敏感性分析、鲁棒优化、邻域搜索、对抗测试和学习增强等方法，提出认证内近似、概率鲁棒性估计、对抗鲁棒性边界及学习驱动预测与解释等具体实现路径。

Result: 给出了一个紧凑的报告模板和评估协议，使鲁棒性成为决策引擎的一等输出。

Conclusion: 求解后鲁棒性差距是当前优化管道的缺失层，也是学习驱动决策系统的缺失评估维度；所提框架旨在补充而非替代鲁棒优化或随机规划，使工程师能获得求解器支持的、关于解可信程度的量化证据。

Abstract: Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) decision engines routinely output nominally optimal plans for high-stakes industrial systems. Yet deployment rarely matches solve-time assumptions: small perturbations in costs, demands, or resource availability can invalidate feasibility or trigger discontinuous shifts to qualitatively different solutions. We argue that this post-solve robustness gap is a missing layer in today's optimization pipelines and a missing evaluation dimension for learning-enabled decision systems. Rather than replacing robust optimization or stochastic programming, the proposed layer audits a solved incumbent and returns solver-backed evidence about how far that solution can be trusted. We formalize two central objects: (i) an $ε$-near-optimal feasible neighborhood in parameter space, capturing when an incumbent remains feasible and near-optimal under perturbations, and (ii) solution smoothness in decision space, capturing whether nearby alternatives with small combinatorial edits remain competitive. We then synthesize the most relevant partial answers from sensitivity and stability analysis, robust optimization, neighborhood search, adversarial testing, and learning-based enhancements, and articulate an agenda for a unified post-solve robustness layer. Concretely, we call for certified inner approximations around the incumbent, probabilistic robustness estimation with calibrated uncertainty, adversarial robustness margins, and learning-based prediction and explanation aligned with solver-backed verification. We conclude with a compact reporting template and evaluation protocol that would make robustness a first-class output of decision engines.

</details>


### [499] [Emergent Collaborative Deliberation in Multi-Model AI Systems: A BFT-Derived Protocol for Epistemic Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00005)
*VD Doske*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Consilium协议是一种拜占庭容错启发的多模型AI审议架构，将模型间分歧视为认知信号而非错误。通过赋予语言模型认知人格并引入金融领域的样本内/样本外验证框架，在1,478次审议中证明：认知人格而非底层模型决定认知行为（边缘模型仅需0.0002美元即可达到前沿模型水平）；RLHF对齐训练造成特定领域认知盲点；协议本身无方向性偏差；样本外检索可发现训练数据无法覆盖的盲点。总成本仅217美元。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI系统在应对争议性、不确定性较强的话题时，往往暴露出对齐训练带来的系统性偏差与认知盲点。多模型间的分歧通常被视为噪声或错误，但本文认为这种分歧本身包含了宝贵的认知信号。作者希望构建一个结构化框架，能够利用多模型分歧来揭示知识边界和认知盲点，同时降低对昂贵前沿模型的依赖。

Method: 方法包含三个核心组件：(1) 拜占庭容错启发的多模型审议协议，将模型分歧视为认知信号；(2) 认知人格工程——将模型本身与其推理方式解耦，为模型分配特定认知风格（如审慎型、批判型等）；(3) 样本内/样本外验证框架（借鉴量化金融），区分基于训练数据共识与实际经验验证的结论。实验覆盖32个主题、10个领域、1,478次审议会话。

Result: (1) 认知人格而非底层模型决定认知行为，边缘模型（0.0002美元/批）与前沿模型（10.69美元/批）输出质量相当；(2) RLHF对齐造成领域特异性认知盲点——政策争议话题的对抗性挑战比科学定论话题低12.3个百分点，AI安全话题存在不对称偏见（Δ=11.6%）；(3) 协议自身无方向性偏差（移民Δ=2.3%，可再生能源Δ=1.2%）；(4) 样本外证据检索实现100%证据召回，发现167个训练数据无法覆盖的盲点；运行间可重复性标准差±2.2%，总成本217美元。

Conclusion: Consilium协议通过将模型分歧重构为认知信号，结合认知人格工程和样本外验证，提供了一种低成本、高可靠性的多模型审议方案。它揭示了RLHF对齐训练带来的隐性认知偏差，并证明边缘模型在合适的协议框架下可以媲美昂贵前沿模型。协议已开源（MIT许可），为提升AI系统在复杂、争议话题上的认知稳健性提供了可行路径。

Abstract: We present the Consilium Protocol, a Byzantine Fault Tolerance-derived architecture for structured multi-model AI deliberation that treats inter-model disagreement as epistemic signal rather than error. The protocol assigns engineered cognitive personas to language models -- separating what a model is from how it reasons -- and introduces an In-Sample/Out-of-Sample validation framework adapted from quantitative finance to distinguish training-data consensus from empirically grounded conclusions. Across 1,478 deliberation sessions spanning 32 topics in 10 domain categories, we demonstrate that (1) the cognitive persona, not the underlying model, determines epistemic behavior: free edge-inference models costing 0.0002 USD per batch produced comparable analytical output to frontier models costing 10.69 USD; (2) RLHF alignment training creates measurable, domain-specific epistemic blind spots -- contested policy topics exhibit 12.3 percentage points less adversarial challenge than settled science topics, and AI safety topics show asymmetric bias ($Δ$=11.6%) where models challenge claims that AI is dangerous far more vigorously than claims that AI risk is overstated; (3) the protocol exhibits no directional bias of its own (immigration $Δ$=2.3%, renewables $Δ$=1.2%); and (4) out-of-sample evidence retrieval validated 239 claims with 100% evidence retrieval and surfaced 167 blind-spot discoveries invisible to training-data deliberation. Run-to-run reproducibility across randomized model$\times$persona assignments averages $\pm$2.2% standard deviation. Total cost for the complete battery including all overhead: 217 USD. We release the protocol specification under MIT license to enable independent verification.

</details>


### [500] [Deliberative Curation: A Protocol for Multi-Agent Knowledge Bases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00007)
*Steven Johnson*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 针对AI智能体在共享知识生态中的协作问题，提出了一种结合知识工件生命周期、声誉加权审议投票和分级制裁的审议式策展协议。实验表明该协议在逆境条件下比多数投票更具韧性（精确度0.826 vs 0.791），其中提交-揭示投票隐藏机制最为有效（提升8.2-8.6pp），但分级制裁尚未得到经验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI智能体从孤立工具转变为共享知识生态中的协作者，集体知识策展的治理成为关键挑战。人类平台治理机制（基于威慑的制裁、群体智慧独立性假设、协商共识）因智能体的无状态性、模型同质性和谄媚行为而失效，亟需专门为AI智能体设计的治理协议。

Method: 提出三层审议式策展协议：(1) 知识工件生命周期的带标签转移系统形式化；(2) 结合Beta声誉与EigenTrust放大的声誉加权审议投票；(3) 针对无状态智能体的分级制裁（区分故障与恶意行为）。通过100个智能体、7种行为原型、两种逆境场景的基于智能体的模拟进行验证。

Result: 在良性条件下精确度略有牺牲，但在逆境下表现显著优于多数投票：适度逆境0.826 vs 0.791（p<0.001），高压逆境0.807 vs 0.740（p<0.001）。性能退化速度约为多数投票的1/3。提交-揭示投票隐藏机制贡献最大（8.2-8.6pp提升），优于声誉加权和审议。分级制裁未在模拟中被触发，缺乏实证验证。

Conclusion: 该审议式策展协议在逆境条件下显著优于多数投票基准，提交-揭示投票隐藏机制是核心组件。但分级制裁的有效性仍需进一步验证，这为未来研究指明了方向。

Abstract: As AI agents transition from isolated tools to collaborative participants in shared knowledge ecosystems, governing collective knowledge curation becomes a critical challenge. Human platform governance mechanisms do not transfer directly: agent statelessness undermines deterrence-based sanctions, model homogeneity violates independence assumptions underlying crowd wisdom, and sycophancy collapses deliberative consensus.
  We propose a deliberative curation protocol combining three governance layers: (1) a knowledge artifact lifecycle formalized as a labeled transition system; (2) reputation-weighted deliberative voting integrating Beta Reputation with EigenTrust amplification; and (3) graduated sanctions adapted for stateless agents, including broken agent handling distinguishing malfunction from adversarial behavior.
  We evaluate the protocol through agent-based simulation with 100 agents across seven behavioral archetypes under two adversity scenarios (30 seeds, paired t-tests). The protocol trades modest precision under benign conditions for substantially better resilience under adversity: 0.826 vs 0.791 for majority vote under moderate adversity (p<0.001), widening to 0.807 vs 0.740 under stress (p<0.001). The protocol degrades roughly three times more slowly than majority vote. Ablation analysis identifies commit-reveal vote concealment as the most impactful single component (8.2-8.6pp precision improvement, p<0.001), outperforming reputation weighting and deliberation combined. Graduated sanctions were not exercised in simulation and remain empirically unvalidated.

</details>


### [501] [Agents on a Tree: Pathwise Coordination for Multi-Objective Molecular Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00008)
*Jia Zhang,Tengfei Ma,Tianle Li,Daojian Zeng,Xieping Gao,Xiangxiang Zeng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ATOM是一个多智能体框架，将分子优化建模为树状搜索，每个节点对应一个原子操作并由专用智能体负责，通过路径协调而非全局共识来探索多样化的分子进化轨迹，在多项多目标分子优化基准上取得了优于现有方法的帕累托覆盖和超体积表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分子优化方法依赖单一策略或固定标量化，难以表达多样化的权衡关系并探索多条有前景的设计路径，且早期设计决策强烈约束后续结果，缺乏对长周期依赖关系的推理能力。

Method: 提出ATOM框架：将分子优化形式化为树状搜索，每个节点对应原子操作并由专精特定目标的智能体管理；智能体沿树的不同路径协调而非强制全局一致；维护全局记忆以平衡不同目标间的探索与利用。

Result: 在涉及活性、可合成性和ADMET相关属性的多目标分子优化基准上，ATOM在帕累托覆盖和超体积指标上持续优于现有强基线方法。

Conclusion: 路径式多智能体协调策略能有效处理分子优化中的长周期依赖关系，在多个冲突目标间实现更好的权衡，证明了树结构多智能体框架在分子设计中的有效性。

Abstract: Multi-objective molecular optimization requires searching vast chemical spaces under conflicting objectives, where early design decisions strongly constrain downstream outcomes. Existing methods typically rely on a single policy or fixed scalarization, which limits their ability to represent diverse trade-offs and to explore multiple promising design trajectories. We propose ATOM, a multi-agent framework that formulates molecular optimization as a tree-structured search. Each node corresponds to an atomic operation and hosts an agent specialized for a particular objective or decision context. Agents coordinate along different paths of the tree rather than enforcing a global consensus, enabling the method to maintain and compare alternative molecular evolution trajectories. A global memory of past optimization behaviors further supports balanced exploration and exploitation across objectives. This tree-structured interaction enables reasoning over long-horizon dependencies inherent in molecular design. Experiments on challenging multi-objective benchmarks involving activity, synthesizability, and ADMET-related properties show that ATOM consistently achieves improved Pareto coverage and hypervolume over strong baselines. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of pathwise multi-agent coordination for molecular optimization. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ATOM-41CE.

</details>


### [502] [Optimal Transport-based Permutation-Invariant Bayesian Optimization of Offshore Wind Farm Layouts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00009)
*Antonio Candelieri,Laurens Bliek*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于最优传输理论的排列不变贝叶斯优化方法（PIBO），用于解决具有对称性的布局优化问题（如海上风电场布局），相比标准BO算法，PIBO在计算时间减半的同时获得了更优的布局方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准贝叶斯优化无法利用问题中存在的对称性（如风电场中风机位置交换不影响目标函数值），导致优化效率低下。

Method: 基于最优传输理论，提出排列不变贝叶斯优化方法（PIBO），使算法对决策变量的排列具有不变性。

Result: 在海上风电场布局优化任务中，PIBO相比标准BO方法获得更优布局，同时计算时间减少约一半。

Conclusion: PIBO能有效利用布局问题的排列对称性提升优化效率和效果，适用于点序不影响目标值的布局优化场景。

Abstract: Bayesian Optimization (BO) is widely and successfully adopted for solving optimization problems having an expensive-to-evaluate, black-box, and non-convex objective function. However, the vanilla BO algorithm is not able to exploit possible symmetries characterizing the target problem. An intuitive case is given by optimal location problems, whose decision variables refer to a finite set of points within a continuous space, with the order of points not affecting the value of the objective function. We refer to this setting as optimization over layouts to distinguish from optimization over point-clouds where, instead, the order of points counts. As an instance of optimization over layouts we consider a real-life industrial-relevant application, that is the optimization of the layout of an offshore wind farm: given identical wind turbines, switching any pair of them has not any effect on the annual energy production. Based on Optimal Transport theory, we propose a Permutation-Invariant BO approach, namely PIBO, proved to provide better wind farm layouts when compared to the vanilla BO approach while cutting computation time roughly in half.

</details>


### [503] [MindGames Arena Generalization Track: In2AI Solution with Delayed Per-Step Reward Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00017)
*Aliaksei Korshuk,Alexander Buyantuev,Ilya Makarov*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对多智能体策略交互场景的强化学习方法，通过延迟每步奖励归因、资格门控、异步rollout生成、课程对手采样和多层分层批构建，使得一个80亿参数的开源模型在MindGames Arena基准上超越了GPT-5等大型专有系统，夺得开放与高效双赛道冠军。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在多智能体策略交互环境中，标准强化学习的每步奖励假设失效，因为行动结果可能依赖于未来未发生的事件、违反规则的行为或其他玩家的决策，导致奖励无法简单分配。

Method: 1) 延迟每步奖励归因与资格门控：仅在episode结束时计算奖励，按任务语义回溯到原始步骤，并排除缺乏有效依赖信息的步骤。2) 异步rollout生成：利用vLLM的连续批处理。3) 课程对手采样与多层分层批构建。

Result: 单个80亿参数的开源模型在MindGames Arena基准（NeurIPS 2025）上，在正面对决中匹配或超越了包括GPT-5在内的大型专有系统，并在开放赛道和高效赛道（≤8B参数）均获得第一名。

Conclusion: 所提出的延迟奖励归因与资格门控方法，结合异步rollout和课程对手采样，能够实现多智能体环境下的稳定、样本高效的RL训练，显著缩小开源小模型与大型专有系统之间的差距。

Abstract: Training language model agents for multi-agent strategic interaction presents a core difficulty: the quality of any action may depend on future events that never materialize, on moves that violate game rules, or on decisions made by other players. Standard reinforcement learning assumes that rewards can be assigned at each step, but this assumption fails in settings where outcomes are entangled across time and agents. We introduce delayed per-step reward attribution with eligibility gating, an episode lifecycle and postprocessing pipeline that computes rewards only at episode end, propagates them back to originating steps according to task-specific semantics, and excludes steps that lack valid dependent information from training. Together with asynchronous rollout generation via vLLM's continuous batching, curriculum-based opponent sampling, and multi-level stratified batch construction, this approach enables stable, sample-efficient RL training in multi-agent environments. We evaluate on the MindGames Arena benchmark at NeurIPS 2025, where a single 8-billion-parameter open-source model trained with our method matched or surpassed substantially larger proprietary systems, including GPT-5, in head-to-head play and took first place in both the Open (unrestricted) and Efficient (<=8B parameters) tracks.

</details>


### [504] [Universal Quantum Transformer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00045)
*Sungyong Chung,Alireza Talebpour*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出通用量子Transformer（UQT），一种利用多量子比特系统物理性质进行精确数学与代数推理的量子原生计算架构。在仅5量子比特的基板上，UQT完美学习了循环模算术（ℤ₁₁）和非阿贝尔代数（S₄置换群），实现了超越经典网络的确定性泛化，作者将此现象称为"结晶化"（crystallization），并展示了其在NISQ硬件上的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典连续空间神经网络难以锁定精确的数学对称性（如模算术和非交换代数），往往需要大量参数缩放来近似这些离散逻辑规则，即使出现延迟泛化现象（grokking）后仍存在随机不稳定性。作者希望构建一种根本上不同、量子原生的计算架构，以解决这一根本性局限。

Method: 提出通用量子Transformer（UQT），完全基于参数化几何相位嵌入和SU(2)波干涉机制，而非翻译经典神经机制。使用高度紧凑的5量子比特基板，设计量子注意力电路来学习离散数学结构。

Result: UQT在5量子比特上完美学习了ℤ₁₁循环模算术和S₄置换群代数；相较于经典注意力网络在收敛时表现出的随机不稳定性，UQT实现了数学精确的确定性泛化；理论上避开了经典自注意力的二次方瓶颈，对数级压缩了表示维度，消除了经典网络过度参数化的问题；并在IBM量子计算机上验证了其可行性。

Conclusion: UQT证明了参数化量子拓扑可作为精确人工智能的普适优越物理基底。"结晶化"作为超越grokking的新现象，标志着量子原生架构在离散数学推理方面对经典网络的本质性超越。

Abstract: Classical continuous-space neural networks fundamentally struggle to lock into exact mathematical symmetries, such as modular arithmetic and non-commutative algebra. To approximate these discrete logical rules, they often rely on massive parameter scaling, resulting in stochastic instability even after delayed generalization phenomena known as grokking. Here, we introduce the Universal Quantum Transformer (UQT), a fundamentally novel, quantum-native computing architecture that uses the physical properties of multi-qubit systems as a universal inductive bias for exact mathematical and algebraic reasoning. Rather than translating classical neural mechanisms, our framework relies entirely on parameterized geometric phase embedding and $SU(2)$ wave-interference. We demonstrate that the quantum attention circuit, operating on a highly compact 5-qubit substrate, perfectly learns two highly distinct formal classes: cyclic modular arithmetic ($\mathbb{Z}_{11}$) and non-Abelian algebra (the $S_4$ permutation group). While classical attention-based networks exhibit stochastic instability at convergence, the UQT achieves mathematically exact, deterministic generalization. We refer to this phenomenon as crystallization: a step beyond the well-known phenomenon of grokking. Crucially, this framework yields massive computational and memory advantages by theoretically bypassing the quadratic bottleneck of classical self-attention, and by logarithmically compressing the required representation dimension to eliminate the massive over-parameterization inherent to classical networks. Finally, we deploy this architecture on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) hardware, proving its viability on current IBM Quantum computers. These results establish parameterized quantum topology as a universally superior physical substrate for exact artificial intelligence.

</details>


### [505] [Grokers: Bottom-Up Inductive Comprehension and Write-Time Intelligence over Typed Knowledge Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00050)
*Gregory Magarshak*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Grokers是一种通过自底向上归纳遍历依赖子图来构建持久化、结构化知识图谱理解的架构。相比RAG每次查询都需完整推理，Grokers在写入时由Groker代理分析节点、提取属性并归纳组合理解，让后续查询无需额外LM成本。论文证明了字节同一性、累积单调性和双遍历顺序三个形式化定理，并提出了一种确定性替代嵌入语义搜索的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RAG系统每次查询都要重复消耗LLM推理成本，缺乏持久化的结构化理解机制，导致效率低下。作者希望构建一种"写时智能、读时零成本"的架构，在知识写入阶段就完成深度理解，使后续查询可以直接利用已积累的结构化知识。

Method: Grokers架构：1) Groker代理对类型化流图节点进行自底向上归纳遍历；2) 通过受控LM调用提取结构化属性；3) 沿依赖关系归纳组合理解，写入增强的类型化属性；4) 维护事务性的反规范化索引保证上下文块字节同一性；5) 设计同义缓存协议作为嵌入语义搜索的确定性替代方案。

Result: 论文给出了三个形式化定理的证明：字节同一性定理（KV缓存命中率接近100%）、累积单调性定理（无需LM调用即可解决交互的比例单调递增）、双遍历顺序定理（自顶向下生成和自底向上理解是DAG上各自任务的唯一正确遍历顺序）。同义缓存的LM回退率在有限词汇域中收敛到零。

Conclusion: Grokers提出了一种根本不同于RAG的知识处理范式——将智能成本转移到写入阶段，实现查询阶段的零额外LM成本。形式化证明支撑了该架构的正确性和效率保证，开源实现提供了实践基础。该工作对构建高效、持久化的知识系统具有重要理论价值和实践意义。

Abstract: We present Grokers, an architecture for building persistent, structured comprehension of typed knowledge graphs through bottom-up inductive traversal of dependency subgraphs. Unlike retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), which pays full comprehension cost at every query, Grokers pushes intelligence to write time: autonomous Groker agents analyze nodes in a typed stream graph, extract structured attributes via governed language model (LM) calls, and inductively compose that understanding upward through dependency relations, writing enriched typed attributes that serve all future queries at zero additional LM cost. We prove three formal properties: (1) the Byte-Identity Theorem, establishing that context blocks assembled from a transactionally-maintained denormalization index are byte-identical across LM turns between semantic changes, enabling KV-cache hit rates approaching 100%; (2) the Accumulation Monotonicity Theorem, establishing that the fraction of interactions resolved without LM calls is non-decreasing in the number of completed interactions under a governed wisdom library growth protocol; and (3) the Dual-Traversal Ordering Theorem, establishing that top-down generation and bottom-up comprehension are the unique correct traversal orderings for their respective tasks over a dependency DAG, and that their composition closes into a complete generation-comprehension cycle. We further present a deterministic alternative to embedding-based semantic search, with a synonym caching protocol whose LM fallback rate converges to zero for finite-vocabulary domains. A reference implementation is provided in the open-source Qbix / Safebox / Safebots stack.

</details>


### [506] [Product-Aware Deep Autoencoders for Robust Process Monitoring in Multi-Product Cyber-Physical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00052)
*MD Shafikul Islam,Jordan Carden*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现传统全局异常检测模型在多产品等级制造中存在决策边界过宽导致"盲点"漏洞的问题，并提出了一种"产品感知自编码器"方法，通过学习产品等级特定的数据分布来缓解该问题。实验表明该方法在标准指标上与全局模型相当，但在针对性的攻击测试中实现100%检测率（全局模型仅22.2%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业4.0背景下，制造过程中的异常检测对安全至关重要。现有全局模型（agnostic models）在多种产品等级并存的柔性制造环境中，会因学习所有正常数据的分布而扩大决策边界，导致某些异常（尤其是针对性的网络物理攻击）被掩盖在宽泛的接受区域内，形成安全隐患。

Method: 提出Product-Aware Autoencoder（产品感知自编码器），将学习域限制在特定产品等级的分布内，而非全局统一建模。通过对比全局自编码器基线，在Extended Tennessee Eastman Process（TEP）基准上进行验证。

Result: 标准检测指标上，Product-Aware框架与全局基线表现相当；但在模拟攻击压力测试中，全局模型在77.8%的场景下未能检测到操作偏差，而产品感知系统达到100%检测准确率。

Conclusion: 在柔性制造环境中，通用（全局）异常检测器存在不可忽视的安全风险，应推动向"模式感知"的诊断架构转变，以提升对多产品等级场景下异常的检测鲁棒性。

Abstract: As Industry 4.0 accelerates the integration of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) in manufacturing, robust anomaly detection has become critical for ensuring process safety and security. Current data-driven approaches typically employ "product-agnostic" or global models trained on the aggregate of all normal operating data. However, modern industrial facilities frequently operate under diverse product grades. While computationally simple, these global models inherently expand their decision boundaries to accommodate the variance of multiple modes, creating a "blind spot" where subtle anomalies or targeted cyber-physical attacks may be masked by the wide acceptance region of the model. In this work, we first demonstrate that the vulnerability described above is present in global-agnostic models operating across multiple product grades. We then present a Product-Aware Autoencoder as a principled mitigation that restricts the learning domain to grade-specific distributions. While this approach reduces the identified blind-spot risk, we do not claim it as the optimal mitigation among all possible alternatives. We rigorously validate this approach against a Global Agnostic baseline using the Extended Tennessee Eastman Process (TEP) benchmark. Our empirical results indicate that the Product-Aware framework performs comparably to the global baseline on standard detection metrics, while offering improved robustness to product-grade-specific operating modes. Most critically, stress tests simulating our hypothetical attack scenarios reveal that while the global model fails to detect operational deviations in 77.8% of the scenarios, the product-aware system achieves 100% detection accuracy. These findings suggest that, in flexible manufacturing environments, generalized anomaly detectors can pose non-trivial security risks, motivating a shift toward mode-aware diagnostic architectures.

</details>


### [507] [On the evolution of the concept of probability as a mirror of the evolution of reason](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00102)
*Jean-Louis Le Mouël,Vincent Courtillot,Dominique Gibert,Vladimir Kossobokov,Jean-Baptiste Boulé,Pierpaolo Zuddas,Fernando Lopes,Païkan Marccagi,Alexis Maineult*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文追溯了概率论从博弈计算到理性推理框架的历史演变，指出其最终在现代贝叶斯推断中达到成熟的认识论形态。同时探讨了概率论的局限：它能量化命题的不确定性，却无法形式化概念本身的模糊性。因此，文章进一步分析了模糊逻辑（处理渐变语义）和深度学习（基于几何插值的预测模式）作为概率论之外的理性延伸，主张当代科学理性不能仅依赖数据驱动，还需明确表达不确定性、模糊性与推理过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者试图超越纯粹的数学史视角，将概率论的发展解读为"理性本身"的转型过程，并回答一个根本问题：当代科学理性是否仅靠概率论就足够了？通过揭示概率论在形式化概念模糊性方面的局限，引出对模糊逻辑和深度学习等其他推理模式的考察。

Method: 采用历史与认识论相结合的论述方法：首先梳理概率论从帕斯卡、费马到科尔莫戈罗夫公理化的关键节点；然后聚焦现代贝叶斯推断（尤其是Tarantola的概率作为信息逻辑的观点）；最后通过对比分析概率论、模糊逻辑与深度学习三者在认识论角色上的差异与互补性。

Result: 文章识别出三条理性的不同路径：概率论处理已定义命题的不确定性（量化推理），模糊逻辑处理概念边界的渐变性（定性判断的精确化），深度学习则通过几何空间中的插值与优化实现预测（无需显式推断）。三者各有其适用域与局限性。

Conclusion: 当代科学理性不能简化为数据驱动的性能指标，而需要明确整合三种认识论工具：概率论用于不确定性量化，模糊逻辑用于概念模糊性表达，深度学习用于模式预测。三者互补而非替代，共同构成更完整的理性框架。

Abstract: Over the centuries, probability theory has grown from the calculus of games of chance into a central framework for reasoning under uncertainty. This article interprets that evolution not merely as a mathematical history, but as a transformation of rationality itself. From Pascal and Fermat's combinatorial symmetry to the inductive logic of Bayes and Laplace, from Poisson's statistics of events to Kolmogorov's axiomatic formalization, probability progressively incorporated uncertainty, time, and coherence into scientific judgment. This trajectory reaches a mature epistemological form in modern Bayesian inference, especially in Tarantola's view of probability as a logic of information, where prior knowledge and data are combined coherently. Yet this framework also exposes a limit: probability quantifies uncertainty about well-defined propositions, but does not by itself formalize the vagueness of the concepts used to describe them. The article therefore examines how rationality extends beyond probability. Fuzzy logic is presented as a rigorous language for graded meaning and qualitative judgment, while deep learning is analyzed as a distinct, powerful mode of prediction based on geometric interpolation and optimization rather than explicit inference. By situating probability, fuzzy logic, and deep learning in a common historical and epistemological perspective, the article clarifies their roles and limits. It argues that contemporary scientific rationality cannot be reduced to data-driven performance alone, but requires the explicit articulation of uncertainty, vagueness, and inference.

</details>


### [508] [Evaluating Interactive Reasoning in Large Language Models: A Hierarchical Benchmark with Executable Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00103)
*Mingyuan Fan,Weiguang Han,Daixin Wang,Cen Chen,Zhiqiang Zhang,Jun Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出多轮交互推理框架，将推理视为主动证据获取与信念更新，并构建474个可执行游戏基准测试，揭示大模型在交互效率、上下文鲁棒性和元认知适应上的显著差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理评估多聚焦单轮问答或静态推理，缺乏对主动信息获取、信念更新及元认知能力的考察。

Method: 设计多轮交互框架，LLM需主动查询隐藏环境、整合部分观测，决定何时给出答案；构建474个游戏基准，含五种难度等级与固定配置搜索空间。

Result: 基准高度区分模型性能，不仅成功率和交互效率差异大；上下文扰动造成中等但一致下降，反事实修订与必要性判断导致更大性能下降。

Conclusion: 该框架有效揭示了当前LLM在主动推理和元认知适应方面的瓶颈，为下一代推理评估提供了新方向。

Abstract: We introduce a multi-turn interactive framework for reasoning evaluation that treats reasoning as active evidence acquisition and belief updating. Wherein, LLMs receive only the task rules, must issue targeted queries to a hidden environment, integrate partial observations over time, and decide when to submit a final answer. Beyond standard success rate and interaction efficiency, we evaluate contextual robustness under controlled contextual perturbations, and metacognitive adaptation through counterfactual revision and necessity judgment. We instantiate the framework as a benchmark of 474 executable games, each evaluated under five fixed configuration search spaces corresponding to five difficulty levels, and evaluate a broad set of frontier LLMs. Results show that the benchmark is highly discriminative, exposing large differences not only in success rate but also in interaction efficiency. Moreover, we empirically show that contextual perturbations cause moderate but consistent declines, whereas counterfactual revision and necessity judgment lead to much larger drops.

</details>


### [509] [A Multi-AI-agent Framework Enabling End-to-end Finite Element Analysis for Solid Mechanics Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00138)
*Titu Ranjan Sarker,Muhammed Jawaad Zulqernine,Ling Yue,Shaowu Pan,Chenxi Wang,Shiyao Lin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出基于大语言模型的多智能体框架AbaqusAgent，通过自然语言指令自动生成Abaqus有限元分析案例并可视化结果，在50个固体力学问题中达到86%成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 降低有限元分析的学习门槛，解决因边界条件、载荷等关键参数定义错误导致的仿真失效问题，减少对多年工程经验的依赖。

Method: 构建由解释器、架构师、输入编写器、运行器、审查器和可视化器六个智能体组成的多智能体框架，覆盖前处理与后处理全流程，将自然语言指令转化为Abaqus可执行分析。

Result: 在50种不同的固体力学问题中成功验证，总体成功率达86%。

Conclusion: AbaqusAgent不仅提升了固体力学有限元分析的效率并降低了计算力学教育门槛，还推动了人-仿真交互范式的进步，可与AI优化和材料表征工作流集成。

Abstract: Finite element analysis (FEA) is the most important numerical approach for solid mechanics. Challenges of FEA include a steep learning curve for entry-level users and potential false simulations due to incorrect definitions of key simulation components, such as boundary conditions, load cases, and solution variables. Years of engineering experience are usually necessary for real-world problem-solving. To address these issues, we present AbaqusAgent, a multi-agent framework grounded in large language models (LLMs) for solid mechanics analyses. AbaqusAgent is developed to facilitate analysis case generation and execution using Abaqus, one of the most widely used FEA packages, by turning users' natural-language instructions into executed FEA analyses and result visualization. AbaqusAgent is composed of six agents, including interpreter, architect, input writer, runner, reviewer, and visualizer agents, encompassing all the essential pre-processing and post-processing steps of standard FEA analyses. A wide variety of 50 solid mechanics problems have been successfully validated, achieving an overall success rate of 86%. Beyond improving the efficiency of FEA for solid mechanics problems and lowering the barrier to computational mechanics education, AbaqusAgent advances the human-simulation interaction paradigm and enables integration with AI-empowered optimization and material characterization workflows. The code is available at https://github.com/LIRAM-LIN/AbaqusAgent

</details>


### [510] [CAST: Non-Privileged Clipped Asymmetric Self-Teaching with Advantage Flipping for GRPO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00172)
*Yang Li,Gongle Xue,Yijia Guo,Yuheng Yuan,Liwen Hu,Lei Ma*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CAST提出了一种无答案的自蒸馏方法，用于GRPO风格的RLVR训练，通过自教师模型的token级优势塑造和双向局部优势符号反转，解决了GRPO在零方差组中梯度消失以及OPSD信号与轨迹正确性不一致的问题，在数学推理任务上取得了改进效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR方法存在两个问题：(1) 结果级奖励仅提供稀疏监督，GRPO中当所有采样轨迹全对或全错时，组相对优势消失，梯度为零；(2) 密集的token级指导方法OPSD虽能提供token级信号，但其token偏好与轨迹正确性不一定对齐，实验诊断显示其在正确和错误rollout上表现不同，且存在噪声。因此需要一种既保持验证器接地目标，又能提供正确token级信号的方法。

Method: CAST方法的核心创新：(1) 保持GRPO的验证器接地目标，但使用stop-gradient自教师模型来根据轨迹正确性塑造token级优势；(2) 不需要参考解决方案条件的教师评分；(3) 在训练过程中保持自教师log-probability gap持续激活；(4) 双向局部优势符号反转：正确轨迹中教师负向token获得负的token级优势，错误轨迹中教师正向token获得有界正局部优势；(5) 对于全对或全错的零方差组，分配有界的符号约束基础优势，使原本零梯度的组能够贡献验证器签名的token反馈。

Result: 在数学推理任务上的实验表明，CAST改进了RLVR训练效果，同时保持了轻量级、验证器接地的轨迹级目标。

Conclusion: CAST通过自蒸馏方法有效解决了GRPO中零方差组梯度消失和OPSD信号不一致的问题，在保持验证器接地目标轻量级优势的同时，提供了更优的token级训练信号，提升了推理能力。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), especially Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has been widely used to improve reasoning in large language models. However, outcome-level rewards provide only sparse supervision, and group-relative advantages vanish when all sampled trajectories for a prompt are either correct or incorrect. On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) offers dense token-level guidance, but its token preferences are not necessarily aligned with trajectory correctness; empirical diagnostics show that OPSD signals behave differently on correct and incorrect rollouts, with teacher-positive and teacher-negative gap signals exhibiting different noise profiles. These diagnostics are conducted under an OPSD-style privileged teacher context for analysis only, whereas CAST training uses answer-free self-teacher scoring.Motivated by these observations, this work proposes CAST, an answer-free self-distillation method for GRPO-style RLVR. CAST keeps the verifier-grounded GRPO objective, but uses a stop-gradient self-teacher to shape token-level advantages according to trajectory correctness. Unlike prior self-distilled RLVR methods, CAST does not require reference-solution-conditioned teacher scoring, keeps the self-teacher log-probability gap active throughout training, and applies bidirectional local advantage sign reversal: teacher-negative tokens in correct trajectories can receive negative token-level advantages, while teacher-positive tokens in incorrect trajectories can receive bounded positive local advantages. For zero-variance all-correct and all-wrong groups, CAST assigns bounded sign-constrained base advantages, so these otherwise zero-gradient groups can contribute verifier-signed token feedback. Experiments on mathematical reasoning show that CAST improves RLVR training while retaining a lightweight, verifier-grounded trajectory-level objective.

</details>


### [511] [TIGER: Traceable Inference with Graph-Based Evidence Routing for Mitigating Hallucinations in Multimodal Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00232)
*Kaixiang Zhao,Tianrun Yu,Shawn Huang,Porter Jenkins,Yushun Dong,Amanda Hughes*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: TIGER是一个推理时框架，通过独立提取输入和输出的图结构，对每个事实进行风险评分并选择性修复，从而在多模态生成中减少不准确事实。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理时修复方法存在两个问题：输出中的幻觉会污染模型对输入的解读；自由形式的反馈无法在事实级别进行排序和调度。因此需要一种更精准、局部的修复机制。

Method: TIGER独立从输入构建"观察图"、从输出构建"声明图"，基于图结构计算每个声明的风险分数（支持与冲突情况），然后选择高风险声明进行修复，同时冻结模型主体。

Result: 在图像到文本、图像+文本到文本、音频到文本、视频到文本等四种跨模态任务上，TIGER均能减少不支持的生成内容，同时保持任务质量不下降，且在不同骨干模型上表现稳定。CrisisFACTS案例研究显示该方法在多源场景中也能提升接地性。

Conclusion: TIGER通过图驱动的细粒度事实修复，有效解决了多模态生成中的事实幻觉问题，且具有理论收敛保证和广泛的跨模态适用性。

Abstract: We study fact-level repair for multimodal generation, where a fluent output may contain specific facts that are not supported by the input. Existing inference-time repair methods often generate feedback by jointly conditioning on the input and the current output.
