Abstract: Learned heuristics have recently become a competitive alternative to traditional domain-independent heuristics for satisficing planning. Existing approaches, however, focus on improving search guidance rather than guaranteeing admissibility, which makes them unsuitable for optimal classical planning. We present the first method for learning domain-dependent heuristics that are admissible by design and thus preserve the optimality guarantees of A* search. Instead of learning a direct mapping from states to heuristic values, we learn to construct abstractions that induce admissible heuristics. We use an LLM-driven evolutionary program-synthesis framework to obtain, for each domain, a program that produces a pattern collection for any task in that domain, and we combine the resulting patterns admissibly via saturated cost partitioning. Empirically, the learned programs encode interpretable domain-specific insights, run with negligible overhead at test time and yield heuristics that match the coverage of state-of-the-art domain-independent baselines on several domains while evaluating each state substantially faster.

</details>


### [660] [Food Noise & False Safety: A Systematic Evaluation of How LLMs Fail to Adapt to Eating Disorder Queries with Clinician Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02444)
*Giulia Pucci,Emily Hemendinger,Ruizhe Li,Gavin Abercrombie,Tanvi Dinkar,Arabella Sinclair*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究发现，患有饮食障碍（EDs）的用户越来越多地向大型语言模型（LLMs）寻求指导、建议和情感支持。通过与临床ED专家合作，发现用户提示中的特定语言线索会增加模型产生不安全回应的可能性，并且LLM会不加批判地适应存在问题的用户输入，从而可能造成危害。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 饮食障碍患者越来越多地使用LLM聊天系统寻求支持，但这类系统并非设计用于提供临床建议，其被感知的专业性、中立性和可及性使其成为频繁但存在风险的支持来源。作者希望探究用户与LLM之间的潜在互动模式，特别是模型不加批判地适应不安全的用户请求可能带来的危害。

Method: 与临床ED专家合作，识别用户提示中增加不安全回应可能性的特定语言线索，并系统性地改变用户提示中的潜在风险程度，以评估LLM不加批判地适应问题输入的程度。

Result: 用户提示中的特定语言线索会显著增加LLM产生不安全回应的可能性；LLM会不加批判地适应存在潜在危险的用户输入。

Conclusion: LLM在应对饮食障碍相关对话时存在显著安全风险，需要更好的安全机制来防止模型不加批判地适应和强化用户的有害请求。

Abstract: Recent evidence shows that people with eating disorders (EDs) are increasingly seeking guidance, advice, and emotional support from Large Language Model (LLM)-based chat systems. Although these systems are not designed to provide clinical advice, their perceived expertise, neutrality and accessibility make them a frequent, albeit risky, source of support. This paper investigates potential patterns of interaction between users with EDs and LLMs, focusing on the potential harms arising from models that uncritically adapt to, and facilitate unsafe or self-harming user requests. We find, in consultation with clinical ED experts, that specific linguistic cues in prompts increase the likelihood of unsafe responses and, through systematically varying the degree of potential risk present in the user prompt, report the extent to which LLMs uncritically adapt to problematic, and potentially dangerous user inputs.

</details>


### [661] [HLL: Can Agents Cross Humanity's Last Line of Verification?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02449)
*Xinhao Song,Su Su,Sirui Song,Hongliang Wu,Wen Shen,Zhihua Wei,Gongshen Liu,Linfeng Zhang,Dongrui Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了HLL基准，通过交互式CAPTCHA验证来评估多模态智能体能否像人类一样跨越自动化防护边界。实验发现，当前最先进的多模态智能体在定位、动作校准、状态追踪和过程一致性方面存在明显缺陷，远未达到替代人类处理受保护工作流的水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态智能体日益被期望代表用户操作界面，但面临的一个核心部署问题是：它们能否真正替代人类，完成那些服务方刻意防范自动化的受保护工作流？CAPTCHA验证使这一问题变得具体可测。

Method: 提出了Humanity's Last Line of Verification (HLL)基准，包含多样化的交互式CAPTCHA场景，并引入现实压力因素（杂乱的网页、更难的任务变体、基于操作轨迹的过程验证）。在闭环GUI环境中评估了8个前沿多模态智能体。

Result: 当前智能体在不同验证类型上表现差异巨大；在真实界面条件下性能显著下降；当要求正确答案必须由有效动作轨迹支持时，性能进一步大幅下滑。暴露了定位、动作校准、状态追踪和过程一致性方面的明显不足。

Conclusion: HLL提供了一个具体测试平台，用以衡量多模态智能体在受保护的真实工作流中替代人类的能力。当前智能体远未达到可靠的替代水平。

Abstract: Multimodal agents are increasingly expected to operate interfaces on behalf of users, raising a central deployment question: can they truly substitute for humans in workflows that services deliberately protect against automation? CAPTCHA verification makes this question concrete. It is not merely a visual puzzle, but a human-verification boundary placed before account creation, content access, form submission, and other protected actions. We introduce \textbf{Humanity's Last Line of Verification (HLL)}, a controlled benchmark that uses interactive CAPTCHA verification to evaluate whether agents can cross this boundary through grounded, human-like interaction rather than recognition alone. HLL covers diverse CAPTCHA interactions and exposes agents to controlled realism stressors, including cluttered webpages, harder task variants, and trace-conditioned validation of the solving process. We evaluate eight frontier multimodal agents in a closed-loop GUI environment. The results show that current agents remain brittle at this human-substitution boundary: performance varies sharply across verification types, degrades under realistic interface conditions, and drops further when correct answers must be supported by valid action traces. By exposing gaps in localization, action calibration, state tracking, and process consistency, HLL provides a concrete testbed for measuring how close multimodal agents are to acting as human substitutes in protected real-world workflows. Our code is available at https://github.com/XinhaoS0101/HLL

</details>


### [662] [Beyond One-shot: AI Agents for Learning in Field Experiments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02458)
*Junjie Luo,Ritu Agarwal,Gordon Gao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了工具增强的自主AI是否能够从实验数据中自动学习并生成新的干预措施。通过在医疗处方信息传递领域开展两阶段实地实验（共693,139次患者就诊），比较了人类+聊天机器人方法（第一阶段）与工具增强自主AI方法（第二阶段）。AI方法配备分析工具、结构化DIKW推理智能体和透明证据链，生成的最佳消息点击率达到69.8%（比基线高6.5个百分点）。研究表明，价值来源于特定领域的实验数据而非通用推理能力，前沿大语言模型在没有实验数据的情况下无法预测哪些干预措施会成功。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 组织在A/B测试中积累了大量实验数据，但这些数据未被充分利用来指导后续干预设计。从既往实验数据中提取可操作知识以设计新干预措施存在显著障碍，因此需要探索AI是否能够自动完成这一学习与生成过程。

Method: 采用两阶段实地实验设计：第一阶段由行为专家与对话式AI协作共同设计13条消息变体（444,691名患者）；第二阶段由工具增强自主AI从第一阶段数据中提取原则，自主生成17个新变体（248,448名患者）。AI方法配备分析工具、结构化DIKW（数据-信息-知识-智慧）推理智能体和透明证据链。

Result: AI生成的最佳消息实现了69.8%的点击率（比基线高6.5个百分点）。前沿大语言模型在没有实验数据的情况下无法预测哪些干预措施会成功。通用行为理论在特定医疗情境中并不均匀适用。

Conclusion: 工具增强的AI能够从实验数据中学习并生成改进的领域相关干预措施，将行为实验从一次性评估转变为可扩展的累积设计学习系统。研究还提出了在实地实验规模下进行理论审计的自主AI方法。

Abstract: Organizations routinely run experiments for A/B testing, yet the data generated from one experiment is underutilized to inform subsequent intervention design. Significant barriers exist to extracting actionable knowledge from prior experimental data to inform new interventions. We study whether tool-augmented agentic AI can automatically learn from experimental data to generate new interventions in subsequent experiments. Through two-stage field experiments in healthcare prescription messaging (693,139 patient visits), we compare a Human + Chatbot method (Stage 1: behavioral experts with conversational AI co-designing 13 message variants, 444,691 patient visits) against a Tool-Augmented Agentic AI method (Stage 2: AI autonomously extracting principles from Stage 1 data to generate 17 new variants, 248,448 patient visits). The Agentic AI method, equipped with analytical tools, structured Data-Information-Knowledge-Wisdom (DIKW) reasoning agents, and transparent evidence chains, produces superior interventions: the best AI-generated message achieved a 69.8% CTR (+6.5 percentage points over baseline). Critically, our results suggest that the value comes from domain-specific experimental data, not from general reasoning ability: frontier LLMs operating without experimental data failed to predict which interventions would succeed. The field experiments also revealed that general-purpose behavioral theories used for intervention design do not extend uniformly to specific healthcare contexts, motivating an agentic AI approach to theory audits at field-experiment scale. Our research shows that tool-augmented AI can learn from experimental data and generate improved domain-relevant interventions, transforming behavioral experimentation from one-shot evaluation into a scalable system for cumulative design learning.

</details>


### [663] [AGENTCL: Toward Rigorous Evaluation of Continual Learning in Language Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02461)
*Yiheng Shu,Bernal Jiménez Gutiérrez,Saisri Padmaja Jonnalagedda,Yuguang Yao,Huan Sun,Yu Su*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AGENTCL框架，通过可控任务流评估语言智能体的持续学习能力，并开发MemProbe探针方法分析记忆设计对迁移增益的影响。实验表明，可控任务流比朴素任务流更能区分记忆设计的学习能力，同时揭示了记忆带来的性能退化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准难以严格评估语言智能体的持续学习能力，多数工作聚焦于长上下文的检索与推理，而近期终身适应基准常依赖朴素任务流，缺乏对跨任务关系的分析，难以理解智能体随时间学到了什么以及复用了什么。

Method: 提出AGENTCL评估框架，包含可控任务流（早期子解决方案、证据或工作流可在后续任务中复用）和对比性的朴素任务流；同时开发MemProbe探针方法，存储交互、见解和技能，并在整合时过滤不可靠的经验。

Result: 在编码、深度研究、语言理解/推理任务上的实验表明：朴素任务流区分记忆设计的能力有限，而可控任务流能更清晰地分辨其可塑性；朴素和留出设置下增益有限，且可能暴露记忆导致的性能退化。

Conclusion: 需要更强的记忆设计来平衡可塑性与稳定复用，当前记忆方法在可控任务流下仍有明显不足。

Abstract: Language agents spend substantial inference time solving individual tasks, yet the experience acquired in one episode is often underutilized in future episodes. Continual learning expects an agent to accumulate reusable experience across a stream of tasks, improve over time, and avoid interference from irrelevant experiences. Unfortunately, existing benchmarks struggle to evaluate continual learning in language agents rigorously. Most efforts focus on retrieval and reasoning over long-context conversations or documents, while recent lifelong-adaptation benchmarks often rely on naive task streams with limited analysis of cross-task relationships, making it difficult to understand what an agent learns and reuses over time. This paper presents an evaluation framework AgentCL for continual learning in agents, centered on controlled task streams and metrics for transfer gains. AGENTCL constructs compositional streams where earlier sub-solutions, evidence, or workflows are intentionally reusable in later tasks, and contrasts them with naive streams where such reusability is not guaranteed. We use the benchmark to evaluate non-parametric memory designs for continual learning. To diagnose how memory design choices affect continual learning, we develop MemProbe, a probing method that stores interactions, insights, and skills, while filtering unreliable experiences during consolidation. Empirical analysis across coding, deep research, and language understanding/reasoning tasks shows that naive streams offer limited ability to distinguish memory designs, whereas controlled streams more clearly distinguish their plasticity. Meanwhile, naive and held-out settings often yield limited gains and can expose memory-induced degradation. These results highlight the need for stronger memory designs that balance plasticity and stable reuse.

</details>


### [664] [MCP-Persona: Benchmarking LLM Agents on Real-World Personal Applications via Environment Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02470)
*Wenhao Wang,Peizhi Niu,Gongyi Zou,Xiyuan Yang,Jingxing Wang,Haoting Shi,Yaxin Du,Jingyi Chai,Xianghe Pang,Shuo Tang,Yanfeng Wang,Siheng Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了MCP-Persona，首个针对个性化MCP工具（如社交媒体、企业协作套件）的Agent性能评估基准，实验表明现有SOTA Agent在个性化工具使用方面存在显著困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准主要聚焦通用信息检索工具，无法捕捉个人社交应用中工具与个人账户或本地数据库交互带来的实际挑战，缺乏针对个性化MCP工具的评估标准。

Method: 构建了涵盖Reddit、小红书（Rednote）、飞书（Lark）、Slack等多种真实世界个性化MCP应用的基准数据集，并在多种SOTA Agent上进行系统性实验评估。

Result: 多种现有最先进Agent在个性化工具使用任务上表现显著不佳，证明该基准有效识别了当前方法的局限性。

Conclusion: MCP-Persona填补了个性化MCP工具评估的空白，揭示了现有Agent在真实社交应用场景中的不足，为推动更实用的Agent研究提供了重要基准。

Abstract: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has emerged as a transformative standard for connecting large language models (LLMs) with external data sources and tools, and has been rapidly adopted across personal applications and development platforms. However, existing benchmarks predominantly focus on generic information-seeking tools and fail to capture the practical challenges posed by personal social applications, where tools interact with individual accounts or local databases. To bridge this critical gap, we introduce MCP-Persona, the first benchmark specifically designed for evaluating agent performance on real-world, personalized MCP tools. MCP-Persona encompasses a diverse set of widely-used applications, ranging from social media platforms like Reddit and Xiaohongshu (Rednote) to enterprise collaboration suites such as Lark (Feishu) and Slack. Our extensive experiments on various state-of-the-art (SOTA) agents demonstrate their significant struggles with personalized tool use, thereby highlighting the benchmark's crucial role in identifying and addressing these limitations. MCP-Persona is publicly available at https://github.com/wwh0411/MCP-Persona}{https://github.com/wwh0411/MCP-Persona.

</details>


### [665] [Iteris: Agentic Research Loops for Computational Mathematics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02484)
*Leheng Chen,Zihao Liu,Wanyi He,Bin Dong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文介绍了一个名为Iteris的智能体研究系统，旨在解决计算数学中的开放问题。通过两个案例（共轭梯度法与随机坐标下降法的渐近比较相图，以及QR列主元分解在低相干性下可能选择病态子矩阵的反例），展示了该系统能生成数值证据、构造和证明草稿，经专家审核后得到验证结果。研究认为智能体AI系统可参与计算数学开放问题的研究流程，但人类验证仍不可或缺。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型和智能体AI在数学发现方面取得了显著进展，但计算数学中的开放问题（需要数值实验、对抗性构造和算法设计）相对被忽视。本文旨在填补这一空白，探索AI系统是否能有效参与这类需要数值计算和算法设计的开放问题研究。

Method: 提出一个名为Iteris的智能体研究系统，将其应用于Simons Workshop的两个计算数学开放问题。系统负责生成数值证据、构造和证明草稿，然后由人类专家进行审核、修正，最终得到可验证的研究结果。

Result: 1) 生成了幂律谱下共轭梯度法与随机坐标下降法渐近比较的相图；2) 构造了一个反例，证明QR列主元分解在低相干性条件下仍可能无法选择良态子矩阵。两项结果均经专家审核和修正后得到验证。

Conclusion: 智能体AI系统可以在计算数学开放问题的研究流程中发挥有意义的作用，但人类验证仍然是不可或缺的环节。这表明AI与人类协作的研究模式在该领域具有潜力。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models and agentic AI systems have enabled significant progress in mathematical discovery, from solving competition problems to tackling research-level conjectures. However, open problems in computational mathematics have received comparatively less attention: research in this area often requires not only proofs but also numerical experimentation, adversarial constructions, and algorithm design. In this paper, we introduce an agentic research system, Iteris, designed for open problems in computational mathematics. We apply Iteris to two open problems from a recent Simons Workshop collection (arXiv:2602.05394). In these case studies, Iteris generated numerical evidence, constructions, and proof drafts that led, after expert review and correction, to verified results. The first result is a phase diagram for the asymptotic comparison between conjugate gradient and randomized coordinate descent on power-law spectra; the second is a counterexample showing that QR factorization with column pivoting can fail to select well-conditioned submatrices even under low coherence. These case studies suggest that agentic AI systems can participate meaningfully in research workflows for open problems in computational mathematics, while human validation remains essential.

</details>


### [666] [RASER: Recoverability-Aware Selective Escalation Router for Multi-Hop Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02488)
*Yuyang Li,Zihe Yan,Tobias Käfer*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: RASER是一种基于单次RAG的廉价路由系统，在不多次调用LLM的情况下，能智能决策是否需要对多跳问题执行额外检索，在保持与SOTA方法相当F1分数的同时，仅消耗41-49%的token成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多跳问答系统对每个问题都使用昂贵的检索策略（如问题分解、多次检索、桥接实体搜索），依赖多次LLM调用进行重写或分解，token成本过高。然而分析发现大量多跳问题其实单次RAG就能正确回答，因此对每个问题都执行额外检索是预算浪费。

Method: 提出RASER（可恢复性感知的选择性升级路由器），基于单次RAG及其六个特征构建廉价路由器。RASER-2决定是否升级到PRUNE（额外检索）；RASER-3在单次RAG、PRUNE和迭代检索IRCoT之间选择，加入了显式的成本-准确率权衡。两种路由器均无需额外LLM调用来做决策。

Result: 在6个LLM和3个多跳QA基准上，两种路由器在F1分数上与其他SOTA基线保持竞争力，同时仅消耗always-prune策略的41-49%的token，也低于迭代检索和分解检索基线。

Conclusion: RASER证明了通过轻量级路由机制，可以在预算受限的情况下显著降低多跳问答的推理成本，同时不牺牲太多准确率，为资源敏感型问答系统提供了实用方向。

Abstract: Multi-hop question-answering systems often use expensive retrieval on every question. They may decompose the question, run several retrieval rounds, or search through bridge entities before answering. All of these strategies rely on repeated LLM calls to rewrite or decompose the question, which increases extra token cost, and it is not fitting when the LLM budget is tight. However, our analysis shows that lots of multi-hop questions are already answered correctly by a single one-shot RAG, so running an extra retrieval on every question wastes the budget. We introduce RASER (Recoverability-Aware Selective Escalation Router), a family of cheap routers built on one-shot RAG and six features from it. RASER-2 decides whether to stop or escalate to the extra-retrieval action PRUNE. RASER-3 chooses among one-shot RAG, PRUNE, and iterative retrieval IRCoT, using the same features but adding an explicit cost-accuracy trade-off. Neither router makes an extra LLM call to decide. Across six LLMs and three multi-hop QA benchmarks, both routers stay competitive with the other state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines in F1 while spending only 41-49% of always-prune's tokens and also less than the iterative and decomposition retrieval baselines.

</details>


### [667] [Bridging the Last Mile of Time Series Forecasting with LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02497)
*Yuhua Liao,Zetian Wang,Qiangqiang Nie,Zhenhua Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了"最后一公里预测"问题，并设计了一个基于LLM-agent的框架，该框架位于预测主干模型之上，通过工具调用获取上下文证据、将推理轨迹转化为显式的预测修订操作，从而弥合统计预测与业务就绪预测之间的差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实场景中，统计预测基线很少是最终使用的预测，通常需要结合假期效应、活动计划、历史类比等弱结构化业务信息进行修订。然而，这一关键的实际阶段在预测文献中尚未得到充分探索。

Method: 提出了LLM-agent框架：维护统一的预测工作空间，调用工具检索上下文证据，在结构安全约束下将推理轨迹转化为显式的预测修订操作；支持通过map-reduce式分解进行长周期预测，并通过记忆库实现事后反思。

Result: 通过真实世界案例研究展示了LLM代理如何弥合统计预测与业务就绪预测之间的差距，系统被设计为可控且可审计的。

Conclusion: LLM代理能够有效桥接统计预测与业务决策之间的鸿沟，使预测结果在真实业务环境中真正可用，且系统具有良好的可控性和可审计性。

Abstract: Time series forecasting has advanced rapidly, especially with the emergence of foundation models that show strong zero-shot performance on numerical extrapolation. However, in real-world forecasting settings, a statistically plausible baseline is rarely the final forecast used in practice. Before a forecast becomes decision-ready, it often needs to be revised using weakly structured business context such as holiday effects, campaign plans, external events, historical analogs, and expert feedback. This practical stage remains underexplored in the forecasting literature. In this paper, we formulate this stage as the \textbf{last-mile forecasting} problem and present an LLM-agent framework that sits on top of a forecasting backbone. Our system maintains a unified forecast workspace, invokes tools to retrieve contextual evidence, and converts reasoning trajectories into explicit forecast revision actions under structural safety constraints. It also supports long-horizon forecasting through map-reduce-style decomposition and post-hoc reflection through a memory bank. The resulting system is designed to be controllable and auditable. Through real-world case studies, we show how LLM agents can bridge the gap between statistical prediction and business-ready forecasting.

</details>


### [668] [SafeSteer: Localized On-Policy Distillation for Efficient Safety Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02530)
*Hao Li,Jingkun An,Zijun Song,Pengyu Zhu,Rui Li,Hao Wang,Wendi Feng,Yesheng Liu,Lijun Li,Jin-Ge Yao,Lei Sha*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SafeSteer通过仅在安全tokens上进行策略蒸馏，在保持大模型通用能力的同时实现高效安全对齐，仅需100条有害样本且无需通用数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对齐方法会导致"对齐税"（alignment tax），即牺牲通用能力来提升安全性；且依赖大量通用数据或辅助奖励模型，成本高昂。

Method: 1) 通过激活操控（activation steering）构建安全教师模型；2) 设计安全token选择算法；3) 仅在选中的安全tokens上施加反向KL散度惩罚进行策略蒸馏训练。

Result: 在7个安全基准上取得强安全性，在5个通用能力基准上仅有微小退化；仅需100条有害样本（不到基线方法的1%），无需任何通用数据。

Conclusion: 安全特征在输出分布中本质上是稀疏的，对齐只需局部修改而非全局权衡，SafeSteer验证了这一观点并实现了高效低成本的模型对齐。

Abstract: Aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with human values often degrades their general capabilities, termed the alignment tax. Existing methods mitigate this by balancing dual objectives, which heavily rely on massive general-purpose data or auxiliary reward models.
  In this paper, we argue that, because safety features are inherently sparse within the output distribution, alignment requires localized modifications rather than global trade-offs. To this end, we propose SafeSteer, which performs on-policy distillation confined to safety tokens. First, we construct a safety teacher via activation steering. Based on this teacher, we develop a safety token selection algorithm. Consequently, SafeSteer restricts the reverse KL penalty to these tokens during training to preserve general capabilities.
  Experimental results across diverse models show that our SafeSteer achieves a superior trade-off between safety and general capability compared with existing methods, attaining strong safety performance on seven safety benchmarks with only minimal degradation on five general capability benchmarks. Notably, SafeSteer requires only 100 harmful samples without using any general-purpose data, less than 1% of what previous baselines used, considerably reducing alignment cost. More details are on our project page at https://anjingkun.github.io/SafeSteer.

</details>


### [669] [Tracking the Behavioral Trajectories of Adapting Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02536)
*Jonah Leshin,Manish Shah,Ian Timmis*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通过文本嵌入空间中的方向向量来测量智能体特质的方法，对技能文件差异进行评分，在敏感数据获取倾向性评估上达到91.2%的准确率，并构建了智能体间的可信评估协议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 技能文件、记忆文件等文本文件定义了现代智能体的行为方式，这些文件会随人为或自主编辑而演变，直接影响智能体的未来行为。然而缺乏系统化方法来测量和评估这些文件变化所反映的智能体特质。

Method: 将特质定义为文本嵌入空间中的方向向量；在标注的"修改前vs修改后"技能文件差异上训练线性模型学习特质向量；通过将嵌入差异投影到该向量上对任意技能编辑进行评分。

Result: 在68个标注的技能差异对上，敏感数据获取倾向性特质的符号分类准确率达91.2%，Spearman等级相关系数ρ=0.82（留一交叉验证）。

Conclusion: 该方法能有效测量智能体特质，并可扩展为智能体间通过可信中介评估技能更新的协议。

Abstract: Text files such as skill files, memory files, and behavioral configuration files play a central role in defining how modern agents act. Through edits by humans or the agents themselves, these files may evolve over time, directly steering the agent's behavior in future interactions. We present a methodology and framework for measuring agent $traits$ by defining traits as directions in the embedding space of a text embedding model. We train a linear model on labeled "before" versus "after" skill file diffs to learn a trait vector, then score arbitrary skill edits by projecting their embedding diffs onto this vector. Evaluated on 68 labeled skill diff pairs for the trait of propensity to seek sensitive data, our method achieves 91.2% sign classification accuracy and a Spearman rank correlation of $ρ= 0.82$ under leave-one-out cross-validation. We build this trait evaluation into a broader agent-to-agent protocol that enables one agent to evaluate another's skill file updates through a trusted intermediary.

</details>


### [670] [ClinEnv: An Interactive Multi-Stage Long Horizon EHR Environment for Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02568)
*Yuxing Lu,Yushuhong Lin,Wenqi Shi,J. Ben Tamo,Xukai Zhao,Jinzhuo Wang,May Dongmei Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ClinEnv是一个基于真实住院病例的交互式医疗基准，通过纵向住院模拟评估LLM作为主治医生的决策能力。最强模型决策F1仅0.31，且信息获取质量与结果质量严重脱节，模型在管理决策（0.17 F1）上远不如出院诊断（0.51 F1），存在明显的信息获取缺口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医疗基准存在静态化（无法模拟临床逐步决策）或交互式但各有缺陷的问题，无法真实评估LLM在不确定性下的序贯决策能力和信息获取质量。

Method: 构建ClinEnv基准，将真实住院病例自动转化为有序决策阶段序列。每个阶段模型需主动查询四个专业智能体，然后做出用药、手术和诊断决策。评分同时评估决策结果（基于本体的确定性匹配）和信息获取过程质量。

Result: 最强模型（GPT-4等）决策F1仅0.31；结果质量与过程质量严重脱节；管理决策（0.17 F1）远差于出院诊断（0.51 F1）；模型在病程后期仍持续发出冗余查询。

Conclusion: ClinEnv揭示了仅评估结果无法发现的信息获取缺口，证明了过程评估的重要性，为LLM在临床决策中的能力评估提供了更全面的视角。

Abstract: Clinical practice is not the selection of an answer from enumerated options: a physician gathers heterogeneous information incrementally and commits to sequential, irreversible decisions under uncertainty. Static benchmarks cannot probe and existing interactive medical benchmarks each compromise on at least one of them. We present ClinEnv, an interactive benchmark that evaluates LLMs as attending physicians over real inpatient admissions under a paradigm we term Longitudinal Inpatient Simulation. Each case is automatically constructed into an ordered sequence of decision stages; at every stage the model must actively query four specialized agents before committing to medications, procedures, and diagnoses. ClinEnv scores both what the model decides, through deterministic ontology-grounded matching, and how it gathers information. Across seven models, the strongest reaches only 0.31 decision F1, and outcome quality is sharply decoupled from process quality. Difficulty concentrates in management decisions and later stages, where models recover discharge diagnoses far more reliably than management actions (0.51 vs. 0.17 F1) and continue to issue redundant queries as cases progress. ClinEnv makes this information-acquisition gap, invisible to outcome-only evaluation, directly measurable.

</details>


### [671] [Pramana: Fine-Tuning Large Language Models for Epistemic Reasoning through Navya-Nyaya](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04937)
*Sharath Sathish*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Pramana方法，通过对Llama 3.2-3B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B进行Navya-Nyaya逻辑（2500年前的印度推理框架）微调，教会LLM显式的认识论方法论。该方法包含6阶段推理（质疑、证据识别、五段论、反事实验证、谬误检测、确定），在55个逻辑问题上训练后，语义正确率达100%，即使格式遵循度仅40%，表明模型内化了推理内容。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在需要系统推理和可追溯证据的领域表现不佳，当引入无关上下文时性能下降65%，暴露出其脆弱的模式匹配而非真正推理。这种"认识论差距"——无法将主张锚定于可追溯证据——限制了AI在需要证明的领域的可靠性。

Method: 对Llama 3.2-3B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B进行Navya-Nyaya逻辑微调，采用6阶段推理框架：SAMSHAYA（质疑分析）、PRAMANA（证据源识别）、PANCHA AVAYAVA（五段论）、TARKA（反事实验证）、HETVABHASA（谬误检测）、NIRNAYA（确定）。训练数据为55个Nyaya结构化的逻辑问题（约束满足、布尔SAT、多步演绎）。

Result: Stage 1在保留集上达到100%语义正确率，但严格格式遵循度仅40%；消融实验表明格式提示和温度参数对性能有显著影响，且最优配置因阶段而异。

Conclusion: 即使结构强制不完全（格式遵循仅40%），模型仍能内化推理内容（语义正确率100%），表明Navya-Nyaya逻辑框架为LLM提供了标准推理方法所缺乏的认知脚手架，有望填补AI的认识论差距。代码、模型和数据集已开源。

Abstract: Large language models produce fluent text but struggle with systematic reasoning, often hallucinating confident but unfounded claims. When Apple researchers added irrelevant context to mathematical problems, LLM performance degraded by 65% Apple Machine Learning Research, exposing brittle pattern-matching beneath apparent reasoning. This epistemic gap, the inability to ground claims in traceable evidence, limits AI reliability in domains requiring justification. We introduce Pramana, a novel approach that teaches LLMs explicit epistemological methodology by fine-tuning on Navya-Nyaya logic, a 2,500-year-old Indian reasoning framework. Unlike generic chain-of-thought prompting, Navya-Nyaya enforces structured 6-phase reasoning: SAMSHAYA (doubt analysis), PRAMANA (evidence source identification), PANCHA AVAYAVA (5-member syllogism with universal rules), TARKA (counterfactual verification), HETVABHASA (fallacy detection), and NIRNAYA (ascertainment distinguishing knowledge from hypothesis). This integration of logic and epistemology provides cognitive scaffolding absent from standard reasoning approaches. We fine-tune Llama 3.2-3B and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B on 55 Nyaya-structured logical problems (constraint satisfaction, Boolean SAT, multi-step deduction). Stage 1 achieves 100% semantic correctness on held-out evaluation despite only 40% strict format adherence revealing that models internalize reasoning content even when structural enforcement is imperfect. Ablation studies show format prompting and temperature critically affect performance, with optimal configurations differing by stage. We release all models, datasets, and training infrastructure on Hugging Face to enable further research on epistemic frameworks for AI reasoning.

</details>


<div id='cs.NI'></div>

# cs.NI [[Back]](#toc)

### [672] [GNN-based Online Beamforming Design for HAPS-Assisted NTN](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00244)
*Lavanya S S Anjapuli,Animesh Yadav,Halim Yanikomeroglu*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出将高空平台（HAPS）集成到地面网络中，通过联合设计基站和HAPS的波束赋形来提升小区边缘用户的能效，并利用图神经网络解决非凸优化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 地面网络中小区边缘用户因高路径损耗、阴影和小区间干扰（ICI）面临严重的容量限制，现有方案难以有效解决。

Method: 提出HAPS辅助的网络架构，将基站数据通过视距链路经HAPS中继到边缘用户；将能效最大化问题建模为非凸优化，并开发基于图神经网络（GNN）的在线优化框架进行求解。

Result: 数值结果表明所提HAPS辅助架构能有效提升网络性能，特别是提高了第5百分位能效，改善了小区边缘用户的服务质量。

Conclusion: HAPS与地面网络协同，结合GNN优化框架，能显著缓解边缘用户性能瓶颈，提升能效公平性。

Abstract: In terrestrial networks, especially in urban areas, cell-edge users often face significant capacity limitations due to high path loss, shadowing, and inter-cell interference (ICI). This paper proposes integrating a high-altitude platform station (HAPS) into terrestrial networks, where terrestrial base stations (BS) can alleviate these issues by relaying data intended for cell-edge users via HAPS, thereby leveraging line-of-sight (LoS) links. We formulate an energy-efficiency (EE) maximization problem to jointly design beamforming vectors at the BS and HAPS with the goal of improving cell-edge user performance. Since the resulting problem is non-convex, we develop an online optimization framework based on a graph neural networks (GNN), which effectively captures the network topology. Numerical results show that the proposed HAPS-assisted architecture improves network performance, particularly by increasing the 5th-percentile EE, thereby enhancing service for cell-edge users.

</details>


### [673] [KISS: Keeping it Simple and Slotted when Learning to Communicate over Wireless](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00266)
*Kamil Szczech,Maksymilian Wojnar,Krzysztof Rusek,Katarzyna Kosek-Szott,Szymon Szott*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文探讨了去中心化强化学习（DDQN+贝叶斯推断）能否在无需预训练、无需通信、无需协调的条件下，自主学会高效且公平的随机信道接入策略。实验表明，该方法达到了接近理论最优的效率和公平性，并自发学习出类似动态调整发送概率的时隙ALOHA行为，作者称其为KISS方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分布式无线信道接入方案多依赖固定启发式规则，难以兼顾效率与公平。作者希望探索机器学习智能体能否在极简假设下，自主发现或逼近理论最优的随机接入机制，为MAC设计提供新视角。

Method: 采用离线策略Double Deep Q-Network（DDQN）结合贝叶斯推断，训练全在线、全分布式、无协调、无显式通信的多智能体，在时隙信道上自主学习接入策略。

Result: 仿真表明，学习到的策略能适应变化的网络条件，实现了接近理论极限的效率，同时保持了公平性。消融实验显示，所学行为类似于动态调整发送概率的时隙ALOHA。

Conclusion: 去中心化强化学习可以在极简假设下近似最优随机接入策略，该方法（KISS）兼具简单性和有效性，为未来MAC协议设计提供了数据驱动的思路。

Abstract: A long-standing challenge in distributed wireless systems is ensuring efficient and fair random channel access. Existing solutions often address specific constraints related to timing, periodicity, or centralization, but they typically rely on fixed heuristics. Motivated by recent advances in machine learning (ML), we investigate whether ML agents can autonomously learn efficient and fair access strategies, and whether such learning can offer new insights into medium access control (MAC) design. Rather than proposing a deployable protocol, our aim is to examine whether decentralized learning can rediscover or approximate theoretically efficient random-access mechanisms under minimal assumptions. To this end, we deploy an off-policy Double Deep Q-Network (DDQN) with Bayesian inference to train agents operating over a slotted channel. The resulting method is fully online (no pre-training), fully distributed (independent multi-agent learners), stochastic (non-periodic), and requires no coordination or explicit communication. Extensive simulations show that the learned strategy adapts to varying network conditions and achieves near-theoretical efficiency while maintaining fairness. Ablation studies further reveal that the learned behavior resembles slotted ALOHA with a dynamically adjusted transmission probability, leading us to refer to the method as KISS: Keeping It Simple and Slotted.

</details>


### [674] [AgentxGCore: Agentic AI for Next-Generation Mobile Core Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00417)
*Maria Katarine Santana Barbosa,Kelvin L. Dias*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentxGCore，一种基于Agentic AI-Native层的架构，利用多智能体系统（网络规划器+网络执行器）在6G核心网中实现意图驱动的自组织和自适应闭环优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3GPP核心网AI集成仍受限于集中式方法和管理复杂性，且未充分利用LLM和Agentic AI的能力来应对6G网络日益复杂的运维需求。

Method: 在3GPP架构上引入Agentic AI-Native层，构建多智能体系统：网络规划器（可视化状态+制定满足意图的计划）和网络执行器（批评并执行计划），利用API实现跨xGC域的AI驱动闭环优化。

Result: 基于开源核心网、异构数据集和多种LLM构建验证环境，证明了所提方案的有效性。

Conclusion: AgentxGCore通过Agentic AI-Native层实现了6G核心网的自组织和自适应能力，为意图驱动网络管理提供了新的范式。

Abstract: To meet the stringent requirements of emerging applications and the increasingly complex network management and operation, the Next Generation Mobile Networks (NextG), or 6G, will adopt an AI-native architecture on the Core Network (CN). In this movement, the Third Generation Partnership Project (3GPP) has extended the cellular CN with new function as a first step toward integrating analytics, Artificial Intelligence (AI), and machine learning. However, those new functionalities are constrained by a centralized approach and managerial complexity. Furthermore, with the rise of Large Language Models (LLMs), a new era in network orchestration and management begins, leveraging and empowering the Intent-based Networking (IBN) paradigm. In addition, AI agents and Agentic AI integrate Reasoning and Acting (ReAct), enabling the usage of such intents to continuously interact with the network. Unlike state-of-the-art approaches that primarily employ Agentic AI to mitigate deployment and configuration complexity in the CN, this paper introduces AgentxGCore, which leverages an Agentic AI-Native layer to extend the 3GPP architecture and enable a system based on the existing APIs across the Beyond Next Generation Core (xGC) domain. This proposal establishes an AI-driven closed-loop for continuous optimization based on real-time information, enabling self-organization and self-adaptation. Our approach involves a multi-agent specialized system, divided into a network planner agent, capable of visualizing the network state and developing a plan to meet the intents, and a network executor, responsible for criticizing and executing the plan. To validate the proposed solution, an environment was built using an open-source CN, heterogeneous datasets, and different LLMs were employed to demonstrate its effectiveness.

</details>


### [675] [XOR Bidding and Knapsack Formulations for HPC Network Resource Allocation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00490)
*Abrar Hossain,Kishwar Ahmed*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出基于拍卖机制的动态带宽分配方法（Greedy Value Density Auction 和 VCG Knapsack Auction），在高负载下将平均和尾部延迟降低80%以上，延迟变异系数降低75-85%，负载波动性降低60-70%，显著优于传统FCFS方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代HPC中心面临大数据流摄取瓶颈，传统静态分配和简单排队方法无法有效利用带宽，阻碍科学进展。

Method: 将带宽分配形式化为同时考虑网络和处理约束的优化问题，提出两种基于拍卖的机制：Greedy Value Density Auction（计算高效）和VCG Knapsack Auction（理论保证强）。用户通过投标指定数据需求和科学价值，目标最大化社会总福利。

Result: 高负载下平均和尾部延迟降低>80%，延迟变异系数降低75-85%，负载峰值平均比降低60-70%，优于FCFS基线。

Conclusion: 基于价值的自适应带宽分配能有效减少拥塞、提高资源利用率，并基于科学重要性实现更公平的访问。

Abstract: Modern High Performance Computing (HPC) centers face growing challenges in ingesting large and diverse data streams. These issues often create bottlenecks that limit bandwidth utilization and delay scientific progress. Traditional static allocation and simple queuing methods are often insufficient. This paper presents a dynamic, value-based approach to bandwidth allocation. We formalize the problem by incorporating both network and processing constraints. To address it, we introduce two auction-based mechanisms: the Greedy Value Density Auction, which is computationally efficient, and the Vickrey--Clarke--Groves (VCG) Knapsack Auction, which provides strong theoretical guarantees. Both mechanisms rely on user bids that specify data requirements and scientific value. The objective is to maximize the total value of successful transfers, commonly referred to as social welfare. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed mechanisms significantly outperform First Come First Served (FCFS) baselines. Under high-load conditions, they reduce average and tail completion delays by more than 80%. Predictability also improves, with the coefficient of variation of delay decreasing by 75--85%. Network stability increases as well, with load volatility, measured by the peak-to-average ratio, decreasing by 60--70%. These results indicate that value-driven, adaptive bandwidth allocation can reduce congestion, improve resource utilization, and provide fairer access based on scientific importance.

</details>


### [676] [SEArch: Optimistic Policy Selection Between Scene Noise and Drift for UAV Radar Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01325)
*Noor Khial,Naram Mhaisen,Loay Ismail,Amr Mohamed*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出SEArch和W-SEArch两种在线策略选择算法，用于无人机雷达目标搜索任务。通过随机扩展对抗（SEA）框架同时处理场景内随机噪声和场景间非平稳变化，实现轻量级自适应检测策略切换，在资源受限的无人机平台上取得最优遗憾性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机在动态非平稳环境中执行雷达目标搜索时，固定信号处理策略在所有条件下均非最优，但无人机平台资源受限，无法运行复杂模型。现有方法仅能处理场景内随机噪声或场景间非平稳变化中的单一情形，缺乏能同时应对两种挑战的轻量级在线自适应方法。

Method: 基于随机扩展对抗（SEA）框架，将目标搜索形式化为在线策略选择问题，采用乐观跟随正则化领导者（OFTRL）选择器与自适应学习率，构建SEArch算法实现O(σ̄_T√T + √J)的遗憾界；进一步提出窗口化变体W-SEArch，每w轮重启，在每次窗口最多一次场景变化条件下达到O(σ̄_I√w)的遗憾界。

Result: 在多种非平稳设置下，相比非自适应基线方法，遗憾值降低高达30%。

Conclusion: 本文提出的SEArch和W-SEArch算法有效解决了无人机雷达目标搜索中同时存在场景内随机噪声和场景间非平稳变化的双重挑战，在资源受限平台上实现了高效的在线策略自适应，显著优于非自适应基线。

Abstract: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) equipped with radar sensors are deployed for target search missions in diverse environments, where targets exhibit characteristic signatures (e.g., respiration micro-motion in human search) detectable through occlusions. A fundamental challenge arises from shifts in radar statistics as the UAV moves through a dynamic and potentially non-stationary environment, rendering any fixed signal-processing strategy suboptimal; yet perception and adaptation must run onboard a resource-constrained aerial node in real time. Since no single detector performs well across all conditions, we adopt a multi-policy paradigm and formulate UAV target search as an online policy selection problem over a library of specialized detectors, with performance measured by regret, the cumulative loss gap relative to the best policy in each scene. The setting couples in-scene stochastic noise with inter-scene shifts. Whereas prior methods capture only one regime, we account for both through the Stochastically Extended Adversary (SEA) framework, without requiring oracle knowledge of scene dynamics. Because adaptation must run at the UAV, we instantiate SEA through \textsc{SEArch}, a lightweight optimistic Follow the Regularized Leader (OFTRL) selector with an adaptive learning rate, achieving regret $O(\barσ_T \sqrt{T} + \sqrt{J})$, where $\barσ_T$ captures radar measurement noise and $J$ is the number of scene transitions over the mission horizon $T$. To enable rapid adaptation under frequent scene changes, we further introduce \textsc{W-SEArch}, a windowed variant that restarts every $w$ rounds and achieves regret $O(\barσ_I \sqrt{w})$ under at most one transition per window. Experiments show up to 30\% regret reduction compared to non-adaptive baselines across a range of non-stationary settings.

</details>


### [677] [Understanding Cross-Cloud Interconnects: Hands-On Measurements and Cost Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01440)
*Eitan Eliav,Isaac Keslassy,David Breitgand,Dean H. Lorenz,Avi Weit*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究跨云互联服务（如Google CCI），提出ToggleCCI动态成本优化算法，在不确定流量模式下通过VPN与CCI的动态切换实现近似最优成本节约。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨云数据传输需求快速增长，但CCI类服务存在高额固定租赁费和数天配置延迟，结合不可预测的流量模式，使得成本优化极具挑战，现有研究空白。

Method: 通过AWS-GCP直连测量实证对比CCI与替代方案；提出ToggleCCI算法，基于滑动时间窗口观测成本趋势，动态在VPN和CCI间切换；并证明其在持续高/低负载场景下的渐近最优性。

Result: 真实流量轨迹下，ToggleCCI持续跟踪每种场景的最优静态策略，实现显著成本节约。

Conclusion: ToggleCCI有效应对配置延迟和需求不确定性，为跨云互联服务的动态成本优化提供了首个可行且理论上保证的方案。

Abstract: New services such as Google Cross-Cloud Interconnect (CCI) address the rise in fast and large-scale cross-cloud data transfers. CCI offers dedicated high-throughput links with low per-GB transfer costs, but also involves high fixed leasing fees and multi-day provisioning delays. This combination makes cost optimization difficult because traffic patterns are unpredictable.
  This paper presents the first comprehensive study of CCI-like services. We begin with an empirical characterization of CCI and its alternatives using direct measurements across AWS-GCP interconnects. We then introduce ToggleCCI, a new dynamic cost-optimization algorithm designed to handle provisioning delays and uncertainty in future demand. ToggleCCI adapts by switching between VPN and CCI based on cost trends observed over a sliding time window. We prove that ToggleCCI achieves asymptotic optimality under sustained high-demand or low-demand regimes. Finally, using real-world traffic traces, we show that ToggleCCI consistently tracks the best static policy for each scenario and delivers substantial cost savings.

</details>


### [678] [A Reproducible UAV-Assisted VANET Dataset Generator for Fragmentation Risk Analysis in Intelligent Transportation Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01488)
*Bappa Muktar,Justin Moskolaï Ngossaha,Adama Nouboukpo*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出一个可复现的无人机辅助车联网数据集生成器，用于短期网络碎片化风险预测。该框架模拟双向双车道高速公路场景，包含多种交通数据采集配置（自由流、局部事故、稀疏延伸拓扑、密集突发交通、混合压力环境），并周期性提取移动性、拓扑、无人机覆盖和通信窗口特征，为每个样本分配未来碎片化标签。该生成器基于ns-3实现，模块化、可扩展，为无人机辅助VANET的监督学习研究和连接管理策略提供了实用基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VANET高度动态的拓扑结构使其易发生网络碎片化，尤其是在高速公路、低密度交通、局部事故区和通信压力大的环境中。虽然无人机已被研究用作临时空中中继来改善VANET连接性，但支持短期碎片化风险分析的可复现数据集仍然缺乏。

Method: 基于ns-3仿真框架，构建双向双车道高速公路场景，车辆相向行驶，无人机作为空中支持节点。设计了五种数据采集配置（自由流、局部事故、稀疏延伸拓扑、密集突发交通、混合压力条件），周期性提取移动性、拓扑、无人机覆盖、通信窗口等特征，并根据可配置预测时间窗口后的网络状态生成未来碎片化标签。

Result: 对生成的示例数据集进行了描述性特征分析，包括场景平衡性、无人机策略平衡性、未来标签分布、场景特定标签行为及代表性特征范围。

Conclusion: 提供了一个模块化、可扩展、可复现的基于ns-3的数据生成框架，为未来无人机辅助VANET中的监督学习研究和连接管理策略奠定了实用基础。

Abstract: Vehicular Ad Hoc Networks (VANETs) are a key component of Intelligent Transportation Systems, enabling cooperative communication among vehicles and between vehicles and roadside infrastructure. However, their highly dynamic topology makes them vulnerable to network fragmentation, particularly in highway scenarios, low-density traffic conditions, localized accident zones, and communication-stressed environments. Although Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) have been increasingly investigated as temporary aerial relays for improving VANET connectivity, reusable, future-labeled, and reproducible datasets designed to support short-term fragmentation risk analysis remain limited. This paper proposes a reproducible UAV-assisted VANET dataset generator for short-term fragmentation risk prediction. The proposed framework simulates a two-lane highway scenario in which vehicles move in opposite directions while UAVs operate as aerial support nodes. It incorporates multiple data collection profiles, including free-flow traffic, localized accidents, sparse extended topologies, dense bursty traffic, and mixed stress conditions. During each simulation episode, the generator periodically extracts mobility, topology, UAV coverage, and communication-window features, then assigns each sample a future fragmentation label based on the network state observed after a configurable prediction horizon. An illustrative generated dataset is descriptively characterized in terms of scenario balance, UAV policy balance, future-label distribution, scenario-specific label behavior, and representative feature ranges. By providing a modular, extensible, and reproducible ns-3-based data-generation framework, this work offers a practical basis for future supervised learning studies and connectivity management strategies in UAV-assisted VANETs.

</details>


### [679] [mmAlert: A Simultaneous Device Localization and Target Tracking System via Cooperative Passive Sensing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01653)
*Chao Yu,Bojie Lv,Chunxi Chen,Jingwen Zhang,Rui Wang*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于毫米波频段的协作式无源感知系统mmAlert，能够同时实现设备定位与目标跟踪。通过测量到达角和双基地多普勒频率，联合估计发射机位置与目标轨迹，并引入交替优化和扩展卡尔曼滤波降低复杂度。60GHz实验验证了该系统性能，并证明了轨迹多样性带来的定位增益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有毫米波感知系统通常难以同时实现无源目标跟踪与发射机定位，且高维优化问题求解复杂，亟需一种低复杂度的联合估计方案。

Method: 利用至少两个发射机的上行通信链路，接收机接收直达波和目标散射回波；提取到达角（AoA）和双基地多普勒频率作为观测值；通过最小化AoA与多普勒测量值的加权均方误差来联合估计发射机位置和运动轨迹；针对高维优化难题，采用交替优化框架，并引入扩展卡尔曼滤波（EKF）快速塑造目标轨迹。

Result: 在60GHz测试平台上，单条轨迹下发射机平均定位误差0.76m，轨迹重建误差0.29m；当使用50条轨迹时，平均误差分别降至0.07m和0.2m，验证了轨迹多样性对定位与跟踪精度的提升效果。

Conclusion: mmAlert能够有效实现毫米波频段的无源协同感知，交替优化结合EKF的方法在降低计算复杂度的同时保持良好性能，且轨迹多样性是提升定位与跟踪精度的重要途径。

Abstract: In this paper, a cooperative passive sensing system in millimeter-wave (mmWave) band for simultaneous device localization and target tracking, namely mmAlert, is proposed. Specifically, in uplink communication with at least two transmitters, the receiver receives the line-of-sight (LoS) signals and the scattered signals off a moving target, respectively. Based on the received signals of the sensing time intervals, when a passive target moves along one or multiple unknown trajectories, mmAlert could measure the angles-of-arrival (AoAs) and bistatic Doppler frequencies of the echoes from the sensing target, and then jointly estimate the locations of the transmitters and the trajectories of the target. Specifically, the transmitters' locations and the moving target's trajectories can be searched by minimizing the weighted mean squared error of the AoA and Doppler measurements. The optimal solution of the minimization problem is prohibitive due to the large number of variables. Hence, a low-complexity algorithm based on the alternating optimization is proposed, where the extended Kalman filter (EKF) is introduced to quickly shape the trajectories. The mmAlert is implemented in a 60GHz communication testbed. The experiment shows with the received signal spanning a single trajectory, the average localization error of the transmitters and average trajectory reconstruction error are 0.76 m and 0.29 m, respectively. The average errors are suppressed to 0.07 m and 0.2 m respectively, if the received signal spanning 50 trajectories is used. This justifies the benefit of trajectory diversity in localization and tracking.

</details>


### [680] [A Unified E2E Energy Efficiency Testing Framework for Open RAN](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01931)
*Marcin Hoffmann,Marcin Dryjański,Adrian Kliks,Andreas Gladisch,Ajesh Pulyaar Keerthi,Mohammadreza Razmi,Heiko Lehmann*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向O-RAN架构的端到端能效测试框架，利用商业RAN模拟器和真实网络拓扑数据测试xApp/rApp协同的小区开关功能，结果显示能效最高可提升57%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前O-RAN中不同厂商的硬件和软件能效改进方案缺乏统一的测试和对比标准，各厂商仅在自身定义场景下展示效果，无法在不同网络条件下进行公平基准测试。

Method: 首先分析现有标准以识别缺失环节，基于此提出一个新颖的O-RAN端到端能效测试框架，利用商业RAN模拟器和真实运营商网络拓扑数据，测试xApp与rApp协同实现小区开关切换的能效表现。

Result: 与基准方案相比，所提框架下能效最高可提升57%。

Conclusion: 该工作填补了O-RAN能效统一测试的空白，为不同供应商软硬件方案的公平对比和基准测试提供了可行途径。

Abstract: Energy efficiency (EE) is one of the key challenges for contemporary and future mobile networks, including within the Open Radio Access Network (O-RAN) architecture. However, there is a significant gap in common procedures for comparing the EE of both hardware (HW) and software (SW) solutions offered by various vendors. Usually, EE improvements of both SW and HW solutions are demonstrated in a specific scenario defined by individual vendors avoiding comparisons and benchmarking under various network conditions. This paper outlines the need for unified end-to-end (E2E) EE testing for O-RAN. First, it analyzes the standards to identify missing parts. Based on the analysis, a novel O-RAN E2E EE Testing framework is proposed. The framework aims to test the EE of the xApp/rApp pair cooperating on the cell on/off switching using a commercial RAN emulator and real-world network topology data from a mobile network operator (MNO). The test results show up to 57% improvement in EE compared to the baseline.

</details>


### [681] [Waiting at the front door: Continuous monitoring of latency in the host network stack](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02057)
*Simon Sundberg,Anna Brunstrom,Simone Ferlin-Reiter,Jesper Dangaard Brouer,Toke Høiland-Jørgensen*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出 netstacklat，一种用于持续监控生产环境中主机网络延迟的工具，能够捕获从内核网络栈到应用程序读取数据各阶段的延迟，并在 Cloudflare 全球 CDN 中部署验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着网络进入亚毫秒延迟时代，主机内部延迟（包括网卡-CPU互连、内核网络栈、应用调度）成为持续低延迟的显著障碍，但缺乏能在生产环境中持续监控主机延迟的方法和工具。

Method: 设计并实现 netstacklat 监控工具，捕获 Linux 内核网络栈早期阶段直至应用程序读取数据多个点的延迟，并在测试床和 Cloudflare 全球 CDN 中部署评估。

Result: 在144种HTTP工作负载变体（Nginx和Apache）上验证了延迟捕获能力，监控开销仅使尾部延迟增加不超过6%，而此前方案增加超过100%。

Conclusion: netstacklat 能够以极低开销有效监控生产环境中的主机网络延迟，为理解和优化端主机延迟提供了实用的工具支持。

Abstract: With networking moving into the sub-millisecond latency domain, latency in the end host itself can become a significant barrier to achieving consistently low application latency. Both the physical interconnect between the network card and the CPU, the kernel network stack, and the scheduling of applications themselves can be considerable sources of latency. Previous work has studied host latency at various levels, yet there remains a lack of methods and tools to continuously monitor host latency in production. To remedy this, we present netstacklat, a monitoring tool that captures latency at several points in the host network, from the early parts of the Linux kernel network stack all the way until the application reads the data. We evaluate netstacklat in a testbed, demonstrating its ability to capture host latency across 144 variations of HTTP workloads for Nginx and Apache, while also showing how the low monitoring overhead does not inflate tail latency by more than 6%, where previous monitoring solutions increase it by over 100%. Furthermore, we share our initial findings from deploying netstacklat in Cloudflare's global CDN network.

</details>


### [682] [Statistically Robust Resource Block Allocation for Satellite Communications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02124)
*Chaitanya Manapragada,Laurent Decreusefond,Philippe Martins*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对卫星系统部署前的资源块（RB）容量规划方法，该方法能够应对空间相关的信号衰减协方差结构未知的挑战，通过蒙特卡洛模拟和集中度分析两种互补途径，为目标过载概率提供仿真推导的RB预算和保守解析上界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卫星系统部署后重新配置成本极高，因此必须在部署前准确估计其容量。然而，信号衰减的空间协方差结构通常是未知的，现有方法无法在卫星足迹层面提供完整的RB容量规划规则。

Method: 基于经典空间衰减协方差结构的高斯衰减场模型，随机采样用户及其衰减值；通过蒙特卡洛模拟推导给定目标过载概率下的RB预算，同时利用集中度分析方法给出给定RB预算下目标过载概率的保守解析上界。

Result: 提出了两种互补的RB容量规划途径：仿真驱动的RB预算估计和解析驱动的保守上界，两者结合可在空间相关衰减下实现合理的卫星足迹RB容量规划。

Conclusion: 该工作填补了卫星通信系统中足迹级RB容量规划规则的空白，提供了一种对空间衰减协方差结构具有鲁棒性的通用方法。

Abstract: It is critical to dimension (accurately estimate capacity of) a satellite system prior to deployment, as it is very expensive to reconfigure launched satellite systems that fail to meet demand or that waste capacity. The fundamental requirement is a dimensioning rule for resource blocks (RBs) given a satellite footprint and a target overload probability (target Quality-of-Service). The rule must be robust to the spatial covariance structure of signal attenuation, which is generally unknown both at the time of pre-deployment dimensioning and afterwards. Existing approaches address parts of this problem, but there does not yet exist a footprint-level RB dimensioning rule for the satellite context. We develop such a rule: starting with a Gaussian attenuation field that induces a covariance structure inspired by classical work on spatial covariance of attenuation, we sample users at random along with their field-based attenuation values, and estimate aggregate RB demand for a target overload probability. We do this in two complementary ways: a Monte Carlo route that gives a simulation-derived RB budget for a given target overload probability, and a concentration route that gives a conservative analytic upper bound on the target overload probability for a given RB budget (such as the one obtained through simulation). Taken together, these complementary approaches give a principled way to dimension RBs for a satellite footprint under spatially correlated attenuation.

</details>


### [683] [Discovering Agents for Discovery: The Case for DNS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02314)
*Ramachandra Rao Seethiraju,Sameer Thakar,Karthik Shyamsunder,Eric Osterweil*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出利用DNS（域名系统）作为AI代理在互联网中发现彼此的基础设施，通过评估导航完备性、查找复杂性和事务性能三个标准，基于119,757个真实服务端点的数据验证了DNS用于AI代理发现的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI代理在互联网中大规模部署，代理之间的发现机制成为核心挑战。现有方案在跨平台、跨组织边界、身份验证、完整性保障等方面存在不足，亟需一个可扩展、标准化且可信的基础设施。

Method: 提出了三个评估标准（导航完备性、查找复杂性、事务性能），收集了119,757个真实服务端点数据，评估了DNS事务的数据大小和延迟是否满足AI代理发现的元数据需求。

Result: 所需数据的大小和数量完全在单个DNS UDP事务的范围内，且延迟可控制在毫秒级别，验证了DNS用于AI代理发现的可行性。

Conclusion: DNS作为成熟、无处不在的互联网基础设施，是支撑AI代理在互联网规模下实现可发现性的理想选择，有助于加速安全、稳定、可靠的AI代理部署。

Abstract: As Artificial Intelligence (AI) agents enter their next stage of being deployed ubiquitously throughout the Internet, their discoverability will become a central challenge. The information AI agents need to discover one another, how they will locate it, how to facilitate authentication, integrity, and authorization, how to connect across different platforms, and how to scale across organizational boundaries form a set of unanswered challenges that deployment success will prompt. These are challenges for which one of the Internet's most venerable, solid, and ubiquitous infrastructures is ideally suited: The Domain Name System (DNS). Such a rich, already ubiquitous, and programmatically flexible foundation is an ideal option for discovery of AI agents. In this work, we propose an illustration and rationale for the basic semantics that discovery for AI agents will require. We argue that three key evaluation criteria will become paramount: navigational completeness (the extent to which the necessary metadata, with elements like trust, is included in a discovery solution), lookup complexity, and transaction performance (e.g., latency, speed, or recency). Using data about 119,757 real-world service endpoints and multiple agent tooling ecosystems, we empirically evaluate the first of these considerations to illustrate the appropriateness of using DNS for AI agent discovery. Our results show the size and amount of data necessary are well within the range of a single DNS UDP transaction, whose latency can be on the order of milliseconds. Our evaluations illustrate a promising path toward enabling AI agent discoverability at the Internet's scale, and thereby accelerating secure, stable, and resilient AI agent deployments.

</details>


### [684] [Certified Closed-Loop Control for Packet Networks: A Compositional Certification Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02368)
*Muhammad Bilal,Jon Crowcroft,Xiaolong Xu,Huaming Wu*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于分组网络控制的认证执行框架：在提议者与数据平面之间插入一个“认证算子”，该算子将候选动作投影到满足可配置证书的安全动作上，或报告不可行并执行有定量松弛的备用动作。该方法覆盖队列上限、服务下限、缓解上限、Foster-Lyapunov漂移约束及组合信封合约，并证明了算子级安全性、前馈组合安全性/稳定性以及小增益条件下的循环闭包结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分组网络是带有不连续性、延迟观测和部分状态信息的受控动态系统，自适应或学习驱动的提议者虽可提升性能，但可能引发饥饿、尾延迟尖峰或队列不稳定。现有方法缺乏可验证的安全性保证，因此需要一种系统化的认证机制来确保网络控制动作的安全性。

Method: 设计“认证算子”作为提议者与数据平面间的中介：每个控制节拍，提议者发出候选动作，算子将其投影到满足配置编译证书的可执行动作，或报告不可行并执行有定量松弛的备用动作。证书还导出可审计的包络线用于下游组合。条件性保证基于算子报告CERTIFIED、声明到达包络和积压边界有效、平台实现假设服务下限等前提。

Result: 在字节级闭环后端验证了认证执行边界的有效性，涵盖延迟遥测、延迟执行、弱提议者、包络不匹配、过载及毫秒级认证等场景。部署级调度器跟踪留待未来Linux或硬件实验。

Conclusion: 该认证执行框架为网络控制提供了可验证的安全保障，通过条件性保证和组合机制覆盖多种安全约束，证明了算子级安全性、前馈组合安全性与稳定性。

Abstract: Packet networks are controlled dynamical systems with discontinuities, delayed observations, and partial state information. Adaptive or learning-driven proposers can improve performance, but an unsafe proposal may still cause starvation, tail-delay spikes, or unstable queue behaviour. This paper treats packet-network control as an executed-action certification problem. A certified operator sits between any proposer and the dataplane. At each control tick, the proposer emits an arbitrary candidate action $\tilde u(t)$. The operator either projects it to an executable action $u(t)$ that satisfies a configuration-compiled certificate, or reports INFEASIBLE and executes an always-defined fallback with quantified slack. The certificate also exports an auditable envelope $\bar z(t)$ for downstream composition. The guarantees are conditional and explicit. They apply on ticks where the operator reports CERTIFIED, the declared arrival envelope and backlog bound are valid, and the platform realises the assumed service lower bound. Under these conditions, one mechanism covers backlog caps, service floors, mitigation caps, Foster--Lyapunov drift constraints, and compositional envelope contracts. We prove operator-level safety, feed-forward compositional safety and stability using exported envelopes, and a cyclic closure result under a small-gain condition. We also define breach and infeasibility semantics, discuss calibration of the service-tracking factor that links certified targets to realised scheduler behaviour, and evaluate the design under delayed telemetry, delayed actuation, weak proposers, envelope mismatch, overload, and millisecond-scale certification. The present evaluation validates the certified execution boundary in a byte-level closed-loop backend; deployment-level scheduler tracking is left to future Linux or hardware experiments.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [685] [An Empirical Study on Logging Evolution On Stack Overflow: Trends, Topics, and Challenges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00118)
*Patrick Loic Foalem,Andre Nguimbous,Foutse Khomh,Heng Li,Ettore Merlo*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 基于216,094条Stack Overflow帖子，使用LLM分类方法识别出11个日志相关主题，其中容器化环境下的日志记录是最具挑战性的主题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多从学术角度（文献综述和代码分析）探讨日志挑战，缺乏从从业者视角出发的综合研究。

Method: 分析SO帖子元数据的纵向趋势；采用基于LLM的分类方法（基于人工验证的基准样本）识别讨论主题；使用平均分数/浏览量衡量热度，使用三个社区驱动指标（无采纳答案比例、无回答比例、中位响应时间）衡量难度。

Result: 识别出11个主题，前三位（通用日志实践、错误处理与调试、日志级别与输出）占70%以上；容器化环境日志记录难度最高（64.9%无采纳答案，中位解决时间最长）。

Conclusion: 揭示了日志记录的实际挑战，为开发者、框架供应商、研究者和教育者提供了可操作的建议。

Abstract: Context: Logging is a crucial practice in software engineering, aiding developers in debugging applications when errors occur. While existing research has explored logging challenges from an academic perspective through literature reviews and source code analysis, a comprehensive study from the practitioners' perspective remains lacking. 
  Objective: This paper aims to bridge this knowledge gap by presenting an in-depth analysis of trends, topics, and challenges in logging based on a dataset of 216,094 posts from Stack Overflow (SO), a popular Q\&A platform for developers. 
Method: We analyzed longitudinal trends by examining metadata related to users, questions, and tags associated with logging discussions. To identify prevalent discussion topics, we employed a Large Language Model (LLM)--based classification approach, based on a manually validated ground-truth sample. Topic popularity was assessed through average scores and views, while difficulty was measured using three community-driven metrics: the proportion of questions without accepted answers, the proportion of unanswered questions, and the median time to receive an accepted answer.
  Results: Our analysis identifies 11 distinct topics, with the top three (General Logging Practices, Error Handling and Debugging, and Logging Levels and Output) accounting for over 70\% of all logging-related discussions. Notably, Logging in Containerized Environments emerged as the most difficult topic: 64.9\% of its questions lack an accepted answer, and its median resolution time is among the highest. These findings highlight enduring practitioner struggles with logging in Docker or other containerized environments  and the integration of logging pipelines into orchestrators such as Kubernetes and cloud environments.
  Conclusion: This study sheds light on the practical challenges of logging and provides actionable insights for developers, framework vendors, researchers, and educators.

</details>


### [686] [AI-PROPELLER: Warehouse-Scale Interprocedural Code Layout Optimization with AlphaEvolve](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00131)
*Chaitanya Mamatha Ananda,Rajiv Gupta,Mircea Trofin,Aiden Grossman,Sriraman Tallam,Xinliang David Li,Amir Yazdanbakhsh*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出AI-PROPELLER，利用Magellan智能体工作流将Propeller的编译器启发式方法演化为细粒度过程间优化器，通过在实际硬件上执行多个布局变体并测量性能计数器来优化策略超参数，首次在工业级大规模仓库应用中实现细粒度过程间代码布局优化，性能提升0.23%-1.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后链接优化器（如Propeller和BOLT）仅局限于过程内技术，未能充分利用过程间布局的全局潜力。由于组合搜索空间巨大且调用-返回语义复杂，细粒度过程间布局的性能潜力一直未得到实践验证。

Method: 提出AI-PROPELLER，核心是Magellan智能体工作流：将Propeller的编译器启发式方法演化为细粒度过程间优化器，并通过进化算法微调策略超参数。放弃近似静态成本模型，在实际硬件上生成并执行多个布局变体，测量真实性能计数器作为奖励信号。

Result: 在多个基准测试（包括大规模仓库应用）上评估，在已使用最先进的FDO和PLO优化的基础上，额外实现0.23%-1.6%的性能提升，对真实二进制而言这一提升幅度具有显著意义。

Conclusion: 首次在工业环境中实现了大规模仓库应用的细粒度过程间代码布局优化，证明了该方法的可行性和实际效益，为后链接优化领域开辟了新的方向。

Abstract: Post-link optimizers (PLOs) such as Propeller and BOLT have demonstrated that precise, profile-guided code layout can extract significant performance gains from heavily optimized binaries. However, these systems are currently restricted to intraprocedural techniques, leaving the global potential of interprocedural layout largely untapped. Interprocedural code layout is historically difficult due to a combinatorially intractable search space and complex call-return semantics that are challenging to model. Consequently, the performance potential of fine-grained interprocedural layout remains unproven in practice. AI-PROPELLER uses Magellan, an agentic workflow that evolves the compiler heuristic in Propeller into a fine-grained interprocedural optimizer and fine-tunes the resulting policy hyperparameters. To ensure high-fidelity, we move away from approximate static cost models and the agentic workflow generates multiple layout variants that are executed on actual hardware to measure real performance counters, providing a precise reward signal for the evolutionary loop. AI-PROPELLER has been evaluated on several benchmarks including large warehouse-scale applications and experiments show performance improvements of 0.23% to 1.6% optimized with state-of-the-art FDO and PLO which is significant for real-world binaries. This is the first time ever that large warehouse-scale applications in industrial settings have been optimized with fine-grained interprocedural code layout.

</details>


### [687] [Benchmarking Multimodal LLMs on Code Generation for Complex Interactive Webpages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00154)
*Fan Wu,Lishuai Dong,Cuiyun Gao,Yujia Chen,Yiming Huang,Yang Xiao,Qing Liao*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: WebIGBench是首个评估多模态大模型生成交互式网页代码的基准，覆盖5种交互动作类型（点击、输入等）和871个交互动作，并提出新型评估管道来检验交互一致性。实验揭示了当前模型在交互式网页代码生成上的性能边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准主要评估静态网页代码生成，忽略了真实应用中复杂的交互行为，且评估标准局限于视觉保真度和代码结构，缺乏对交互一致性的考量。

Method: 结合人工设计的交互路径与UI自动化，从真实网站收集103个复杂网页，覆盖5种交互动作类型（共871个交互动作），并提出新型自动化评估管道来评测交互一致性。

Result: 在多个代表性MLLM上的实验揭示了当前模型在交互式网页代码生成上的性能边界。

Conclusion: WebIGBench填补了交互式网页代码生成评估的空白，为未来MLLM在动态网页开发中的应用研究提供了标准化基准。

Abstract: Recent advancements in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in multimodal reasoning and code generation, catalyzing a new paradigm for front-end development. In particular, these models can directly transform visual designs into executable code, significantly improving the efficiency and adaptability of web development. Modern web applications are dynamic and interactive, featuring frequent user-page interactions. However, existing benchmarks largely evaluate the code generation of static webpages, ignoring the complex interactive behaviors in real-world applications. Besides, their evaluation criteria remain confined to visual fidelity and code structure, overlooking the interaction consistency between the generated and the reference webpages. To address these limitations, we introduce WebIGBench, the first benchmark designed to evaluate code generation for interactive webpages with complex interactions. By combining manually designed interaction paths with UI automation, we collected 103 complex webpages from real-world websites. This benchmark covers 5 popular interactive action types (e.g., click, input) involving 871 distinct interactive actions. Moreover, we propose a novel evaluation pipeline to address the gap in automated assessment of interactive actions. Extensive experiments on several representative MLLMs reveal the performance boundaries of current models in interactive webpage code generation using WebIGBench. The proposed benchmark is available at https://github.com/anoa12159-hue/WebIGBench_eval.

</details>


### [688] [Specification-Driven Development Benchmark: Security Knowledge Transition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00167)
*Oleg Grynets,Andrii Salyk,Vasyl Lyashkevych,Oleh Kaskun,Danyil Zhuravchak*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 针对AI辅助规格驱动开发中安全知识缺失的问题，提出多层规格安全模型和安全知识转换方法，通过实验验证了该方法比基线（无安全要求）和ASVS条件生成更能减少模态失败（从50降至36）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI辅助开发正向规格驱动范式转变，但现有方法只关注功能行为的显式描述，安全行为（如授权、输入验证、敏感数据处理等）被隐式处理或推迟到生成后审查，导致生成的系统满足功能需求但安全漏洞频发。

Method: 提出两个核心贡献：1) 多层规格安全模型——通过可追溯关系将系统实体、威胁、风险、需求、实施规则、控制、验证场景和证据联系起来；2) 安全知识转换方法——将业务和技术规格转化为经过验证的安全增强生成合约。通过隐式Oracle研究和后端生成实验（三种条件对比）进行评估。

Result: 在221测试的黑盒API套件中，基线模态失败50个，ASVS条件42个，多层安全模型36个。业务逻辑和管理安全等应用特定类别改进最为显著。

Conclusion: 多层安全模型比通用的ASVS标准更能提供针对特定系统的安全约束，有效减少安全缺陷，特别是在应用级安全类别中表现突出。

Abstract: AI-assisted software development is shifting from isolated code completion toward specification-driven generation, where business requirements, technical specifications, and acceptance criteria become operational input for LLM-based development agents. This shift creates a security problem: functional behavior is described explicitly, while security behavior remains implicit, generic, or postponed to post-generation review, causing generated systems to satisfy visible functional requirements while failing to preserve authorization rules, ownership boundaries, input validation, token rejection, sensitive data handling, and abuse-case semantics. This paper proposes a security knowledge operationalization approach for AI-assisted specification-driven development, combining two contributions: a Multilayer Specification Security Model that represents security knowledge through traceable relations between system entities, threats, risks, requirements, implementation rules, controls, verification scenarios, and evidence; and a Security Knowledge Transition Method that transforms business and technical specifications into a validated security-enriched generation contract. We evaluate the approach through two empirical studies: a hidden-oracle study assessing whether an LLM-based pipeline can derive a structured security model from system context, and a backend generation study under three conditions: no explicit security requirements, ASVS-conditioned generation, and Multilayer Security Model conditioning. Evaluated against a hidden 221-test black-box API suite, modal failures decreased from 50 in the baseline to 42 with ASVS and 36 with the Multilayer Security Model, with the strongest improvements in application-specific categories such as business logic and admin safety.

</details>


### [689] [How Generation Architecture Shapes Code Complexity in Multi-Agent LLM Systems: A Paired Study on HumanEval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00308)
*Nazmus Ashrafi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了六种多智能体代码生成架构（Basic、AC、ACT、Debugger、AC+Debugger、ACT+Debugger）对代码结构复杂度的影响。研究发现，六种架构在复杂度上分为两个明显集群（差距50-130%），且分析师-编码器拆分会增加复杂度，而运行时调试器不会；更重要的是，高复杂度集群并未带来更高的功能正确性（pass@1）。因此架构精细化应基于实际收益而非假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要评估多智能体代码生成的功能正确性（pass@1），但忽略了这些架构对代码结构复杂度的影响。作者希望填补这一空白，探究不同多智能体协同架构如何影响产出代码的复杂度，并评估复杂度增加是否值得。

Method: 使用GPT-4o家族两个模型，在全部164个HumanEval任务上测试6种多智能体配置（共1,968个配对观测）。采用5种RADON复杂度指标（SLOC、圈复杂度、Halstead Volume/Difficulty/Effort），通过配对非参数统计流程（Friedman检验、Wilcoxon符号秩事后检验、Holm校正、Kendall's W和配对秩双列效应量）进行分析，涵盖全部完成和仅通过两种条件。

Result: 六种架构在复杂度上可分为两个不可区分的集群，差距50-130%。分析师-编码器拆分增加复杂度，运行时调试器不增加复杂度（且在分析师-编码器背景下会降低复杂度），测试器则重新增加复杂度。高复杂度集群在pass@1上并未优于低复杂度架构。

Conclusion: LLM代码生成的架构精细化不应被默认接受，而应通过实际收益衡量来证明其必要性。简单的架构在准确性与复杂度上均优于或持平于复杂架构。

Abstract: Large-language-model code generation has shifted from single-shot prompting to multi-agent orchestrations - analyst, coder, tester, and debugger pipelines - and is evaluated almost exclusively on functional correctness. Whether these architectures also affect the structural complexity of the code they produce, and which orchestration layers carry the cost, remains largely unexamined: prior work has documented prompt-level effects on code complexity, but the architecture-level question is open. We compare six widely-used multi-agent configurations (Basic, AC, ACT, Debugger, AC+Debugger, ACT+Debugger) under two models from the GPT-4o family across all 164 HumanEval tasks - 1,968 paired observations - using the five RADON complexity metrics (SLOC, cyclomatic complexity, and Halstead Volume, Difficulty, and Effort). We apply a paired non-parametric statistical pipeline (Friedman omnibus, Wilcoxon signed-rank post-hoc with Holm correction, Kendall's $W$ and matched-pairs rank-biserial effect sizes) in both all-completions and passing-only conditions. The six architectures collapse into two indistinguishable complexity clusters separated by a 50-130% gap, the same partition in both models and under both conditions; among the architectural layers, the analyst-coder split inflates complexity, the runtime debugger does not - and on the analyst-coder background actively deflates it - and the tester re-inflates it. The heavy cluster's additional complexity buys no pass@1 advantage: the leanest architectures match or beat the heaviest on accuracy. Architectural elaboration in LLM code generation should therefore be justified by measured benefit on the dimensions that matter, not assumed.

</details>


### [690] [Measuring Delivery Consistency in Practice: A DORA Extension from a Multi-Platform Release Setting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00364)
*Luiz Parente,James C. Davis*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了交付一致性（DC）指标，作为DORA框架的补充，用于衡量部署节奏的规律性，并通过交付健康矩阵将团队划分为八个原型，帮助识别组织或流程约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DORA框架被广泛采用，但其指标仅为一阶统计量或简单比率，无法捕捉部署时序的分布特征，导致相同指标值的团队可能呈现截然不同的交付节奏（如规律与突发性爆发），需要更精细的度量手段。

Method: 基于发布间隔的变异系数定义DC指标（有界二阶矩度量），并将其与DORA概念整合为交付健康矩阵，包含八个架构原型，基于120周数据在四个平台上进行实验评估。

Result: DC能够区分DORA层级相同但节奏规律性不同的平台；交付健康矩阵将读数总结为原型，指向共享的组织或程序性约束。

Conclusion: DC指标和交付健康矩阵能有效补充DORA框架，揭示交付节奏的规律性差异，并为团队提供差异化的改进干预方向。

Abstract: The DevOps Research and Assessment (DORA) framework is the most widely adopted measurement system for performance measurement across engineering teams. However, every DORA metric is a first-moment statistic or a simple ratio, which limits the potential insights into engineering process. For example, metrics like Deployment Frequency do not capture the distributional shape of deployment timing, so teams with identical measures can deploy on a metronomic cadence or in undesirably erratic bursts. We have been developing and piloting Delivery Consistency (DC), a bounded second-moment measure of cadence regularity derived from the coefficient of variation of inter-release intervals. In conjunction with other DORA concepts, we integrated DC into the Delivery Health Matrix, an eight-archetype diagnostic that maps joint readings to differentiated interventions. We report an experience evaluation on a four-platform software delivery group using 120 weeks of data extracted from our Jira, GitHub, and Firebase records. DC allowed us to distinguish platforms with identical DORA tier placements but different cadence regularity, and the Matrix summarized the readings into an archetype that pointed at a shared organization or procedural constraint.

</details>


### [691] [GitHub Copilot and Developer Productivity: An Observational Dose-Response Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00438)
*Alex Heilman,Alex Kyllo,Emerson Murphy-Hill*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 基于微软云+AI部门16,223名工程师43周的数据，通过固定效应模型和泊松伪最大似然估计发现，GitHub Copilot（GHCP）能使工程师在同等编码时间下完成更多PR（最高使用周相较零使用周提升40.5%），且效果单调递增但边际递减。七项稳健性检验均支持这一效率提升效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究未能厘清GHCP使用与工程师产出之间的因果关系：高使用率的工程师本身可能更高效（个体选择偏差），且高使用周本身可能就是工作忙碌周（时间混淆）。作者旨在通过严谨的固定效应设计和多种稳健性检验，分离出GHCP对个体工程师效率的因果效应。

Method: 采用43周面板数据（16,223名微软云+AI工程师），使用工程师个体固定效应消除时不变异质性；以活跃编码时间和浏览器时间作为控制变量，采用泊松伪最大似然估计（PPML）配合双向固定效应（个体+时间），将GHCP使用强度作为治疗变量，PR完成数作为结果变量。并执行七项稳健性和证伪检验。

Result: 工程师在GHCP最高使用周相较零使用周，在控制编码努力水平不变的情况下，PR完成数提升40.5%。效果随使用强度增加呈单调递增，但边际递减。七项稳健性检验（非编码AI参与、团队冲击、周内任务重新分配、跨周污染、PR拆分为更小单元、转向更简单任务类型、治疗操作化敏感性）均通过。

Conclusion: 在明确的条件独立假设下，个体内设计估计出的工具特定效率效应，表明GitHub Copilot能显著提升工程师的工作效率，且该结论经过多种替代解释的检验仍保持稳健。

Abstract: Does GitHub Copilot (GHCP) make engineers more productive, or do the engineers who use it more differ from those who use it less? And even within a single engineer, are GHCP-heavy weeks just busy weeks in which more of everything gets done? We study these questions using 43 weeks of data from 16,223 software engineers across Microsoft's Cloud+AI organization. Engineer fixed effects address the first concern by comparing each engineer against themselves rather than against other engineers, eliminating time-invariant differences in skill, role, and team. Active coding time and browser time then enter a Poisson Pseudo-Maximum Likelihood model with two-way fixed effects to address the harder, within-engineer confound: that GHCP-heavy weeks coincide with high-effort weeks. This defines our estimand as an efficiency effect: more pull requests completed at equivalent levels of coding time. Engineers are estimated to complete 40.5% more PRs in their highest GHCP usage weeks relative to their zero-usage weeks, holding measured development effort constant. The gradient is monotonic with diminishing returns at high intensity. Seven robustness and falsification tests target the remaining plausible alternative explanations (non-coding AI engagement, team-level shocks, within-week task reallocation, cross-week contamination, PR slicing into smaller units, shifts toward easier task types, and sensitivity to how the treatment is operationalized). Under an explicitly stated conditional-independence assumption, the within-engineer design estimates a tool-specific efficiency effect that is consistent with all seven robustness tests.

</details>


### [692] [When Safe Skills Collide: Measuring Compositional Risk in Agent Skill Ecosystems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00448)
*Su Wang,Pin Qian,Yihang Chen,Junxian You,Xiaoyuan Wang,Xiaochong Jiang,Lifei Liu,Haoran Yu,Jingzhou Xu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究AI Agent系统中，原本安全的单个技能组合后可能产生不安全行为。通过SkillReact框架对1,520个ClawHub技能进行测试，发现22.25%的技能对存在结构性的组合安全风险，经人工校准后约18.2%（约14K对）是真实风险。进一步实验表明，这些组合风险是否被实际利用取决于底层模型的安全倾向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM Agent系统越来越依赖社区贡献的技能（skills），这些技能单独检查是安全的，但组合在一起时可能产生意外的安全风险。现有的安全评估仅关注单个技能，忽视了技能间组合的潜在威胁。

Method: 提出了SkillReact框架，包含三个组件：(1) 确定性静态组合基准测试（检测结构化组合风险）；(2) 双评估者LLM辅助人工裁决管道（校准真实风险）；(3) 基于行动的利用性测试框架（验证实际模型调用行为）。在1,520个ClawHub技能上构建了211,575个技能对进行测试。

Result: 22.25%的技能对被标记为结构性候选风险；经人工模式分层审计，真实组合风险率约18.2%（约14K对）；行动测试发现风险是否被实际执行取决于底层模型（Haiku-4-5完全执行，Opus-4-7部分执行，Sonnet-4-6拒绝执行）；未安装技能时模型合规性最高。

Conclusion: 组合安全检查（install-time compositional checks）和能力隔离（capability isolation）是单体技能扫描的重要补充。技能组合决定了哪些能力可被调用，而宿主模型决定是否实际使用这些能力。

Abstract: LLM agents increasingly rely on community-contributed skills that expand an agent's operational capability set. We study a core safety problem in agentic AI systems: whether individually safe skills can compose into unsafe installed skill sets. We present SkillReact, a compositional security measurement framework with three components: a deterministic static-composition benchmark, a two-rater LLM-assisted human-adjudication pipeline, and an action-based exploitability harness. On 1,520 ClawHub skills, 651 pass individual inspection and form 211,575 pairs; the benchmark flags 22.25% of these as structural candidates. We treat this raw rate as a recall-oriented scanner ceiling and calibrate it against human judgment: in a pattern-stratified audit, roughly one in five flagged pair-pattern hits survives as a real compositional risk (population-weighted validity 18.2%, our headline result), implying about 14K genuine risk memberships in a single registry that per-skill scanning misses by construction, since every pair is individually safe. An action-based harness then probes when these candidates become model-issued tool calls, and finds realization gated by host-model disposition: on an anchor-conditioned dropper subset, Haiku-4-5 issues the dropper-stage tool call on all 39 direct-prompt trials (36 of them the full download-then-execute chain, 3 download-only), Opus-4-7 stops at the download, and Sonnet-4-6 refuses outright. A control that holds the request fixed and varies only the installed skills finds compliance highest with no skills installed: a composition fixes which capabilities are reachable, while the host model decides whether to use them. Together these motivate install-time compositional checks and capability isolation as complements to per-skill scanning.

</details>


### [693] [Sakura: An Approach for Generating Complex Tests from Natural Language Test Descriptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00530)
*Tyler Stennett,Rangeet Pan,Bridget McGinn,Alessandro Orso,Saurabh Sinha*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Sakura是一个基于多智能体框架的测试生成系统，能从自然语言描述生成结构复杂的测试用例，相比现有工具在编译性和覆盖率上提升38-78%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动化测试生成工具通常只针对单一焦点方法生成单元测试，与开发者编写的涉及多焦点方法、复杂调用序列和精细断言的测试之间存在巨大差距。

Method: Sakura采用多智能体架构：本地化智能体通过静态分析将测试步骤映射到具体代码；组合智能体合成可编译测试代码并通过执行反馈迭代优化；监督智能体协调各智能体交互。

Result: 在20个应用和1,464个测试场景中，Sakura相比Gemini CLI等基线工具，测试编译性提升50-78%，与真实测试的覆盖重叠度提升38-66%。搭配小型开源模型时仍优于使用大型专有模型的基线。

Conclusion: 基于自然语言描述的多智能体框架能更有效地生成结构复杂的测试用例，且使用小型开源模型也能达到优越性能，成本效益更高。

Abstract: Testing is a core activity in software development workflows, and research on its automation has spanned several decades. Most existing approaches generate unit tests for individual methods, validate isolated API endpoints, or target user interface (UI) layers, with non-API and non-UI automated test generators typically exercising only a single focal method. Recent empirical evidence shows a substantial gap between such generated tests and developer-written ones, which often span multiple focal methods, involve complex call sequences, and contain elaborate assertions that current automated approaches fail to capture. To address this gap, we propose generating tests from natural language (NL) descriptions of developer intent. We present Sakura, the first agent-based framework for generating structurally complex test cases from NL descriptions. Sakura decomposes NL descriptions into structured blocks and processes them using a multi-agent system consisting of a localization agent that grounds test steps in concrete application code via static analysis, a composition agent that synthesizes compilable test code and iteratively refines it using execution feedback, and a supervisor agent that coordinates agent interactions. To evaluate Sakura, we curate a novel dataset of NL test descriptions at three levels of abstraction, systematically generated from developer-written tests mined from Apache Commons projects. Across 20 applications and 1,464 test scenarios, Sakura significantly outperforms off-the-shelf agentic tools such as Gemini CLI. Specifically, Sakura achieves 50-78% higher test compilability and 38-66% higher coverage overlap with ground-truth tests compared to baselines using the same models. Moreover, Sakura paired with small open-source models such as Devstral Small 2 and Qwen3-Coder outperforms Gemini CLI using large proprietary models, while also being more cost-effective.

</details>


### [694] [FVSpec: Real-World Property-Based Tests as Lean Challenges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01008)
*Quinn Dougherty,Max von Hippel,Hazel Shackleton,Mike Dodds*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文构建了一个从真实Python仓库中提取基于属性的测试并翻译成Lean 4形式化规约的基准测试，用于评估AI模型和智能体在真实软件形式验证任务中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI生成的代码越来越多，对真实世界软件进行AI辅助形式验证的需求日益增长，但目前这一领域缺乏标准化的评估基准。
